jobDescription:
Who Are We

Hansen Technologies is a leading global provider of software and services that enable organisations to transform customer experiences and streamline critical business processes. With a rich history of innovation and a footprint that spans over 80 countries, Hansen empowers utilities, energy, and communications companies to thrive in an ever-evolving digital landscape. Our commitment to excellence, customer focus, and collaborative culture makes Hansen a place where passionate professionals can make a meaningful impact, drive real change, and help shape the future of industries worldwide.

We are proud to be an equal opportunities employer. Hansen prides itself on celebrating diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees, even extending this to how we work with our customers, partners, and suppliers. We welcome applications from all qualified candidates, regardless of age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, race, ethnicity, religion or belief, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic. If you require any adjustments or accommodation during the recruitment process, please let us know.

Why This Role Matters

Lead, Inspire, Transform, Deliver.

At Hansen, our software powers critical services for industries that keep the world running. As a Senior Software Development Manager, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the future of our CIS-HU engineering capability, leading distributed teams across Vietnam and Australia.

This is more than a leadership role—it's an opportunity to build high-performing engineering teams, elevate technical capability, and drive delivery excellence at scale. You will influence how we adopt AI-assisted development, modern cloud platforms, and best-in-class engineering practices to innovate faster and deliver greater value to customers.

Your leadership will directly impact how our teams perform, how our products evolve, and how we deliver secure, scalable, and reliable solutions across global markets.

What You’ll Do

- Lead Engineering Teams: Develop and mentor Technical Leads and engineering teams across a distributed structure, driving high performance and engagement.
- Drive Delivery Excellence: Oversee planning, execution, and delivery across multiple teams, ensuring alignment with business priorities and customer commitments.
- Advance AI & Productivity: Embed AI-assisted engineering practices to enhance development efficiency, quality, and innovation.
- Strengthen Technical Capability: Champion modern cloud (AWS) and engineering practices including microservices, APIs, CI/CD, and automation.
- Collaborate Across Functions: Work closely with Product, Architecture, QA, DevOps, and Delivery to ensure cohesive execution and outcomes.
- Enhance Quality & Standards: Establish and maintain strong engineering standards, focusing on scalability, security, and performance.
- Manage Risk & Improve Continuously: Proactively identify delivery risks, resolve issues, and drive continuous improvement across teams.
requirements:
What You Bring

- Proven experience leading software engineering teams across multiple layers of leadership, including Technical Leads.
- Strong people leadership skills with the ability to coach, inspire, and develop high-performing teams.
- Experience leading distributed teams across regions and cultures.
- Deep understanding of modern engineering practices, cloud technologies (preferably AWS), and software architecture.
- Exposure to AI-assisted development and engineering productivity improvements.
- Strong communication and stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence across technical and business audiences.
- Expertise in CI/CD, microservices, APIs, containerisation, and secure development practices.
- A passion for continuous improvement, innovation, and delivery excellence.

Nice to have:

- Experience in energy, utilities, or enterprise software domains
- Background in cloud transformation or large-scale modernisation
- Familiarity with tools such as Jira, Confluence, GitHub, and CI/CD platforms
benefits:
- Competitive Market Rate Salary - full salary (including SI contribution) during the probation period and 13th-month salary
- Twice yearly salary review
- Full participation in the annual Hansen Profit Share Program
- Great Leave Options – including 12 days annual leave during Year 1, increasing to 15 days annual leave and 12 days paid sick leave per year).
- Premium healthcare for employee and dependents (spouse and {all} children and support for parents). Also, free comprehensive annual check-up for employees.
- High-speed Internet credit: VND 5,5million/year
- Wellness benefit: VND 2million annually for fitness package/devices
- Free lunch, snacks, and drink in our new modern offices, which have a cool open atmosphere with an outdoor cafe, bar, and recreation area in District 2 – including free scooter parking
- Continuous Learning and Development, including personalised Udemy Business – online learning platform.
- Reward and Recognition - Company sponsored trips and events, tenure milestones and global recognition program.
- New, modern developer laptop, 2 large monitors, and headset.
- An international work environment, highly skilled colleagues to learn from both locally and globally where you can develop your IT career and English skills.

title: Remote AI Engineer (Deep Learning Algorithm/ Python)
location: Ho Chi Minh - Ha Noi - Da Nang
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
VisionTech is building an algorithm team capable of truly integrating deep learning into products and onto terminal devices. This role is not just about connecting models or tuning packages; it requires continuously improving model performance under the constraints of terminal computing power, memory, latency, and product limitations. We are looking for someone who possesses the complete capability from problem definition and method design to experimental verification. We hope you don't just use models, but deeply understand the principles behind them, can independently dismantle abstract problems, propose hypotheses, design experiments, and land research results into real products.

Responsibilities:

- Challenges: Continuously improve model performance under limited computing power and memory, advancing from demos to mass-producible, maintainable, and continuously evolving products, and flexibly responding to product issues reported by customers.
- Edge AI Design: Responsible for the design, training, optimization, and deployment of Edge AI models to improve product performance under terminal platform power constraints.
- Systemic Improvement: Systematically improve model performance based on feedback and demo requirements through model architecture, training methods, loss design, data preprocessing, data cleaning, and augmentation strategies.
- Performance Balancing: Analyze performance bottlenecks and balance accuracy, latency, memory, and power consumption according to product requirements and hardware constraints.
- Technical Research: Independently read papers, track technical progress, and evaluate applicability and cost-effectiveness for actual products. Deconstruct vague or abstract product problems into verifiable technical questions, proposing improvement directions and planning experiments.
requirements:
- Location: Not based in Taiwan. We are looking for partners permanently based overseas (i.e., not in Taiwan), regardless of nationality.
- Deep Learning Fundamentals: Familiarity with basic principles including, but not limited to:Neural network optimizationRegularizationGeneralizationModel evaluation and error analysis
- Neural network optimization
- Regularization
- Generalization
- Model evaluation and error analysis
- Development Experience: Practical experience in model development with the ability to independently complete:Problem definitionData analysisModel trainingExperimental designResult interpretation
- Problem definition
- Data analysis
- Model training
- Experimental design
- Result interpretation
- Frameworks: Familiarity with at least one mainstream deep learning framework, such as PyTorch.
- Engineering Skills: Solid programming skills and engineering habits, capable of writing maintainable, reproducible, and scalable research and training code.
- Analytical Ability: Ability to read technical papers and transform them into executable experimental plans. Possess independent thinking and problem-deconstruction skills rather than relying solely on existing recipes or ready-made models.
- Edge Constraints: Understanding of common constraints and challenges when landing models on edge/embedded platforms, such as:LatencyModel sizeMemory footprintFLOPs
- Latency
- Model size
- Memory footprint
- FLOPs

Preferred Qualifications:

- Publications/Patents: Previously published patents or deep learning papers in international conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, ICLR, CVPR, etc.).
- Specialized Experience:Model compression, pruning, and quantizationKnowledge distillationOn-device inference optimizationResearch/development experience in generative models
- Model compression, pruning, and quantization
- Knowledge distillation
- On-device inference optimization
- Research/development experience in generative models
- Deployment: Experience deploying models to actual terminal platforms.
- Data Strategy: Familiarity with the impact of data preprocessing and quality on model performance; experience in data engineering or data strategy optimization.
- Project Lifecycle: Experience advancing research topics or production projects from 0 to 1.
- Resource Management: Successfully achieved acceptable model performance and deployment costs in resource-constrained scenarios.

Ideal Candidate Attributes:

- Not satisfied with just "getting the model running," but asks "why it works, why it failed, and how to make it better."
- Actively establishes baselines, proposes hypotheses, and designs verification processes when facing abstract problems.
- Finds balance between research depth and product reality rather than just chasing paper ideas or simple engineering stacking.
- Passionate about deep learning and willing to translate understanding into real-world systems.

Qualifications & Package:

- Education: Master's degree or above in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Data Science, or related fields.
- Location: Not based in Taiwan.
- Compensation: Cash compensation will be based on your strength and location. We provide a "competitive" equity package (out company believes that those with IPO experience in this industry understand the high potential of stock options).
benefits:

- High Ownership, High Impact: Every team member plays a critical role in product direction, technical innovation, and strategic decision-making.
- Startup Speed with Global Vision: Experience the fast-paced energy of a startup while working on technologies designed for international markets and large-scale commercialization.
- Work on cutting-edge AI imaging technologies that directly shape future smartphone experiences

title: Medior Enterprise Security Architect
label: HOT
reasons:
- Professional & global working environment
- Lots of training & development opportunities
- Health-care insurances by international provider
jobDescription:
REPORT TO: Group Security Manager (CISO)

JOB PURPOSE:

- The Medior Enterprise Security Architect defines, maintains and operationalizes architecture for security services and security solutions across De Heus. The role translates security policy and principles into practical security design patterns, guardrails and approval criteria that can be applied consistently across regions and business units.

- The role provides the security authority to review, challenge and approve designs produced by Cloud & Infra, Applications, Data & Analytics, OT and other teams from a security perspective, ensuring alignment with global security guardrails, standards and risk decisions. The role does not own or replace the full architecture responsibility of those teams; those teams remain responsible for secure designs within their own domains.

- The architect supports architecture reviews, service catalog development, exception handling and security design decisions, while working closely with a senior architecture counterpart during the transition period.

ACCOUNTABILITIES:

1. Security Architecture Definition & Maintenance

- Define and maintain architecture for security services and security solutions across De Heus.

- Develop practical security design patterns, standards interpretations and guardrails for regional and local execution.

- Document security architecture decisions, reusable patterns and design guidance in a clear and usable way.

2. Security Design Review & Approval

- Review, challenge and approve designs submitted by Cloud & Infra, Applications, Data & Analytics, OT and other teams from a security perspective.

- Provide structured security feedback to improve alignment of peer-team designs with global security standards and guardrails.

- Prepare security architecture review materials and support Architecture Review Board decisions and follow-up actions.

3. Security Service Catalog & Exception Governance

- Contribute to the security service catalog and help define clear business, functional and technical ownership.

- Support governance of exceptions, compensating controls and remediation commitments.

- Help define and maintain security architecture KPIs and inputs for the central security dashboard.

4. Cross-Team Collaboration & Field Enablement

- Contribute to the security service catalog and help define clear business, functional and technical ownership.

- Support governance of exceptions, compensating controls and remediation commitments.

- Help define and maintain security architecture KPIs and inputs for the central security dashboard.

5. Cross-Team Collaboration & Field Enablement

- Work with Regional Security Delivery Specialists to enable knowledge transfer and practical security implementation guidance for business units.

- Build understanding of De Heus platforms, organization, priorities and delivery model to apply security guidance in a practical and business-relevant way.

- Align with the Enterprise Architect, CIO leadership and global IT functions on shared platforms and governance.

6. Professional Growth & Transition Support

- Learn actively from a senior architecture counterpart during the transition period.

- Build deeper knowledge of De Heus security standards, architecture governance, business priorities and platform landscape.

- Continuously strengthen knowledge in security architecture, secure design principles and stakeholder management.

RESULT:

- A coherent set of security architecture patterns, standards and guardrails is in place and adopted across projects and regions.

- Security review inputs and approval decisions are timely, clear and well documented.

- Designs from peer teams show measurable improvement in alignment with global security standards and guardrails.

- The security service catalog is structured and maintained with clear ownership.

- Exception governance is structured and supports measurable reduction of long-term risk.

- Business units and regional teams receive usable security guidance that supports implementation and handover.

- The role shows measurable growth in independence, quality of review and confidence in design decisions during the transition period.
requirements:
Qualifications:

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Cyber Security or a related field. Equivalent experience may be considered.

- Certifications such as CISSP, CISM, CCSP, TOGAF, SABSA or relevant vendor certifications are an advantage.

Experience:

- Around 3 to 5 years of relevant experience in security architecture, security engineering, security solution design or closely related technical roles across IT and Cloud. Experience with OT is an advantage.

- Experience translating security policies or standards into practical technical guardrails, patterns or implementation guidance.

- Experience reviewing technical designs from a security perspective in collaboration with infrastructure, application, data, analytics and engineering teams.

- Working knowledge of identity and access management, segmentation, secure remote access and privileged access concepts.

- Familiarity with exception handling, documentation and security governance processes.

- Experience within De Heus IT or in a closely related De Heus technology role is a strong advantage, because knowledge of the organization, stakeholders, platforms and ways of working can partly compensate for fewer years in a formal security architecture role.

- Experience supporting implementation teams with practical security guidance and knowledge transfer is an advantage.

Competencies:

- Able to translate security policy and principles into practical and implementable security guidance.

- Strong security review mindset and ability to assess peer-team designs objectively.

- Structured and clear in documentation, architecture artefacts and service ownership thinking.

- Good stakeholder engagement across global, regional and local teams.

- Able to work effectively with Cloud & Infra, Applications, Data & Analytics, OT and delivery teams without role overlap.

- Strong learning agility and willingness to grow into broader architecture accountability over time.

- Open to coaching, feedback and structured development during the transition period.

- Disciplined, reliable and comfortable working in a governance-driven environment.

Language(s):

- Fluency in English at CEFR Level B2 is mandatory (both written and spoken), as the role requires daily collaboration with global, regional and local teams across De Heus.

Other Requirements:

- Full-time global role with occasional travel.

- Location independent: the role can be based at any De Heus global hub. The current preference is HCMC, Vietnam.

- Reporting line into the central CISO Office; close collaboration with a senior architecture counterpart during the transition period.
benefits:
- 13th month salary, KPI bonus, annual salary review
- Annual Health Check, Year End Party
- Company Trip, Team Building, Family Day
- Health Insurance (Generali care 24/24 Insurance)
- Birthday Gift, Staff Gift

About the role

LeapXpert is transforming how regulated enterprises communicate compliantly across modern messaging channels. As we scale our R&D organization across 15 product squads and shift toward an agentic AI development model, we need someone to own the knowledge infrastructure that powers it all.

This is not a traditional technical writing role. You won’t be measured by pages produced. You’ll be measured by how well our documentation system scales, how quickly squads ship accurate docs alongside features, and how reliably our knowledge assets serve both internal teams and enterprise customers in regulated industries.

Title: Knowledge Systems Lead (formerly Technical Writer)

Function: Product

Reporting: Head of Product

Location: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

What you’ll own

Documentation Pipeline Architecture

- Design and operate the end-to-end agentic documentation pipeline — from PRD and spec inputs through AI-assisted drafting to published output
- Define the toolchain: structured authoring tools, doc-as-code workflows, version control, and publishing infrastructure
- Build and maintain prompt frameworks that generate first drafts from structured inputs (Jira tickets, PRDs, API specs, release notes)

Quality Standards & Governance

- Set and enforce content standards across all 15 squads — tone, structure, accuracy, and compliance-safe language
- Act as the adversarial reviewer on AI-generated content — catching hallucinations, missing regulatory caveats, and contradictions with platform behavior
- Own the compliance language library: approved phrasing for SEC 17a-4, FINRA, MiFID II, GDPR, and other frameworks LeapXpert operates within

Knowledge Architecture

- Design and maintain the content taxonomy across product areas (messaging channels, compliance features, admin, integrations)
- Ensure documentation is structured as machine-readable knowledge — optimized for RAG retrieval, AI chatbot grounding, and customer-facing search
- Own the single source of truth strategy: eliminate duplication, manage versioning across product bundles (Essentials, Enterprise, Enterprise+)

Squad Enablement

- Embed documentation checkpoints into the product development lifecycle — not as a downstream task but as a release gate
- Train PMs and engineers on structured writing inputs so AI pipeline outputs improve over time
- Provide squad-level support during major integration launches (WhatsApp, Telegram, RCS, LINE, etc.)

What success looks like

- Documentation ships alongside features, not weeks after
- AI pipeline reduces manual drafting effort by 60%+ within 12 months
- Zero documentation-related compliance incidents with enterprise customers
- Squads self-serve 80% of routine doc updates through the pipeline with minimal intervention
- Knowledge base serves as a reliable grounding source for internal AI tools and customer-facing chatbots
requirements:
What you bring

Must-have

- Proven ability to design or operate documentation workflows — we care more about what you’ve shipped and how you think than how long you’ve been doing it
- Hands-on experience with docs-as-code workflows (Git, Markdown, static site generators like Docusaurus or MkDocs)
- Strong editorial judgment — you can spot when AI output is subtly wrong, not just obviously wrong
- Ability to read and interpret API documentation, PRDs, and engineering specs independently
- Experience designing or operating AI-assisted content pipelines — or demonstrated hands-on experimentation with AI writing tools in a structured workflow

Strong advantage

- Familiarity with structured authoring standards (DITA, content reuse patterns)
- Background in compliance, fintech, or other regulated SaaS environments
- Prompt engineering experience applied to documentation or knowledge workflows

Mindset

- Systems thinker first, writer second
- Comfortable owning ambiguous infrastructure problems without a playbook
- Proactive about flagging when documentation is a risk, not just a gap

What this role is not

- It is not a high-volume drafting role — AI handles first drafts
- It is not a support function that activates after engineering ships — you’re upstream
- It is not isolated from product decisions — you have a seat in the product development lifecycle

title: Agentic Coding Specialist
label: HOT
reasons:
- Global growth with experienced engineers
- Innovative, balanced, creative culture
- Competitive salary, benefits, training
jobDescription:
About Scandinavian Software Park

Scandinavian Software Park is Monterro’s tech hub in Hanoi, home to 150+ software engineers working for 13+ Nordic B2B SaaS companies. Founded in 2021, the park connects outstanding Vietnamese engineers with Scandinavia’s market-leading software companies.

Monterro is a Stockholm-based private equity firm managing EUR 2.85bn, specializing exclusively in Nordic B2B software. We’re building a dedicated AI team called InFuse AI to accelerate AI adoption across our portfolio – and it starts right here in Hanoi.

Is this you?

You can’t stop exploring agentic coding. Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, the latest open-source agent frameworks. You try them all, you compare them, you have opinions. Not because someone asked you to, but because you couldn’t resist. You read the changelogs. You follow the people building these tools. When something new drops, you’re already testing it.

Maybe you’ve built side projects just to see what’s possible. Maybe you’ve automated parts of your own workflow that nobody asked you to automate. Maybe you spend your evenings thinking about how AI changes the way developers work, not the models themselves, but what they mean for how software gets built. That’s the kind of curiosity we’re looking for.

You’re the person your colleagues come to when they want to understand what AI can actually do for their code. And you enjoy that. You like showing people, not just telling them.

You’ve shipped production software for 5+ years. You know what it’s like to maintain a legacy codebase, wrestle with technical debt, and deliver under pressure. That experience matters, it’s what gives you credibility when you sit down with a developer and say “let me show you something.”

Note: This role requires a strong software development background but the job itself is coaching and enabling other developers, not writing production code day to day. We’re looking for someone who builds with agentic coding tools, not someone who builds AI/ML models. If your background is mainly in machine learning, data science, or AI research, this probably isn’t the right fit.

Your English is strong. You communicate clearly and ask good questions.

If this sounds like you, keep reading.

What do you do?

Roughly 80% of your time: help developers get good at AI coding. The other 20% is technical assessment work for investment decisions. But this split isn’t fixed, it will shift based on what’s needed.Coach and enable developers.Scandinavian Software Park has 150+ engineers working for 13+ Nordic B2B SaaS companies. Many of them haven’t yet integrated AI into how they code. Your job is to change that.You’ll work together with them directly in their codebases — not with slides and theory, but with real code and real problems. Pair programming, workshops, hands-on sessions. You’ll help teams find the workflows that actually work for them, at their level, in their stack.What this looks like day to day:

- Sit with developers and show them how to use AI tools effectively on their actual tasks
- Run workshops tailored to each team’s tech stack and experience level
- Help teams build habits — from spec-driven development to effective agent workflows to knowing when AI helps and when it doesn’t
- Support portfolio company teams based in Hanoi with agentic coding training
- Help with legacy modernization projects where AI-assisted development can make a real difference
- Create practical guides and share what works across teams

You never work in a vacuum. Every engagement is coordinated with the Swedish AI team and/or the engineering leader at the portfolio company. You’ll always have someone to discuss approach with and learn from.You don’t need to have been a professional trainer. But you need to be the kind of person who genuinely likes helping others figure things out and who is patient enough to meet people where they are.

Support investment decisions through technical assessment.

When Monterro evaluates a company for acquisition, you’ll help answer: how hard is this to build? You do this by trying to replicate the target company’s solution using AI tools. The outcome is always useful:

- If it’s easy to replicate – that tells us the solution has limited technical moat
- If it’s hard – we learn more about what’s difficult, which informs both the investment decision and where to create value afterwards

You’ll also use AI to review code quality, technical debt, and architecture in target companies and feed your findings into the investment process.

Your team:You’ll be part of Monterro’s AI team, Infuse AI – a small, senior team based in Stockholm that works across the entire portfolio. You report to the AI Lead for reviews and development, but your daily work is closely coordinated with our senior agentic coding specialist. Expect daily standups, weekly team meetings (remote) and a lot of autonomy in between.You’re the team’s presence in Hanoi. That means you’ll build relationships with developers and team leads at the park, and be the bridge between what’s happening on the ground and the AI team’s broader strategy.
requirements:
Your technical foundation

- 5+ years shipping production software – web apps, backend systems, APIs. You understand developer problems because you’ve had them yourself
- Strong in one or more of: C#, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, Python
- Hands-on, daily use of agentic coding tools. You should know your way around Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot or similar
- You understand spec-driven development, agent workflows and how to get reliable results from agentic coding tools
- Comfortable with modern development practices: CI/CD, code review, testing, version control
- You can pick up a new codebase quickly and form a view on its architecture and quality

Your obsession

- You follow agentic coding closely – new tools, new workflows, new ways of working with AI. If we ask you “what changed in this space this week?” you should have plenty to say
- You think about how AI is changing the developer role, not just the tooling, but how teams work, how code gets reviewed how architecture decisions shift
- You’ve built things with agentic tools on your own initiative – side projects, experiments, automations. Not because it was assigned but because you wanted to
- You can talk about what you’ve tried, what worked, what didn’t and what you’d do differently
- Bonus: You do this on your own time too, not just at work

Your people skills

- You’re a clear communicator in English, written and spoken
- You enjoy teaching and coaching and people tend to trust you quickly
- You can adjust how you explain things depending on who you’re talking to
- You’re comfortable presenting to small groups and larger workshops alike
- You have the patience to help a skeptical developer see the value, and the enthusiasm to keep going

How you work

- Based in Hanoi, working from Scandinavian Software Park
- Flexible with time zones when coordinating with Nordic teams
- Comfortable switching between different companies, stacks, and contexts
- You prefer showing results over making plans. Quick wins first
- You’re comfortable with ambiguity. This role is still being shaped, and you’ll help shape it

Nice to have

- Consulting experience or a background working across multiple organizations
- Solutions architecture background
- Experience calling LLM APIs to build product features (not training or fine-tuning models)
- Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)

What Success Looks Like

We don’t define success for you, that gets set together with the CTOs and team leads at each portfolio company, based on where their teams are and where they want to go.

But broadly, after 12 months you should have:

- Helped the majority of developers at the park actively use AI in their daily work
- Built practical resources and guides that teams actually refer to
- Completed several AI replication assessments for Monterro’s deal team
- Become someone developers at the park trust and seek out
- Contributed to at least one legacy modernization project

How to apply: Send your CV in English to us through the Monterro talent portal.

In your application, tell us:

- What’s the most interesting thing you’ve built or explored with AI coding tools recently?
- Describe a time you helped another developer learn something new. What did you do, and what made it work?
benefits:
Why this role is interesting:

- You get to explore AI coding tools as your actual job and help others discover what you’ve found.
- Full access to the best AI tools – Cursor, Anthropic (Claude Pro/API), OpenAI and whatever else comes next. We provide all the subscriptions and API access you need. No personal budget worries, no waiting for approval.
- You’ll work across 13+ different tech stacks and companies, not just one.
- You’ll see inside many different software businesses through the DD work.
- You’re part of building something new. Monterro’s AI practice is in its early stages.
- Scandinavian work culture: trust, autonomy, and a sensible view on work-life balance.
- Modern office at Peakview Tower in central Hanoi.
- Competitive salary for the Hanoi market.

title: Security Engineer - Application Security
label: HOT
reasons:
- Production systems operate at large scale.
- Problems are owned end to end.
- Changes enable systems behind core operations.
jobDescription:
About the Role

As a Security Engineer, you will help identify and address security weaknesses across our applications, systems, and cloud infrastructure.

You'll focus on penetration testing, vulnerability assessments, and developing tools to automate security testing — ensuring our platform remains resilient against evolving threats.

What you’ll do

1. Application Security & SDLC

- Assist in integrating AppSec tools into CI/CD (SAST, SCA, DAST, secret scanning, dependency checks).
- Implement lightweight automation to improve developer security feedback loops (shift-left).
- Support secure code review and help maintain application security guidelines.
- Participate in threat modeling sessions and identify security gaps in new features.

2. Security Automation & Tooling

- Design and develop automated tools/scripts supporting AppSec workflows (e.g., scanning orchestration, auto-reporting, API security checks).
- Build automation to support pentesting tasks: Recon automation Endpoint/parameter discovery Fuzzing helpers Log & traffic analyzers
- Recon automation
- Endpoint/parameter discovery
- Fuzzing helpers
- Log & traffic analyzers
- Familiarity with open-source security tools and prototype enhancements for internal use.

3. Pentesting & Vulnerability Analysis

- Conduct penetration testing on web apps, APIs, and cloud-based systems.
- Assist in vulnerability assessments, reproduce findings, and coordinate remediation.
- Monitor emerging techniques and contribute ideas to improve testing methodologies.
requirements:
Must-Have

- Clear interest and long-term orientation toward Application Security.
- 2+ year of experience in penetration testing, vulnerability analysis, or code-level audits
- Familiarity with OWASP, static/dynamic analysis tools, and common security testing utilities
- Experience identifying security risks throughout the SDLC
- Programming skills in Python, Golang, or Java
- Solid understanding of secure coding practices, access control, and common vulnerabilities
- Prior experience (project, lab, personal tool) in building automated tools for security testing or AppSec workflows.

Nice-to-Have

- Experience writing modules, plugins, or scripts for tools like Burp Suite, ZAP, Semgrep, Nuclei, etc.
- GitHub projects or personal tools showcasing AppSec automation work.
- Knowledge of container security (Docker, Kubernetes).
- Knowledge of cloud environments (GCP/AWS/Azure).
- Exposure to threat modeling frameworks (STRIDE).
benefits:
Inside our lean engineering team:

- We work on large and complex systems, with a focus on ownership and continuous learning.
- We work within existing constraints and improve systems incrementally.
- We value strong fundamentals and the ability to reason through unfamiliar or complex systems.
- Collaboration is direct, and discussions focus on solving problems and delivering results.

Our offers include:

- MacBook provided
- Full salary insurance & health care insurance
- Annual leave & wellness leave
- Annual health check-up

About UsAt Topicus, we believe IT should serve society. From healthcare and education to finance, our solutions empower millions of people daily by turning complex challenges into user-friendly platforms. We don’t just build software; we increase self-reliance and reduce vulnerability for citizens worldwide.With a team of over 1,500+ "Topicans" across Southeast Asia (Vietnam & Thailand) and Europe (the Netherlands, Romania, Portugal, and Iceland), we are constantly expanding our horizons. Our ambition reaches far beyond Europe, driven by a shared mission to make a meaningful difference.

About the Role

You will contribute to our digital consultation platform that allows patients to securely contact their GP online. Through the platform, patients can describe symptoms, share measurements (such as blood pressure or glucose levels), and receive medical advice without always needing a physical visit. It’s fully integrated with regional health systems and GP information systems, helping healthcare providers work more efficiently and focus more on patient care.

Key Responsibilities

- Develop backend services using Kotlin/Java + Spring Boot.
- Implement microservices and event-driven architecture using AWS queuing services.

- Ensure software quality through unit testing & integration testing.

- Collaborate with the front-end team and contribute to features with Angular.
- Build reusable Angular components using Nx monorepo setup.
- Work with Module Federation to build scalable frontend architecture.
requirements:
- 1-5+ years of experience in Kotlin or Java using Spring Boot.
- Hands-on experience with PostgreSQL.
- Understanding of Microservices architecture, Domain-Driven Design (DDD), and event-driven architecture using AWS queuing.
- Experience with unit testing (Jest) and integration testing (Cypress).
- Experience using GitHub Actions for CI/CD.
- Strong problem-solving skills and good English communication in an international working environment.

Nice-to-have

- Experience with Angular, Nx monorepo, Module Federation or other modern front-end frameworks and willing to be Fullstack.
- Experience working with Docker, AWS, Kubernetes.
- Experience with monitoring tools such as Datadog.

title: Product Tester (QA QC, Jira, Trello)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Salary negotiable based on performance bonus ++
- Full insurances according to the Labor Law
- An ambitious and humane startup team
jobDescription:
ROLE OVERVIEW

We are looking for a  Product Tester who is passionate about building reliable, high-quality digital products — not just executing test cases. You will play a key role in ensuring that every feature delivered by the Product team works smoothly, performs consistently, and creates a seamless experience for families using TeenCare AI.

You will work closely with Product Managers, Designers, and Engineers throughout the product lifecycle — from understanding requirements and designing test scenarios to validating new releases before they reach real users.

If you enjoy finding edge cases, thinking critically about user experience, and improving product quality through structured testing and collaboration, this role is for you.

ABOUT TEENCARE AI

At TeenCare AI, we work at the intersection of education, family, and technology. Each week, teens work with dedicated 1:1 mentors. These sessions generate meaningful behavioral insights that help parents better understand and support their children.

We combine human mentorship with technology to create tools that help families make better decisions in everyday life. Our platform is already supporting families across Southeast Asia, and we are building toward a system that can scale globally.

WHAT YOU’LL DO

Ensure product quality across the platform

- Create and maintain detailed test cases, test plans, and testing documentation
- Execute functional, regression, integration, and exploratory testing across web and mobile platforms
- Identify, document, and track bugs clearly with reproducible steps and impact analysis
- Validate product requirements and user flows before release

Collaborate closely with the Product team

- Work alongside Product Managers and Engineers to understand business logic and feature expectations
- Participate in requirement discussions, sprint planning, and product reviews
- Provide feedback on usability, edge cases, and product consistency from a user perspective
- Support UAT processes and release validation

Improve testing processes and quality standards

- Contribute to improving QA workflows, test coverage, and release processes
- Help define testing standards and best practices within the team
- Support automation testing initiatives where applicable
- Monitor product stability and proactively identify potential risks before deployment

Experiment and improve

- Explore new testing approaches, QA tools, and automation opportunities
- Continuously improve testing efficiency and reporting quality
- Stay updated on product quality trends and testing methodologies

TESTING STACK & ENGINEERING EXPECTATIONS

Testing & QA

- Manual Testing
- Functional Testing
- Regression Testing
- Integration Testing
- Exploratory Testing
- User Acceptance Testing (UAT)

Tools & Collaboration

- Jira / Trello / ClickUp
- Postman
- Chrome DevTools
- TestRail or similar QA management tools

Technical Knowledge

- Basic understanding of APIs and client-server architecture
- Familiarity with databases and data validation
- Understanding of SDLC and Agile/Scrum workflows
- Basic automation testing knowledge is a plus

Collaborative Stack

- Node.js
- PostgreSQL
- MongoDB
- Redis
requirements:
Technical

title: Product Manager (AgriTech)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Sự nghiệp thăng tiến rõ ràng & thu nhập cạnh tranh
- Môi trường đổi mới sáng tạo & chuyên nghiệp
- Gia nhập tập đoàn với tầm nhìn toàn cầu.
jobDescription:
DigiFarm là đơn vị kinh doanh chiến lược mũi nhọn về công nghệ nông nghiệp trực thuộc ExcelTech. Chúng tôi tự hào kiến tạo các nền tảng quản lý nông trại thông minh, nhằm thúc đẩy chuyển đổi số toàn diện cho chuỗi giá trị, phục vụ đa dạng đối tượng: từ các tập đoàn chăn nuôi quy mô lớn, các trang trại tầm trung, cho đến những hộ chăn nuôi cá thể.

DigiFarm đang bước vào giai đoạn tăng tốc mở rộng quy mô mạnh mẽ, với mục tiêu nhân đôi đội ngũ trong 18 tháng tới. Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm một Trưởng phòng Sản phẩm mang tư duy chiến lược, người sở hữu năng lực "kép": vừa có tầm nhìn bao quát để định hình lối đi cho sản phẩm, vừa sẵn sàng xắn tay áo sát cánh cùng đội ngũ để trực tiếp thực thi và giải quyết vấn đề tại từng điểm chạm.

Hơn cả một vị trí quản lý sản phẩm thông thường, đây là vai trò được quy hoạch với lộ trình rõ ràng để tiến tới vị trí Giám đốc Điều hành Đơn vị (BU Manager) tại DigiFarm. Bạn sẽ vận dụng các phương pháp quản trị mục tiêu chuyên sâu (như OKRs) để dẫn dắt đội ngũ, trực tiếp đàm phán với đối tác và tự tay kiến tạo bản sắc văn hóa làm việc cho tổ chức.

Đây là bệ phóng hiếm có để bạn dẫn dắt bước nhảy vọt của một nền tảng công nghệ đã được kiểm chứng – mang trọn vẹn tinh thần khởi nghiệp với sự linh hoạt tối đa, đồng thời được hậu thuẫn vững chắc bởi nguồn lực dồi dào từ một tập đoàn hàng đầu.
requirements:
Chiến lược & Lộ trình Sản phẩm

- Làm chủ chiến lược sản phẩm: Chịu trách nhiệm toàn diện về vòng đời sản phẩm của DigiFarm. Xác định rõ định vị, tuyên ngôn giá trị và thiết lập lợi thế cạnh tranh sắc bén cho cả 3 phân khúc: doanh nghiệp lớn, trang trại tầm trung và hộ chăn nuôi.
- Quản trị lộ trình: Xây dựng và duy trì lộ trình phát triển sản phẩm trong 12-18 tháng. Ra quyết định ưu tiên một cách hệ thống dựa trên sự cân bằng giữa giá trị kinh doanh, tính khả thi công nghệ và nhu cầu thực tế của thị trường.
- Kiến tạo tầm nhìn: Đóng vai trò "nhạc trưởng", dẫn dắt chiến lược Agri-Data Hub giai đoạn 2027-2030, đặt nền móng vững chắc để DigiFarm trở thành nền tảng dữ liệu nông nghiệp số 1 tại Việt Nam.
- Khám phá thực địa: Liên tục rời khỏi văn phòng để trực tiếp xuống trang trại, gặp gỡ người nông dân. Thấu hiểu sâu sắc dòng chảy công việc và những "nỗi đau" thực tế nhất thay vì chỉ dựa vào các buổi họp giả định.
- Đo lường hiệu quả: Định nghĩa các thước đo thành công cốt lõi cho từng tính năng hoặc sáng kiến. Theo dõi sát sao tỷ lệ chấp nhận sản phẩm, tỷ lệ giữ chân và hiệu quả kinh doanh.

Quản trị Hiệu quả Kinh doanh

- Đồng làm chủ bài toán tài chính: Sát cánh cùng Giám đốc Tài chính (CFO) để kiểm soát bức tranh lãi/lỗ của BU DigiFarm. Theo dõi chặt chẽ doanh thu, biên lợi nhuận gộp (Gross Margin), chi phí thu hút khách hàng (CAC) và giá trị vòng đời khách hàng (LTV).
- Thiết kế chiến lược giá: Xây dựng mô hình giá nhạy bén, linh hoạt cho 3 phân khúc: Enterprise (Dịch vụ cao cấp, bán theo giá trị), Mid-Market (Các gói tiêu chuẩn hóa) và SME (Tự phục vụ, trả phí định kỳ - Subscription).
- Thúc đẩy Thương mại: Phối hợp chặt chẽ với Trưởng bộ phận Kinh doanh để liên tục tối ưu mức độ phù hợp của sản phẩm với thị trường (Product-Market Fit). Trực tiếp tham gia tư vấn tiền bán hàng (pre-sales) để chốt các hợp đồng Enterprise trọng điểm.
- Đánh giá & Quyết sách: Đánh giá hiệu quả kinh doanh hàng tuần cùng Giám đốc Vận hành (COO); tổ chức các buổi phân tích chuyên sâu hàng tháng để kịp thời đưa ra quyết định điều chỉnh chiến lược.

Dẫn dắt Đội ngũ & Kiến tạo Văn hóa

- Phát triển Đội ngũ: Trực tiếp dẫn dắt, truyền cảm hứng và đào tạo năng lực cho Bộ phận Sản phẩm & Giải pháp.
- Lãnh đạo Liên phòng ban: Cùng các Trưởng bộ phận khác (Kinh doanh, DVKH, Kỹ thuật) tạo thành ban lãnh đạo thống nhất. Điều hướng mục tiêu chung, giải quyết xung đột và ra quyết định nâng cấp khi cần thiết.
- Tiên phong ứng dụng AI: Huấn luyện đội ngũ về tư duy làm việc tích hợp công nghệ. Đảm bảo toàn bộ nhân sự thành thạo việc sử dụng các công cụ AI để tối ưu hóa hiệu suất làm việc hằng ngày.
- Định hình Bản sắc: Nuôi dưỡng và lan tỏa văn hóa cốt lõi của DigiFarm: "Thấu cảm sâu sắc với người nông dân (Empathy) + Chú trọng sự xuất sắc về kỹ thuật (Engineering Excellence) + Ứng dụng AI một cách thực dụng (Pragmatic AI).
benefits:
1. Thu nhập cạnh tranh & đãi ngộ xứng đáng

- Lương thưởng minh bạch, xét thăng tiến công bằng với cơ hội tăng lương 1-2 lần/năm.
- Thưởng tháng 13 hấp dẫn, chia sẻ thành quả từ sự phát triển của công ty.
- Thường hiệu quả công việc cộng thêm tháng 14, 15, 16…

2. Chăm sóc sức khỏe toàn diện

- Khám sức khỏe tổng quát định kỳ hàng năm để luôn an tâm và khỏe mạnh.
- Cung cấp gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe toàn diện cho bạn và người thân.

3. Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp & năng động

- Cộng sự tài năng: Làm việc cùng đội ngũ kỹ sư, chuyên gia trẻ, sáng tạo và đầy đam mê.
- Dự án đột phá: Trực tiếp tham gia các dự án công nghệ tiên phong, định hình xu hướng thị trường.

4. Lộ trình phát triển cá nhân

- Tham gia các khóa đào tạo định kỳ do Công ty và Tập đoàn tổ chức.
- Cơ hội thăng tiến rõ ràng, được thiết kế riêng cho từng cá nhân.

5. Cân bằng cuộc sống & gắn kết

- Teambuilding, du lịch hàng năm và các sự kiện văn hóa, thể thao sôi động.
- Tham gia các hoạt động trong các nhóm văn nghệ và thể thao để thỏa sức đam mê và kết nối.
- Hỗ trợ tối đa với đầy đủ các loại phụ cấp (ăn trưa, xăng xe, đi lại...).

title: Senior Java Software Engineer (AWS, Acting Lead)
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Java Technical Leader to lead and grow a team of Software Engineers delivering scalable, secure, and high-quality backend systems.

In this role, you will combine strong Java architecture expertise, technical leadership, and modern engineering practices, including effective use of AI-assisted tools to improve productivity, quality, and decision-making.

You will work closely with international stakeholders, take end-to-end ownership of technical outcomes, and foster a culture of engineering excellence, continuous learning, and smart adoption of new technologies.

Key Responsibilities:

Technical & Team Leadership

- Lead, mentor, and coach a team of Software Engineers, supporting their technical growth and career development.
- Act as a hands-on technical leader, setting coding standards, architectural principles, and best practices.
- Foster a collaborative, inclusive, and learning-oriented team culture with strong ownership and accountability.
- Guide engineers on effective and responsible use of AI tools to enhance daily engineering work (e.g., design, coding, debugging, testing, documentation).
- Proactively identify, troubleshoot, and resolve complex performance or scalability issues.
- Work closely with DevOps/SRE teams to improve CI/CD pipelines, deployment reliability, and runtime stability.
- Drive improvements in system observability, monitoring, and alerting.
- Ensure high standards of code quality through design reviews, code reviews, automated testing, and documentation.
- Design, develop, and review robust Java-based systems using Spring ecosystem and microservices architecture.

Global Collaboration

- Work effectively with cross-functional and international teams (e.g., UK, US).
- Communicate complex technical topics clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

AI-Augmented Engineering (Big Plus)

- Leverage AI-assisted developer tools (e.g., for code generation, refactoring, test creation, log analysis, incident triage, and documentation) to:
- Improve development speed without compromising quality
- Reduce repetitive manual work
- Support faster debugging and root-cause analysis
- Promote best practices for AI usage, including validation of outputs, security awareness, and IP safety.
- Explore and propose practical AI use cases in backend engineering, and system observability.
requirements:
Core Java & Backend Expertise

- Strong expertise in Java, including OOP, multithreading, concurrency, collections, and performance tuning.
- Hands-on experience with Spring / Spring Boot, Spring Data, Dependency Injection (DI), and transaction management.
- Solid experience designing and building RESTful APIs and distributed microservices architectures.
- Experience with SQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL) and NoSQL solutions (e.g., MongoDB, DynamoDB).
- Strong understanding of data modeling, query optimization, and backend performance tuning.
- Hands-on experience with AWS (e.g., EKS, S3, RDS, Lambda).
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines and modern DevOps practices.
- Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools such as DataDog for metrics, logs, and traces.

Ways of Working

- Proficient with GitLab for version control and collaboration.
- Experience working in Agile / Scrum environments.
- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to make sound technical decisions under constraints.
- Strong spoken and written English for international collaboration.

Bonus / Differentiators

- Proven experience using AI tools in daily engineering work (coding, debugging, testing, design, or operations).
- Ability to mentor others on productive and responsible AI usage.
- Familiarity with Kubernetes (K8s): containerization, deployment, scaling, and service-to-service communication.

title: AI Engineer (Machine Learning, Python)
company: Mcredit - Công ty Tài chính TNHH MB Shinsei
label: HOT

jobDescription:
Với vai trò là Kỹ sư AI, bạn sẽ tham gia trực tiếp vào vòng đời phát triển các sản phẩm trí tuệ nhân tạo cốt lõi của công ty, từ khâu nghiên cứu, thử nghiệm đến triển khai thực tế. Các nhiệm vụ chính bao gồm:

- Phát triển & tinh chỉnh các mô hình Thị giác máy tính (Computer Vision): Thiết kế và tối ưu các mô hình nhận diện thực thể, phân loại hình ảnh, phân đoạn (segmentation) và theo dõi đối tượng.
- Xử lý Ngôn ngữ & Âm thanh (NLP & Audio Processing): Xây dựng các hệ thống xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên, phân tích cảm xúc, trích xuất thực thể (NER). Phát triển các giải pháp xử lý âm thanh như chuyển đổi giọng nói thành văn bản (STT) hoặc ngược lại (TTS).
- Ứng dụng Generative AI: Nghiên cứu và triển khai các ứng dụng dựa trên mô hình ngôn ngữ lớn (LLM), xây dựng các hệ thống RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) và tích hợp các tính năng GenAI vào sản phẩm hiện có.
- Tối ưu hóa & Triển khai: Phối hợp cùng đội ngũ Data Engineer và DevOps để đóng gói mô hình (Docker), tối ưu hóa hiệu năng (Latency/Throughput) và triển khai lên môi trường Production.
- Bảo trì & Cập nhật: Theo dõi hiệu suất mô hình thực tế, thực hiện tinh chỉnh (Fine-tuning) và cập nhật công nghệ mới để nâng cao chất lượng sản phẩm.
requirements:
Kỹ năng kỹ thuật:

- Ngôn ngữ lập trình: Sử dụng thành thạo Python.
- AI Frameworks: Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với ít nhất một trong các framework phổ biến: PyTorch, TensorFlow hoặc Keras.
- Deep Learning: Hiểu rõ các kiến trúc mạng nơ-ron phổ biến như CNN, RNN, Transformers, ResNet, YOLO, BERT...
- Generative AI & LLM: * Có kiến thức về Prompt Engineering và sử dụng API các mô hình ngôn ngữ lớn (OpenAI, Claude,...).• Sử dụng thành thạo các framework hỗ trợ GenAI như LangChain hoặc LlamaIndex.• Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với Vector Database (như Pinecone, Milvus, Weaviate hoặc ChromaDB).
- Kỹ năng xử lý dữ liệu: Có kinh nghiệm tiền xử lý dữ liệu thô (hình ảnh, văn bản, âm thanh), hiểu về các quy trình Augmentation và gán nhãn dữ liệu.

Kinh nghiệm & Học vấn:

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành Khoa học máy tính, Công nghệ thông tin, Toán tin hoặc các ngành liên quan.
- Có từ 1 - 3 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc thực tế trong các dự án AI/Machine Learning.
- Đọc hiểu tốt các tài liệu kỹ thuật và các bài báo khoa học (paper) bằng tiếng Anh.

Kỹ năng mềm:

- Tư duy giải quyết vấn đề (Problem-solving) và tư duy logic tốt.
- Khả năng tự nghiên cứu (Self-research) và cập nhật nhanh các xu hướng công nghệ mới.
- Kỹ năng làm việc nhóm và giao tiếp hiệu quả.
benefits:
Phúc lợi, đãi ngộ:

- Thời gian làm việc: Thứ 2 – Thứ 6, nghỉ thứ 7 và Chủ nhật
- Nghỉ phép: 12 ngày phép năm. Mỗi 5 năm được tăng thêm 1 ngày theo quy định của luật Lao Động

- Nghỉ ốm: hưởng nguyên lương đóng BHXH (75% do BHXH chi trả, 25% do Công ty chi trả)
- Ngày sinh nhật: Nghỉ hưởng nguyên lương 01 ngày (chế độ tương đương ngày nghỉ phép)
- Bảo hiểm: Bên cạnh Bảo hiểm bắt buộc theo quy định, Mcredit hỗ trợ Bảo hiểm sức khỏe MIC theo quy định hàng năm của công ty.
- Chế độ dành riêng cho các mẹ đang nuôi con nhỏ: Happy mom’s room, Happy mom’s hour (được nghỉ tối đa 2h/tháng để đưa đón con đi học từ cấp 1 trở xuống). Các chế độ khác (khám sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm, nghỉ mát, thăm hỏi ốm đau…) theo quy định của MC từng thời kỳ.
- Hoạt động team building, du lịch, thể thao, Happy Hour hàng tháng…v..v…

title: Senior Business Analyst (BA)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Sự nghiệp thăng tiến rõ ràng & thu nhập cạnh tranh
- Môi trường đổi mới sáng tạo & chuyên nghiệp
- Gia nhập tập đoàn với tầm nhìn toàn cầu.
jobDescription:
Tại ExcelTech, Senior BA không chỉ là cầu nối mà còn là đối tác chiến lược của khách hàng. Bạn sẽ làm việc trực tiếp với ban lãnh đạo doanh nghiệp (trong các lĩnh vực nông nghiệp, y tế, sản xuất, bán lẻ…) để thấu hiểu tận gốc bài toán nghiệp vụ, từ đó kiến tạo các giải pháp công nghệ mang lại giá trị thực tiễn và có thể đo lường được.

Chúng tôi tập trung vào các dự án trọng điểm với cam kết chất lượng tuyệt đối. Do đó, năng lực phân tích và tư duy giải pháp của bạn ở giai đoạn đầu rất quan trọng đối với sự thành bại của dự án. Một Senior BA xuất sắc sẽ là nhân tố then chốt giúp ExcelTech giữ vững và mở rộng vị thế tiên phong trong lĩnh vực giải pháp công nghệ cho doanh nghiệp trong khu vực.
requirements:
1. Khám phá & Thẩm định Tiềm năng Ứng dụng

- Chủ trì Discovery Workshop: Trực tiếp dẫn dắt các phiên làm việc chiến lược với C-suite (CDO, CTO, CIO) của khách hàng. Chủ động nhận diện và khai phá các quy trình có thể được tối ưu hóa bằng công nghệ, vượt ra khỏi việc "ghi chép yêu cầu" thuần túy để thực sự tư vấn giải pháp.
- Thẩm định toàn diện: Phân tích và đánh giá từng Use case dựa trên 4 trụ cột: Giá trị kinh doanh tiềm năng, Mức độ sẵn sàng của dữ liệu (Data readiness), Tính khả thi công nghệ và Độ phức tạp khi thay đổi hệ thống (Change management).
- Lượng hóa giá trị kinh doanh: Đưa ra các con số thuyết phục về thời gian tiết kiệm, chi phí cắt giảm, doanh thu tăng trưởng và rủi ro giảm thiểu – kèm theo các chỉ số dữ liệu cụ thể để thuyết phục khách hàng.
- Xây dựng bài toán đầu tư: Lập bảng tính ROI (ROI Calculator) và Business Case cho từng Use case; tự tin bảo vệ đề xuất trước ban lãnh đạo cấp cao của khách hàng, đối tác.
- Hoạch định Lộ trình: Đề xuất chiến lược triển khai hiệu quả, cân bằng giữa những thắng lợi ngắn hạn (Quick wins: 3-6 tháng) và các mục tiêu chiến lược dài hạn (Strategic bets: 12-18 tháng).

2. Phân tích Yêu cầu & Thiết kế Giải pháp

- Tài liệu chuẩn Enterprise: Xây dựng tài liệu Yêu cầu Kinh doanh (BRD) chất lượng cao, không chỉ dừng ở đặc tả chức năng (Functional specs) mà phải bao hàm bối cảnh nghiệp vụ, các tiêu chí thành công (Success metrics) và đánh giá rủi ro.
- Chuẩn hóa yêu cầu: Viết user stories với acceptance criteria theo tiêu chuẩn SMART và phân loại mức độ ưu tiên theo nguyên tắc INVEST. Quản lý và duy trì chặt chẽ Ma trận Truy xuất Yêu cầu (RTM).
- Tối ưu giải pháp: Phối hợp sát sao với Solution Architect để đảm bảo giải pháp giải quyết đúng "nỗi đau" của doanh nghiệp.
- Trực quan hóa: Trực tiếp thiết kế Prototype/Mockup (qua Figma, v0…) giúp khách hàng hình dung rõ nét về giải pháp trước khi code, giảm thiểu rủi ro ngay từ giai đoạn sớm (De-risk early).
- Kiểm soát lợi nhuận là chốt chặn cuối cùng, chịu trách nhiệm chốt nghiệm thu phạm vi yêu cầu với khách hàng trước khi chuyển giao cho Development, đồng thời bảo vệ biên lợi nhuận của dự án.

3. Am hiểu Nghiệp vụ & Tư vấn Chuyên ngành

- Chuyên gia theo ngành: Sở hữu chuyên môn sâu sắc trong 1-2 lĩnh vực trọng điểm: Nông nghiệp, Y tế, Sản xuất, Bán lẻ/E-commerce.
- Cập nhật kiến thức vĩ mô: Liên tục nắm bắt các khung pháp lý (Basel III, HIPAA, GDPR…), xu hướng thị trường, đối thủ cạnh tranh và best practices để đưa ra những lời khuyên sắc bén nhất.
- Dẫn dắt Tư tưởng: Đóng góp xây dựng và xuất bản các case study, bài viết chuyên sâu trong lĩnh vực chuyên môn. Đại diện ExcelTech tham gia các sự kiện ngành, hội thảo chuyên gia.
- Đào tạo nội bộ: Dẫn dắt và chuyển giao kiến thức nghiệp vụ cho đội ngũ nội bộ, hướng tới việc xây dựng các Business Unit của ExcelTech trở thành những "Vertical Experts" thay vì chỉ là Generalists.

4. Làm chủ Công nghệ & Trí tuệ Nhân tạo

- Chuyên gia Kỹ nghệ: Không chỉ dừng lại ở việc sử dụng AI cơ bản, ứng viên cần có khả năng thiết kế các prompt phức tạp trên các mô hình ngôn ngữ lớn (LLMs) hàng đầu như Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT. Ứng dụng LLM để xử lý dữ liệu phi cấu trúc, bóc tách insight từ tài liệu ngành, và tăng tốc độ viết các tài liệu phức tạp (BRD, User Stories).
- Trực quan hóa với Generative AI: Tiên phong trong việc ứng dụng các công cụ thiết kế tích hợp AI (như Figma AI, v0.dev) để tạo wireframe, mockup và biến ý tưởng thành giao diện trực quan với tốc độ thần tốc, giúp khách hàng "chạm" vào giải pháp ngay từ khâu ý tưởng.
- Tự động hóa & Khung tác tử AI: Có tư duy hệ thống và hiểu biết về cách ứng dụng các framework AI Agents hoặc các công cụ tự động hóa luồng công việc. Nhạy bén trong việc đề xuất tích hợp AI để giải phóng sức lao động cho cả quy trình nội bộ lẫn hệ thống của khách hàng.
- Quản trị Tri thức & Hiệu suất: Thành thạo việc xây dựng không gian làm việc, kết nối hệ thống tài liệu và quản lý dự án bằng các nền tảng số hiện đại có trợ lực AI (như ClickUp, Obsidian, Notion AI), đảm bảo thông tin dự án luôn minh bạch và dễ dàng truy xuất xuyên suốt vòng đời phát triển.
- Cập nhật hệ sinh thái công nghệ: Có đam mê thử nghiệm các công cụ AI mới. Hiểu được ranh giới giữa những gì AI "có thể làm tốt ngay lúc này" và "những rủi ro tiềm ẩn" để tư vấn giải pháp an toàn, khả thi nhất cho doanh nghiệp.
benefits:
1. Thu nhập cạnh tranh & đãi ngộ xứng đáng

- Lương thưởng minh bạch, xét thăng tiến công bằng với cơ hội tăng lương 1-2 lần/năm.
- Thưởng tháng 13 hấp dẫn, chia sẻ thành quả từ sự phát triển của công ty.
- Thường hiệu quả công việc cộng thêm tháng 14, 15, 16…

2. Chăm sóc sức khỏe toàn diện

- Khám sức khỏe tổng quát định kỳ hàng năm để luôn an tâm và khỏe mạnh.
- Cung cấp Gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe toàn diện cho bạn và người thân.

3. Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp & năng động

- Cộng sự tài năng: Làm việc cùng đội ngũ kỹ sư, chuyên gia trẻ, sáng tạo và đầy đam mê.
- Dự án đột phá: Trực tiếp tham gia vào những dự án công nghệ tiên phong, định hình xu hướng thị trường.

4. Lộ trình phát triển cá nhân

5. Cân bằng cuộc sống & gắn kết

jobDescription:

company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN NGHIÊN CỨU PHÁT TRIỂN VÀ ỨNG DỤNG NGƯỜI MÁY ĐA NĂNG VINMOTION
label: SUPER HOT

jobDescription:
Responsibilities

- Hybrid Infrastructure Management: Orchestrate and maintain infrastructure across AWS, local servers, and distributed Edge hardware.
- Security Integration (Sec): Implement automated security scanning (SAST/DAST), vulnerability management, and compliance checks within all pipelines.
- Unified CI/CD Pipelines: Design and optimize CI/CD workflows using Bitbucket Runners and other automation tools to deploy consistently to cloud environments, on-prem servers, and remote edge devices.
- Edge Operations: Manage the lifecycle of Edge devices (NUC, Jetson), including remote provisioning, firmware updates, and containerized workload deployment (e.g., K3s, Docker).
- Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Use Terraform, Ansible, or CloudFormation to manage diverse environments, ensuring parity between dev, staging, and production.
- Monitoring & Observability: Implement comprehensive logging and monitoring solutions to track system health and security incidents across all three tiers. Candidate with experience with centralized logging system on cloud and on-premise but not Edge devices are welcomed to apply.
requirements:
Background Requirements:

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, Information Security, or related technical field.
- 3+ years in relevant position

Technical Requirements:

- Cloud Expertise: Proven experience with AWS services (EC2, EKS, IAM, VPC, S3).
- On-Premise & Linux Systems: Deep knowledge of Linux administration, networking, and managing physical server environments.
- Edge Computing: Hands-on experience deploying and managing workloads on NUC, NVIDIA Jetson, or Raspberry Pi. Bonus point if the workloads are related to IoT, Robotics.
- CI/CD Tooling: Advanced proficiency with Bitbucket Pipelines/Runners, GitLab CI, or Jenkins in a hybrid setup.
- Containerization & Orchestration: Expert-level skills in Docker and Kubernetes (standard K8s for cloud/on-prem and K3s/MicroK8s for Edge).
- Security Tools: Experience with Snyk, SonarQube, Aqua Security, or similar tools for container and code security.
- Scripting & Automation: Strong coding skills in Python, Bash, or Go.
benefits:

- Cutting-Edge Humanoid Robot Products

title: Senior Automation Test Engineer (Playwright, Java, AI)
label: HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
Who Are We

Hansen Technologies is a leading global provider of software and services that enable organisations to transform customer experiences and streamline critical business processes. With a rich history of innovation and a footprint that spans over 80 countries, Hansen empowers utilities, energy, and communications companies to thrive in an ever-evolving digital landscape. Our commitment to excellence, customer focus, and collaborative culture makes Hansen a place where passionate professionals can make a meaningful impact, drive real change, and help shape the future of industries worldwide.

We are proud to be an equal opportunities employer. Hansen prides itself on celebrating diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees, even extending this to how we work with our customers, partners, and suppliers. We welcome applications from all qualified candidates, regardless of age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, race, ethnicity, religion or belief, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic. If you require any adjustments or accommodation during the recruitment process, please let us know.

Why This Role Matters

Lead automation, deliver quality and make impact.

As a Senior Automation Test Engineer, you will play a key role in shaping how quality is engineered across our enterprise platforms. This is not just about writing tests—you’ll own automation frameworks, mentor engineers, and embed modern quality practices throughout the delivery lifecycle. Your work will directly impact the reliability and performance of mission‑critical systems used by utility providers worldwide.

*Note: This is a 5-day office-based role in An Khanh (Thao Dien), HCMC

What You’ll Do

- Own and evolve automation frameworks across UI, API, and integration layers
- Design and maintain scalable, reliable automated test suites
- Embed automation into CI/CD pipelines and drive shift‑left testing
- Provide technical leadership, mentoring, and code reviews for automation engineers
- Collaborate closely with Developers, DevOps, and Test Leads in Agile teams
- Drive continuous improvement, including AI‑assisted testing approaches
requirements:
What You Bring

- Strong experience in test automation using Java
- Hands‑on expertise with tools such as Selenium, Playwright, Cucumber, Rest Assured
- Solid understanding of API, integration, and database testing (SQL)
- Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments with CI/CD pipelines
- Proven ability to mentor engineers and lift team capability
- Excellent communication skills and a quality‑first mindset
- Proficient in English both written and spoken

Nice to have:

- Exposure to AI‑assisted testing, cloud platforms (AWS), or DevOps practices
- Experience with performance or non‑functional testing
benefits:
- Competitive Market Rate Salary - full salary (including SI contribution) during the probation period and 13th-month salary
- Twice yearly salary review
- Full participation in the annual Hansen Profit Share Program
- Great Leave Options – including 12 days annual leave during Year 1, increasing to 15 days annual leave and 12 days paid sick leave per year).
- Premium healthcare for employee and dependents (spouse and {all} children and support for parents). Also, free comprehensive annual check-up for employees.
- High-speed Internet credit: VND 5,5million/year
- Wellness benefit: VND 2million annually for fitness package/devices
- Free lunch, snacks, and drink in our new modern offices, which have a cool open atmosphere with an outdoor cafe, bar, and recreation area in District 2 – including free scooter parking
- Continuous Learning and Development, including personalised Udemy Business – online learning platform.
- Reward and Recognition - Company sponsored trips and events, tenure milestones and global recognition program.
- New, modern developer laptop, 2 large monitors, and headset.
- An international work environment, highly skilled colleagues to learn from both locally and globally where you can develop your IT career and English skills.

jobDescription:
TƯ VẤN GIẢI PHÁP

- Phối hợp với Sales thực hiện khám phá yêu cầu và tư vấn giải pháp cho khách hàng. Phân tích yêu cầu kinh doanh, đề xuất mô hình, giải pháp CRM phù hợp.
- Xây dựng proposal, demo hệ thống và trình bày đánh giá hiệu quả giải pháp.

THAM GIA DỰ ÁN

- Khảo sát, phân tích yêu cầu: Chủ trì khảo sát, phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ và tư vấn đề xuất các quy trình, giải pháp chức năng tối ưu. Thực hiện xây dựng tài liệu đặc tả yêu cầu kinh doanh (BRD).
- Thiết kế hệ thống: Thực hiện xây dựng các tài liệu đặc tả kỹ thuật và giải pháp (SDD, FSD).
- Tùy chỉnh, xây dựng hệ thống
- Tích hợp hệ thống: Thực hiện thiết kế luồng tích hợp hệ thống với ERP, POS, E-commerce…; đảm bảo tính toàn vẹn dữ liệu, chủ trì kiểm thử SIT và xây dựng các tài liệu đặc tả tích hợp (Integration Specification).
- UAT, triển khai và hỗ trợ: Chủ trì kiểm thử UAT, tham gia triển khai hệ thống Production, đào tạo người dùng cuối, thực hiện hỗ trợ vận hành hệ thống sau go-live (hypercare).
- Quản lý dự án, khách hàng: Phối hợp PM theo dõi tiến độ và phạm vi dự án; Quản lý kỳ vọng khách hàng, rủi ro dự án và duy trì quan hệ tin cậy; Thực hiện báo cáo tiến độ định kỳ, điều chỉnh phạm vi; Phối hợp hỗ trợ các hoạt động bán thêm (upsell) và bán chéo (cross-sell).

NGHIÊN CỨU, PHÁT TRIỂN

- Nghiên cứu, cập nhật các dòng sản phẩm và giải pháp công nghệ mới của hệ sinh thái Salesforce.
- Chủ động khám phá, đánh giá các tính năng và module mới nhằm tối ưu hóa hiệu quả triển khai dự án.
- Đề xuất các giải pháp cải tiến quy trình nghiệp vụ và kỹ thuật dựa trên xu hướng công nghệ thực tế.
- Xây dựng tài liệu hướng dẫn và thực hiện chia sẻ kiến thức chuyên môn cho đội ngũ nội bộ.
requirements:
- Có từ 2.5-5 năm kinh nghiệm thực chiến tại vị trí BA hoặc Tư vấn triển khai CRM (ưu tiên Salesforce); tham gia xuyên suốt các giai đoạn của vòng đời dự án (khảo sát yêu cầu, thiết kế giải pháp, cấu hình hệ thống, kiểm thử và bàn giao go-live).
- Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm triển khai tối thiểu 2 dòng sản phẩm Salesforce (Sales, Service, Experience, Marketing/Account Engagement). Có các chứng chỉ Salesforce Admin, Salesforce Consultant.
- Am hiểu phân tích hệ thống và nghiệp vụ, có năng lực chuyển hóa các bài toán kinh doanh thành giải pháp Salesforce tối ưu. Có kinh nghiệm viết tài liệu nghiệp vụ, tài liệu giải pháp (BRD/FSD/SDD), thiết kế quy trình, mô hình hóa BPMN/UML, Test case, tài liệu đào tạo, hướng dẫn sử dụng.
- Thành thạo kỹ năng cấu hình nâng cao: Custom Object/Field, Flow, Validation Rule, Approval Process, Permission Set, Profile, Page Layout, Record Type và Lightning App Builder.
- Có kinh nghiệm quản trị và xử lý dữ liệu (Sử dụng Data Loader/Wizard), quản lý chất lượng và thiết kế mô hình dữ liệu quan hệ.
- Có khả năng sử dụng SQL cơ bản, HTML/CSS hoặc scripting là một lợi thế lớn.
- Hiểu biết về kiến trúc tích hợp hệ thống (REST/SOAP API, Middleware, ERP, POS, E-commerce, Data Warehouse).
- Am hiểu các hệ thống CRM, Marketing Automation, Loyalty và quy trình vận hành B2B/B2C. Áp dụng các tiêu chuẩn Salesforce Best Practices (quản trị thay đổi, Sandbox, Release Management, CI/CD).
benefits:
- Thu nhập thương lượng và cạnh tranh căn cứ theo năng lực.
- Các khoản hỗ trợ: ăn trưa, máy tính, điện thoại, gửi xe,...
- Thưởng: Thưởng Lễ, Tết, Thưởng kinh doanh, Thưởng lợi nhuận, Thưởng dự án, Thưởng KPI, Commission,...tùy theo mỗi vị trí.
- Chế độ nâng lương: đánh giá, điều chỉnh 1 lần/ năm.
- Được tham gia BHXH, BHYT, BHTN đầy đủ theo quy định của pháp luật.
- Phúc lợi khác: Bảo hiểm sức khỏe GMS-care; Khám sức khỏe định kỳ; Du lịch; Teambuilding, ...
- Thời gian làm việc: Thứ 2 đến thứ 6 hàng tuần. Nghỉ phép: tối thiểu 12 ngày phép/năm, chính sách nghỉ phép tăng thêm theo level.
- Phát triển nghề nghiệp: Cơ hội tham gia các khóa đào tạo chuyên môn được cấp chứng chỉ CNTT Quốc tế miễn phí; tiếp cận những công nghệ mới nhất; Cơ hội tham gia các dự án với các đối tác lớn và cộng tác với những chuyên gia hàng đầu; Cơ hội khẳng định năng lực bản thân và thăng tiến trong sự nghiệp.
- Được làm việc trong môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, năng động, sáng tạo, cởi mở và tôn trọng.

title: Senior Full-stack Python Developer

jobDescription: We are looking for a Senior full-stack web developer with NodeJS/ Python and ReactJS with a strong background in API design, databases, performance, scalability, security, etc to join our team. You will be working across a range of projects and industries, building scalable and high-performance web solutions.
requirements:
Must have

- 6+ years of experience in backend development using Python/ NodeJS
- 3+ years of experience in frontend development using ReactJS or similar frameworks (Vue, Svelte, Angular)
- Proven expertise in designing and implementing RESTful APIs, scalable web architecture, and deploying to cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
- Experience integrating AI/ML solutions into web applications
- Strong working knowledge of relational databases (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server)
- Familiarity with Extreme Programming (XP) practices such as Test-Driven Development (TDD), Continuous Integration (CI), and code refactoring
- Experience working within Agile/Scrum teams
- Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal
- Experience leading project teams through the full life cycle of software development
- Experience supporting other team tasks such as mentoring, creating proposals, designing architecture for a project, etc.

Nice to have

- Experience with serverless architecture, e.g., AWS Lambda, GCP Cloud Function, etc.
- Experience with security, performance, and scalability.
- Experience with NoSQL and Message Queue.
benefits:
Who We Are

CodeLink is an innovative and design-focused development agency. We focus on user-centric design and agile development to bring the product vision of our clients to life. We handle the end-to-end development of products, developing the product vision through product understanding, designing experiences through UX design, refining these flows with modern UI design, and developing products through iterative agile development.

We work with both early-stage product teams and teams with existing products from a wide range of countries and industries. We focus on modern technologies and work directly with our clients. We design using design-thinking principles on tools such as Sketch, Figma, Zeplin, and more, and develop products leveraging our tech stack of React, React Native, Rails, Python, and Node.JS.

Our Core Values

1. Take full ownership of deliveryWe take ownership of our client projects and ensure that we deliver what we are in charge of to the best possible outcome.

2. Deliver our highest level of qualityWe take pride in the high quality that we deliver and work at a sustainable pace to ensure we can always deliver on that quality.

3. Stay consistent in plans and processesWe keep open and transparent communication with our teammates and our client whilst following agile development practices.

4. Have empathy for all those we work withWe show empathy and respect to all those we work with to gain a deeper understanding without any judgment or assumption.

5. Continuously improve and growWe aim high with a growth mindset and see every day as an opportunity to develop ourselves, our processes, and our products.

Top 3 Reasons To Join Us

- Use cutting-edge & proven technologies
- Work directly with international clients
- Open environment with a focus on learning

Why You’ll Love Working With Us

We work hand-in-hand with our clients to fully invest in their product development and build solutions together for their target market.

- We fully invest in our team, we will help you build yourself up in any area you feel you need development, be it in English, learning a new design tool, developing your design thinking, and more. We want to make sure that you’re always learning and developing yourself whilst a part of our team.
- We respect both Product and Technology equally, ensuring all of the Products we work on have features with true market potential and ensuring all of the team contribute to, understand, and believe in what they are developing.
- We are very selective with our clients, we only work on awesome products we believe in and that show strong market potential.
- We respect you and your personal hours, we keep a sustainable pace by working standard 8 hour days from Monday to Friday, ensuring we only plan for what we can achieve.
- We are fully agile and only work with Clients who work the same, working with set sprint goals and working at our rate of velocity.
- You will have ownership over your role, giving you the opportunity to experiment and try new processes to better improve your day-to-day responsibilities. We are always open to improving our processes.

Company Benefits

- An open and dynamic working environment with no dress code and the freedom to be yourself.
- Modern open-space office with comfortable workspace, a PS4 games room, and chill-out areas.
- Salary review twice a year with opportunities for promotions and spot awards.
- Yearly Training Budget up to 5 million VND per staff.
- Culture of recognition with monthly rewards for those with the most kudos.
- All office benefits and full salary during probation.
- Flexible starting time up to 10 AM working Monday - Friday with no overtime and a long lunch break.
- Two days remote every week taken on any days you choose so you can work from wherever you like.
- Full Vietnamese holidays off with 12 annual leave days per year with all days not taken paid out in cash.
- Yearly company trip, monthly team all-hands activities, welcome lunches for new members, the monthly budget for team celebrations.
- Celebrations for special days in the year, such as Women’s Day, YEP, Christmas.
- Gold level Health Insurance coverage from Bao Viet Insurance and a yearly complete Health Check.
- Employee-led clubs within the company; games teams, sports teams, etc.
- Buddy system, tech, and product talks, mentoring, and paid-for training for any skills you’d like to develop.
- Weekly agile sessions and professional coaching.
- Meal allowance, parking allowance, petrol allowance, and unlimited snacks and coffee every day.
- Options for a full MAC or PC set-up are completely provided.

Where We Work

HCMC Head Office: Level 8, Vina Building, 131 Xo Viet Nghe Tinh, Ward 17, Binh Thanh District, HCMC

Hanoi Office: Ba Dinh District, Ha Noi City

Da Nang Office: Level 8, Bach Dang Complex, 50 Bach Dang, Hai Chau Ward, Da Nang City

title: Backend Developer (Golang/ MySQL/ PostgreSQL/ Nginx)

jobDescription: • Develop and optimize high-concurrency backend services and APIs in Golang. • Refactor CPU-blocking or heavy I/O logic to keep the event loop (and your brain) healthy. • Improve performance observability and error handling: integrate Prometheus, Grafana, Sentry, and our internal APM stack. • Work with DevOps on Kubernetes (GKE or on-prem clusters), autoscaling (CPU/Memory or HPA), and caching strategy support. • Design or extend caching patterns (e.g., cache-aside, stale-while-revalidate) with Redis or similar realtime-support backing stores. • Build performance test suites and scripts: k6, Locust, Artillery, or whatever doesn't set your laptop on fire.
requirements:
Must-Have Skills

- Experience: from 2 - 3 years
- Backend service engineering: advanced proficiency with Golang.
- API & performance optimization experience under high concurrency.
- Caching experience: Redis, NGINX reverse proxy caching, CDN rules.
- Database tuning: indexing & slow query profiling (MySQL/ PostgreSQL).
- DevOps collaboration mindset (infra, autoscale, monitoring).

Nice-To-Have

- Kubernetes experience (GKE or on-prem)
- Experience building internal API or caching architecture proposals
- Sports domain curiosity (football, basketball, tennis, etc.)
- Ability to take ownership of features and lead technical direction as platform scales
benefits:

- Premium Gym Access: Free membership at a 5-star fitness club, weekly pickleballs…with attractive award
- Ergonomic Chairs: Work comfortably with high-quality ergonomic seating.
- Free Snacks & Coffee: Daily complimentary snacks and coffee.
- Team Bonding: Enjoy happy hours, birthday parties, and annual company trips.
- Health & Wellness: Annual health check-ups to keep you at your best.
- Working Hours: 8:30 AM – 17:30 PM (Monday to Friday)

company: Tổng công ty Tân Cảng Sài Gòn (Saigon NewPort Corporation)
label: HOT
