jobDescription:
We are looking for a Data Architect to design and govern the enterprise data architecture that supports analytics, AI, and digital transformation across largescale port and logistics operations. This role focuses on data structure, integration, and governance, not day-today data engineering.

Key responsibilities

- Design and maintain enterprise data architecture (data models, domains, integration patterns).
- Define data platform architecture (Data Lake, Data Warehouse, MDM, streaming).
- Ensure data architecture aligns with enterprise architecture and digital platforms.
- Review and guide data-related designs from projects and vendors.
- Work with Data Governance and business teams to define critical data elements.
- Support data readiness for analytics, AI, and automation initiatives.
requirements:
- From 2 years in data architecture, data engineering, or data platform roles.
- Strong experience in data modeling, data integration, and data platforms.
- Solid understanding of Data Warehouse, Data Lake, MDM, metadata management.
- Experience with large, integrated enterprise systems is a strong plus.
- Ability to communicate data concepts clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Who should apply:

- Data professionals ready to move from implementation to architecture.
- Architects who value structure, standards, and long-term scalability.
- Practitioners who want their data designs to power real-world decisions.
benefits:
- Shape the data foundation of a national-scale infrastructure enterprise.
- High-impact role supporting AI, analytics, and operational optimization.
- Clear architecture ownership, not just pipeline maintenance.
- Flexible engagement: full-time or expert contract

ABOUT THE JOB

As an Engineer Manager, you will be accountable for the leadership of one or more engineering scrum teams to plan, deliver and support service features that deliver customer value and/or mature service capability. The position is also accountable for executing the people leader fundamentals in line with NAB Policies, driving a learning-based culture with an ability to set and gain agreement for realistic and stretching objectives for the team.

About the role

The Senior Systems Administrator is responsible for ensuring the seamless operation, reliability, and ongoing maintenance of the organisation’s IT infrastructure. This role is critical in supporting the technology backbone of the business, ensuring systems remain secure, high-performing, and highly available.

The successful candidate will take ownership of a broad range of responsibilities, playing a key role in maintaining a stable and efficient IT environment while supporting business operations and driving continuous improvement initiatives.

Infrastructure & Systems

Cloud & Platforms

Deployment & Operations

Microsoft 365 & End-User Services

Incident Management & Documentation

title: Lead QC Engineer (Automation & Gen AI)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Disruptive innovations
- People-oriented philosophy of doing business
- Your footprint on regional on-demand market
jobDescription:
We are seeking a visionary Lead QC Engineer with 5–7 years of experience to spearhead our transition into AI-augmented quality engineering. In this role, you will architect an Automation-First ecosystem powered by Generative AI and high-velocity deployment tools. You aren't just managing a test suite; you are leveraging cutting-edge CLI tools like Claude Code and robust frameworks like Antigravity to ensure reliability at the speed of modern development.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIESAutomation & Gen AI Execution (65%)

- AI-Native Development: Use Claude Code (CLI) to accelerate script generation, perform real-time code refactoring, and automate the creation of complex test suites directly from the terminal.
- High-Velocity Execution: Implement and maintain automation workflows using Antigravity, ensuring tests are lightweight, fast-executing, and resilient across different environments.
- Gen AI Execution Strategy: Build "Prompt Libraries" and AI agents to handle the heavy lifting of manual-to-automated script conversion (Playwright/Cypress).
- CI/CD Intelligence: Integrate AI-driven insights into GitLab/Jenkins pipelines to predict "flaky" tests and optimize execution paths based on code changes.
- Self-Healing Frameworks: Design automation layers that utilize LLMs to self-correct scripts when UI elements or API contracts shift.

Process Innovation & Strategy (20%)

- Workflow Engineering: Re-engineer the QC lifecycle by deploying AI agents for defect triaging, log analysis, and automated bug reporting.
- Tech Advocacy: Continuously evaluate the intersection of Claude Code, LLMs, and Antigravity to minimize "gravity" (friction) in the release cycle.
- Efficiency Metrics: Define and track "AI-Lift" metrics—measuring how AI integration reduces time-to-market and increases test coverage.

Leadership & Mentorship (15%)

- The "Automation-Mindset": Coach the team to move beyond manual validation, fostering a culture where AI assistants are the primary driver for efficiency.
- Strategic Alignment: Partner with DevOps and Engineering leads to align quality gates with rapid, "Antigravity-speed" deployment cycles.
requirements:
- Experience: 5–7 years in QA/QC, with at least 2 years in a Lead capacity spearheading automation initiatives.
- Automation Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, or Java. Hands-on experience with Playwright, Cypress, or Selenium.

Advanced Tooling & AI:

- Claude Code: Proficiency in using Claude’s CLI for agentic coding, automated debugging, and script generation.
- Antigravity: Proven experience leveraging Antigravity for high-efficiency test execution and infrastructure management.
- LLM Literacy: Expert at using GPT-4, Claude 3.5/4, and AI-powered IDEs (Cursor/GitHub Copilot).

Technical Stack:

- Deep knowledge of API Testing (Postman, RestAssured) and Microservices.
- Proficiency in Docker/K8s and cloud-native environments.

Soft Skills: A technical "tinkerer" who can explain complex AI workflows to stakeholders and mentor junior engineers in the art of Prompt Engineering.
benefits:

- Emotional Wellbeing Benefit: Company Trip, Year End Party, Aha Hour Activities, Special Day Gifts, Aha Club (Badminton, Soccer).
- Financial Wellbeing Benefit: Grab/Be For Work (Tech/Lead Level), Workplace Relocation, 13th Month Salary, PP Appreciate, Annual Leave Remain.

title: Senior Business Application Analyst (Digital Banking)
company: Ngân hàng TMCP Phương Đông | OCB
label: HOT

jobDescription:
We are on a journey to modernize our digital banking platform. We aren't just documenting requirements; we are bridging the gap between complex financial operations and high-performance technical architecture. We are looking for a Business Analyst who understands the mechanics of banking, thinks in terms of system flows, and wants to have a direct influence on the design of a real-world, high-traffic digital banking ecosystem.

- Analyze & Define: Lead the discovery and documentation of business requirements. Transform complex banking processes into clear Use Cases, User Stories, and BPMN 2.0 flows.
- Design Solutions: Define business-logic solutions for integrated services, including domestic/international payments, money transfers, and Open Banking interfaces.
- Architectural Collaboration: Partner closely with Architects and Engineers to map business logic to technical solutions (API contracts, data flows and sequence diagrams).
- Quality & Deployment: Own the requirement lifecycle. Support UAT execution, review test cases, and ensure the final delivery aligns with both business needs and legal/regulatory standards.
- Bridge the Gap: Act as the primary translator between business stakeholders and technical squads, ensuring clarity, consistency, and alignment across all project phases.
requirements:
Different projects and squads may focus on different technical domains. Candidates with strengths in relevant areas will be considered for suitable engineering teams across our banking technology ecosystem.

1. Analytical Rigor & Process Design

- Process Mastery: Deep experience in mapping complex banking workflows. You are proficient in visualizing processes using BPMN and sequence diagrams.
- Documentation Excellence: Proven ability to produce clear, structured documentation (Solution Specs, User Stories, API Contracts). You prioritize clarity and "testability" in your requirements.
- Problem Decomposition: Ability to break down complex financial problems (e.g., cross-border settlement, payment orchestration) into manageable, technically feasible requirements.

2. Banking & Integration Domain

- Payment Domain Knowledge: Deep understanding of domestic payment schemes (Napas 247, QR Code, ECOM) and international payment standards.
- API Fluency: Solid understanding of RESTful APIs, OpenAPI 3.0 specifications, and API-Led connectivity. You can read technical API documentation and participate in designing API contracts.
- Integration Mindset: Experience navigating the complexities of Core Banking systems, Payment Hubs, and third-party payment gateways. 3. Workflow & Collaboration
- Lifecycle Management: Proficiency with Jira/Redmine to track requirements, manage Change Requests (CR), and coordinate with development/QA teams throughout the SDLC.
- Communication: Exceptional ability to present complex technical concepts to non-technical business users, and conversely, represent business needs to engineering teams. 4. Strategic & "Plus" Skills
- Technical Leadership: Ability to drive architectural discussions, challenge legacy assumptions, and mentor junior team members.
- Continuous Learning: A proactive mindset to keep pace with evolving fintech trends (e.g., Open Banking, AI-driven financial services).
- AI-SDLC: Experience leveraging AI tools (e.g., for automated documentation, test case generation, or requirement analysis) in daily workflows. 5. Core Competencies & Professional Background
- Experience: 5+ years of professional experience as a Business Analyst in the Finance/Banking sector.
- Educational Foundation: Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, Computer Science, or Finance/Banking. Technical Literacy: Understanding of Microservices architecture and how business requirements impact system design and performance.
- Regulatory Compliance: Ability to ensure that all proposed technical solutions remain strictly within the bounds of legal and banking regulations.
- Bonus points for:Direct experience in Open Banking, API Gateway, or Payment Hub project implementations.Experience in designing systems for high-traffic, real-time transaction environments.Practical knowledge of software testing methodologies and UAT management tools.
- Direct experience in Open Banking, API Gateway, or Payment Hub project implementations.
- Experience in designing systems for high-traffic, real-time transaction environments.
- Practical knowledge of software testing methodologies and UAT management tools.
benefits: •    Real Impact: You won't be just a "cog in the machine." You will have a voice in shaping our technical roadmap and solving real-world banking challenges.•    Modern Tech Stack: We are moving away from outdated patterns and embracing modern Android standards (Jetpack Compose, Clean Architecture, modularization).•    Technical Growth: You will work on high-traffic, secure banking systems—the kind of experience that significantly boosts your career value.•    Flexibility & Culture: We value results over bureaucracy. You will work with a team that respects deep work and engineering excellence.

title: Associate Software Architect (AWS)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Global Company- Develop Your Career & English

jobDescription:
Why This Role Matters

Design, Learn, Deliver, Grow.

As an Associate Software Architect, you’ll play an important role in shaping the solutions behind Hansen’s utility billing and customer platforms. This is an early‑career architecture role designed for technologists who want to grow their solution design and systems thinking capability while working on real, large‑scale enterprise systems.

Working alongside experienced Solution Architects and senior engineers, you’ll help translate business needs into clear, practical solution designs that support cost‑effective billing, reliable operations, and positive customer experiences—often in modern, cloud‑based environments.

Your contributions will help ensure Hansen’s solutions are robust, scalable, secure, and ready to support critical services for utilities and communities around the world.

*Note: This is 5-day office-based job in Thao Dien, D.2

What You’ll Do

- Support the design of software solutions under the guidance of Solution Architects and senior engineers.
- Assist with requirements discovery, clarification, and documentation (e.g. user stories, acceptance criteria, functional specs).
- Contribute to solution and integration designs, including process flows, APIs, data considerations, and interface definitions.
- Help analyse non‑functional requirements such as performance, security, reliability, and maintainability.
- Contribute to cloud‑based and platform modernisation initiatives, including API‑driven and containerised architectures.
- Collaborate closely with developers, QA, DevOps, and delivery teams throughout the project lifecycle.
requirements:
What You Bring

- A degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, IT, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
- A foundational understanding of software development and integration principles (e.g. OOP, APIs, relational databases).
- Exposure to cloud‑based architectures (ideally AWS), including APIs and containerised workloads.
- Familiarity with at least one enterprise technology or language (e.g. Java, .NET, SQL/PLSQL).
- Awareness of non‑functional requirements and an interest in design trade‑offs and system quality.
- Strong communication skills, with the ability to document and explain technical concepts clearly.
- A collaborative mindset, curiosity, and a strong desire to learn and grow as a solution architect.

Nice to Have

- Exposure to Agile or Scrum delivery environments.
- Familiarity with architecture or design standards (e.g. UML, C4, ArchiMate).
- Any experience in utilities, energy, billing, or customer platforms.
- Interest in using AI‑assisted tools (e.g. Copilot) to improve analysis, documentation, and delivery quality.
benefits:
- Competitive Market Rate Salary - full salary (including SI contribution) during the probation period and 13th-month salary
- Twice yearly salary review
- Full participation in the annual Hansen Profit Share Program
- Great Leave Options – including 12 days annual leave during Year 1, increasing to 15 days annual leave and 12 days paid sick leave per year).
- Premium healthcare for employee and dependents (spouse and {all} children and support for parents). Also, free comprehensive annual check-up for employees.
- High-speed Internet credit: VND 5,5million/year
- Wellness benefit: VND 2million annually for fitness package/devices
- Free lunch, snacks, and drink in our new modern offices, which have a cool open atmosphere with an outdoor cafe, bar, and recreation area in District 2 – including free scooter parking
- Continuous Learning and Development, including personalised Udemy Business – online learning platform.
- Reward and Recognition - Company sponsored trips and events, tenure milestones and global recognition program.
- New, modern developer laptop, 2 large monitors, and headset.
- An international work environment, highly skilled colleagues to learn from both locally and globally where you can develop your IT career and English skills.

jobDescription: - Thiết kế mô hình hệ thống, mối quan hệ với các hệ thống khác- Phân lớp các module, chức năng- Công nghệ áp dụng triển khai cho từng module trong hệ thống- Xác định luồng dữ liệu ra vào giữa các hệ thống - Xác định phương pháp lưu trữ, lựa chọn công nghệ cho sản phẩm cụ thể- Thực hiện Proof Of Concept mức tổng thểThiết kế chi tiết các hệ thống CNTT- Thiết kế CSDL- Thiết kế luồng xử lý nghiệp vụ chức năng- Thiết kế giao diện (giao diện màn hình, validation, luồng màn hình, layout báo cáo,…)- Thiết kế biểu đồ luồng dữ liệu, biểu đồ lớp, các tiện ích và các tài liệu đặc tả chương trình khác ( đặc tả bản tin, đặc tả file, …).- Thiết kế API, Lớp, hàm- Xây dựng tài liệu đặc tả kĩ thuật trong các bài toán theo yêu cầu- Thực hiện Proof Of Concept mức ứng dụngĐảm bảo tính tương thích, tính phối hợp hoạt động, tính ổn định và tính khả dụng của kiến trúc giải pháp.- Thiết kế mô hình triển khai logic, vật lý ( yêu cầu cụ thể về cấu hình thiết bị, có bao nhiêu node, mô hình kết nối tác node, …)- Thiết kế các phương án dự phòng hệ thống.- Thiết kế các phương án sao lưu, khôi phục, xử lý lỗi.- Thiết kế ATTT hệ thốngNghiên cứu và thử nghiệm công nghệ- Rà soát, đánh giá đưa ra các đề xuất cải tiến, tối ưu cho  sản phẩm- Xác định chiến lược đầu tư công nghệ để hỗ trợ phát triển kiến trúc sản phẩm và tối đa hoá lợi tức đầu tư công nghệ- Thử nghiệm công nghệ mới, báo cáo và đưa vào định hướng công nghệ trong tương laiLà người rà soát cuối cùng về giải pháp kỹ thuật của dự án
requirements: - Tốt nghiệp Đại học chính quy loại Khá trở lên chuyên ngành CNTT/ĐTVT và các chuyên ngành Kỹ thuật liên quan và Kinh tế- Có ít nhất 2 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc tại vị trí tương đương.- Nắm rõ các kiến trúc hệ thống cơ bản thường dùng và các giải pháp khả thi để tích hợp, giao tiếp với các hệ thống bên ngoài, đánh giá được ưu nhược điểm của từng phương pháp, các công nghệ về webservice (SOAP, WSDL, JAXR, …)- Có kiến thức về giải pháp ATTT cho các thành phần trong kiến trúc hệ thống- Có kiến thức, hiểu biết về design patterns, lựa chọn phù hợp cho các trường hợp và vấn đề thường gặp khi thiêt kế phần mềm.- Hiểu biết các dạng kiến trúc cơ bản như Client Tier (SPA, HTML, AJAX, …), Web Tier (MVC, JSP, JFS, Templating framework, webframework), Business Tier (EJB, JPA, ESB)- Có nền tảng về phần cứng và phần mềm. Giao tiếp và diễn đạt vấn đề kĩ thuật tốt.- Có kiến thức am hiểu về nghiệp vụ ngành/lĩnh vực được giao và hiểu biết về các xu thế công nghệ mới trên thế giới- Có khả năng đọc hiểu tài liệu tiếng Anh. Ưu tiên có chứng chỉ TOEIC, TOEFL hoặc IELTS tương đương với điểm TOEIC – 650 điểm trở lên.
benefits:
Đãi ngộ

# Dẫn đầu thị trường

- Cơ hội được làm việc tại Tập đoàn tiên phong mở đường , kiến tạo tương lai thông minh, gắn kết của Việt Nam.
- Cơ hội được thử sức trong những lĩnh vực công nghệ tiên tiến, hiện đại nhất.

# Môi trường năng động sáng tạo

- Môi trường làm việc cởi mở và năng động, khuyến khích trao đổi ý tưởng ở mọi cấp, cho phép bạn làm việc, sáng tạo theo cách riêng.
- Được khơi gợi cảm hứng làm việc với văn phòng xanh, không gian mở, hiện đại tiêu chuẩn quốc tế.

# Cơ hội thử thách và phát triển

- Áp dụng kiến thức, kĩ năng, kinh nghiệm chuyên môn giải quyết các bài toán hấp dẫn, thử thách tại Viettel.
- Cơ hội thử sức ở nhiều lĩnh vực, sản phẩm và quốc gia khác nhau góp phần thay đổi xã hội .
- Viettel cam kết cho bạn nền tảng vững chắc để học hỏi và phát triển.
- Sẵn sàng trao quyền, cơ hội đột phá cho những người trẻ tuổi.
- Cơ hội học hỏi từ các chuyên gia hàng đầu, lãnh đạo và đồng nghiệp ưu tú.
- Cơ hội được đào tạo, trao dồi kĩ năng định kì và nhu cầu thực tế.

# Chế ngộ đãi ngộ hấp dẫn, cạnh tranh

- Lương thưởng cạnh tranh trên thị trường, phản ánh đúng năng lực thực tế.
- Được thư giãn, khơi nguồn sáng tạo với Happy Time mỗi ngày .
- Thưởng thức bữa trưa thơm ngon tại Tập đoàn, được chọn lọc bởi các chuyên gia dinh dưỡng.
- Cơ hội tham gia gắn kết với tập thể, tổ chức với các hoạt động team building thú vị
- Chế độ chăm sóc y tế đặc biệt cho CBNV và người thân với trang thiết bị hiện đại.

Khác

Viettel tuyệt đối không thu bất cứ khoản tiền nào của ứng viên khi nộp hồ sơ tham gia dự tuyển và khi vào làm việc tại Viettel nếu trúng tuyển

title: VIETTEL SOLUTIONS - Project Manager
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
- Dẫn đầu thị trường
- Cơ hội thử thách và phát triển bản thân
- Môi trường làm việc năng động
jobDescription:
- Phối hợp với PMO, AM đưa ra lộ trình triển khai và chi phí dự án để làm việc với khách hàng

- Quản lý dự án

+ Xác định yêu cầu, mong muốn, phạm vi dự án với người BẢO TRỢ dự án và các bên liên quan (Stakeholder) như khách hàng, đối tác, nhà cung cấp...

+ Khởi tạo dự án: Xác định mục tiêu, phạm vi công việc dự án, các nguồn lực dự kiến của dự án, các bên liên quan tương tác đến dự án.

+ Làm việc với khách hàng xác định yêu cầu, mong muốn của khách hàng về sản phẩm/dịch vụ.

+ Khởi tạo dự án: Xác định mục tiêu, phạm vi công việc dự án, các nguồn lực dự kiến của dự án, các bên liên quan tương tác đến dự án.

+ Lập dự án (bao gồm phương án và kế hoạch dự án), dựa trên phạm vi công việc, chi phí và các mốc cần hoàn thành của dự án. Chia nhỏ các công việc, thứ tự các công việc cần thực hiện và đề xuất nhân sự thực hiện dự kiến.

+ Đề xuất tiêu chuẩn và số lượng nhân sự cần tham gia dự án theo từng giai đoạn của kế hoạch dự án.

+ Quản lý tiến độ và chất lượng dự án

+ Kiểm soát tiến độ các công việc của dự án, của thành viên dự án theo kế hoạch.

+ Thực hiện các hoạt động dự án tuân thủ theo đúng quy trình yêu cầu.

+ Quản lý các vấn đề, rủi ro có thể phát sinh trong quá trình thực hiện dự án (về tiến độ, nhân sự, chi phí, môi trường dự án, điều kiện đảm bảo, ...). Từ đó đề xuất giải pháp và kế hoạch xử lý vấn đề, phòng tránh rủi ro.

+ Quản lý doanh thu chi phí của dự án

+ Quản lý đối tác outsource để đảm bảo tiến độ, chất lượng và quy trình của Tập đoàn (nếu có)

- Phối hợp QA, QC đánh giá quy trình, chất lượng hệ thống.

- Nghiệm thu với khách hàng.

- Đóng dự án

+ Thực hiện các thủ tục kết thúc dự án

+ Cập nhật tài liệu, bài học kinh nghiệm của dự án.
requirements:
- Bằng cấp: Tốt nghiệp Đại học (loại Khá trở lên) chuyên ngành CNTT, Điện tử Viễn thông, Khoa học Máy tính, Toán Tin Ứng dụng, Khoa học dữ liệu hoặc tương đương.
- Ngoại ngữ: Đọc hiểu tài liệu tiếng Anh ngon lành. Ưu tiên có chứng chỉ TOEIC 650+ (hoặc IELTS, TOEFL tương đương).
- Kiến thức, kinh nghiệm:

- Có ít nhất 4 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc tại vị trí tương đương.

- Hiểu biết và nắm rõ về các phương pháp quản lý dự án hiện đại như PMI, Agile.

- Viết tài liệu quản lý dự án, chủ động, độc lập trong công việc.

- Có khả năng dẫn dắt team dự án thực hiện dự án theo yêu cầu đề ra của cấp trên.Tổ chức, quản lý tốt với các thành viên dự án.

- Kinh nghiệm tham gia các dự án về CNTT, có các chứng chỉ MCSA(O365…) , Azure, AWS hoặc các chứng chỉ quản lý dự án như PMP, PMI-ACP là một lợi thế

- Khả năng nghiên cứu giải pháp công nghệ và chịu được áp lực công việc cao, giải quyết tình huống tốt.

- Tinh thần: Năng động, sẵn sàng học hỏi, dám đương đầu thử thách và luôn hỗ trợ đồng đội.

title: [Junior] Java Developers
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
- Flexible claim
- Training courses allowance
- 14 AL, 3 SL, 1 HB, + 1 day per 1 working year
jobDescription:
If you are looking for a friendly working environment with interesting products and great remuneration package where you can express your coding passion

If you are looking for a team of technology professionals from whom you can learn from and upgrade your technology skills to become a great full-stack Java coder

InceptionLabs is where you belong.

We are now seeking for enthusiastic and passionate coders who are strong at Java, Javascript, and Databases, to join our team to work on both front end and back end systems.

The key responsibilities you will take:

- Participate in the entire product life cycle, from requirements, designs to implementations
- Troubleshoot and improve current systems and their performance through close collaboration with different product teams
- Learn and expand your knowledge through individual research or team discussions to keep up with industry standards
- Ensure coding quality, for yourself and other peers.
requirements:
Required experience

- A degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology or related fields and possess strong fundamentals in algorithms and data structures
- Years of coding experience in Java
- Great knowledge in areas such as Concurrent programming, Dependency Injection, Unit testing, Networking and Java core, java NIO, non-blocking and concurrency principles
- Real time application, handle big amount of streaming data
- Hand on experience on working with distributed, scalable system, multi-threaded application
- Knowledge in MySQL databases in areas such as caching, benchmarking, finding bottlenecks, writing complex queries or scaling
- Log management skills to organize, collect, centralize logs and extract valuable insight
- Proven troubleshooting skills to find traces of production issues which might span multiple interacting services
- Prefer candidates under 30 years old.
benefits:
- Bi-annually performance appraisals
- 14 AL, 3 SL, 1 Birthday leave
- Additional 1 day per 1 working year
- Training courses allowance 10,000,000/year
- Flexible claim 3,000,000/year
- UNIC healthcare and full-salary-based insurance
- Flexible working hours
- Annual company trips oversea or Vietnam
- Regular sports and outing events to keep everyone energized and relaxed monthly
- Flexi-claims program to cover that lovely gift you always wanted
- Well-stocked pantry with snacks customized to your liking
- Meal allowance
- Gift Anniversary
- Micro bonus for great things you do daily
- Cool laptop and a 21' screen
- Billiards, PS4 for relaxing

# Môi trường năng động sáng tạo

- Môi trường làm việc cởi mở và năng động, khuyến khích trao đổi ý tưởng ở mọi cấp, cho phép bạn làm việc, sáng tạo theo cách riêng.
- Được khơi gợi cảm hứng làm việc với văn phòng xanh, không gian mở, hiện đại tiêu chuẩn quốc tế.

# Cơ hội thử thách và phát triển

- Áp dụng kiến thức, kĩ năng, kinh nghiệm chuyên môn giải quyết các bài toán hấp dẫn, thử thách tại Viettel.
- Cơ hội thử sức ở nhiều lĩnh vực, sản phẩm và quốc gia khác nhau góp phần thay đổi xã hội .
- Viettel cam kết cho bạn nền tảng vững chắc để học hỏi và phát triển.
- Sẵn sàng trao quyền, cơ hội đột phá cho những người trẻ tuổi.
- Cơ hội học hỏi từ các chuyên gia hàng đầu, lãnh đạo và đồng nghiệp ưu tú.
- Cơ hội được đào tạo, trao dồi kĩ năng định kì và nhu cầu thực tế.

# Chế ngộ đãi ngộ hấp dẫn, cạnh tranh

- Lương thưởng cạnh tranh trên thị trường, phản ánh đúng năng lực thực tế.
- Được thư giãn, khơi nguồn sáng tạo với Happy Time mỗi ngày .
- Thưởng thức bữa trưa thơm ngon tại Tập đoàn, được chọn lọc bởi các chuyên gia dinh dưỡng.
- Cơ hội tham gia gắn kết với tập thể, tổ chức với các hoạt động team building thú vị
- Chế độ chăm sóc y tế đặc biệt cho CBNV và người thân với trang thiết bị hiện đại.

Khác

Viettel tuyệt đối không thu bất cứ khoản tiền nào của ứng viên khi nộp hồ sơ tham gia dự tuyển và khi vào làm việc tại Viettel nếu trúng tuyển

Mục tiêu vị trí: Phát triển và triển khai các hệ thống AI/LLM vào sản phẩm thực tế của công ty như AI CRM, chatbot, hệ thống hỏi đáp tài liệu và AI tự động hóa quy trình; đảm bảo hệ thống hoạt động ổn định, dễ mở rộng, kiểm soát tốt chất lượng đầu ra, tốc độ phản hồi và chi phí vận hành.

Mô tả công việc:

- Trực tiếp phát triển backend và các thành phần AI cho sản phẩm như chatbot, RAG, AI xử lý tài liệu, AI workflow và automation.
- Xây dựng các service/API phục vụ tích hợp AI vào website, CRM, hệ thống nội bộ và các nền tảng liên quan.
- Phát triển các pipeline xử lý dữ liệu, retrieval, orchestration, evaluation và monitoring cho hệ thống AI.
- Tham gia thiết kế giải pháp kỹ thuật phù hợp với yêu cầu sản phẩm, bảo đảm hiệu năng, độ ổn định, bảo mật và khả năng mở rộng.
- Đề xuất hướng triển khai phù hợp giữa prompting, RAG, workflow AI, model routing hoặc các giải pháp liên quan tùy bài toán thực tế.
- Tích hợp các mô hình AI/LLM, công cụ xử lý dữ liệu và các hệ thống backend vào sản phẩm đang vận hành.
- Theo dõi và cải thiện chất lượng hệ thống AI dựa trên các chỉ số như độ chính xác, độ trễ phản hồi, tỷ lệ lỗi, chi phí sử dụng và trải nghiệm người dùng.
- Chủ động phân tích nguyên nhân khi hệ thống AI hoạt động chưa đạt kỳ vọng; đề xuất và triển khai hướng khắc phục.
- Phối hợp với các bộ phận Business, Product, Backend, Frontend, Data và DevOps để triển khai giải pháp AI vào môi trường thực tế.
- Viết tài liệu kỹ thuật, mô tả luồng xử lý, đầu vào – đầu ra, giới hạn hệ thống và các lưu ý vận hành.
requirements:
Yêu cầu bắt buộc

- Có từ 4 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, trong đó có kinh nghiệm làm việc thực tế với AI/ML/LLM/NLP.
- Thành thạo Python.
- Có nền tảng tốt về backend, API, xử lý dữ liệu và tư duy thiết kế hệ thống.
- Đã từng tham gia triển khai ít nhất 1 hệ thống AI/LLM vào môi trường vận hành thực tế.
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế với ít nhất 2 trong các nhóm sau: LLM / chatbot / RAG AI workflow / automation pipeline dữ liệu / retrieval / vector database evaluation / monitoring / observability cloud deployment
- LLM / chatbot / RAG
- AI workflow / automation
- pipeline dữ liệu / retrieval / vector database
- evaluation / monitoring / observability
- cloud deployment
- Có khả năng làm việc độc lập, chủ động bám việc đến cùng.
- Có tư duy cân đối giữa chất lượng – tốc độ – chi phí – rủi ro – khả năng mở rộng trong quá trình triển khai.
- Có khả năng đọc hiểu bài toán nghiệp vụ và chuyển hóa thành giải pháp kỹ thuật khả thi.

Ưu tiên

- Từng triển khai AI cho CRM, chatbot CSKH, kho tri thức nội bộ, xử lý tài liệu hoặc tự động hóa quy trình.
- Có kinh nghiệm với FastAPI, Django, Flask hoặc các framework backend tương đương.
- Có kinh nghiệm với vector database, Redis, queue, logging, monitoring.
- Có kinh nghiệm với AWS / GCP / Azure.
- Từng làm việc trong môi trường phối hợp giữa Business – Product – Tech.
- Có tư duy tối ưu latency, token cost, quality và reliability trong môi trường vận hành thực tế.
- Có khả năng viết tài liệu kỹ thuật rõ ràng, mạch lạc.
benefits:
- Thu nhập: 30 – 50 triệu/tháng, tùy năng lực và mức độ phù hợp thực tế.
- Tham gia xây dựng AI CRM lõi và các sản phẩm AI ứng dụng trực tiếp cho khách hàng/doanh nghiệp.
- Được tham gia vào các bài toán thực tế về chatbot, knowledge base, document AI và workflow automation.
- Có cơ hội làm việc trực tiếp với đội ngũ xây sản phẩm, được trao quyền chủ động trong phạm vi chuyên môn.
- Được trang bị công cụ phục vụ công việc như GPT Pro và các tài khoản cần thiết cho quá trình nghiên cứu, phát triển.
- Tham gia đầy đủ các chế độ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo quy định.
- Thưởng Lễ, Tết, lương tháng 13 và các chế độ phúc lợi nội bộ khác.
- Môi trường làm việc thân thiện, chuyên nghiệp, đề cao năng lực, hiệu suất và tinh thần chủ động.

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer (AI)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
- Advanced Model Research: Lead the R&D of high-performance models for Fine-Grained Visual Categorization (FGVC) and Hierarchical Classification, focusing on detecting complex object attributes and nuances in unconstrained environments using both Supervised and Self-Supervised Learning (SSL).
- Generative AI & VLM: Spearhead the exploration of Vision Language Models (VLM) and CLIP-based architectures to enable Text-to-Image / Image-to-Image retrieval and Open-Set Recognition, moving beyond fixed-class taxonomy.
- Agentic Data Workflows: Architect and implement AI Agentic Workflows to automate the data lifecycle. Design intelligent agents for autonomous data mining, auto-captioning, and Synthetic Data Generation to overcome long-tail edge cases and reduce reliance on manual annotation.
- Production-Grade AI: Drive the transition of models from research prototypes to production. Collaborate with Embedded AI Engineers to guide the distillation and quantization of heavy Foundation Models for deployment on edge devices.
requirements:
- Deep Learning Mastery: Expert-level understanding of Deep Learning architectures, specifically Transformers (ViT, Swin), CNNs (EfficientNet, ResNet), and Object Detection/Segmentation frameworks.
- Generative AI & Multi-modal: Hands-on experience with Multimodal Foundation Models (CLIP, LLaVA, etc.) and Generative approaches (Diffusion Models, GANs) for data synthesis.
- Data-Centric AI: Proven track record in building automated data pipelines. Experience with Active Learning, Auto-labeling, or building "Agentic" systems for data curation is a critical differentiator.
- Frameworks: Proficiency in PyTorch (preferred) or TensorFlow, and strong programming skills in Python and C++.
- Practical Implementation: Strong ability to write clean, maintainable code and experience with MLOps practices (CI/CD for ML, Experiment Tracking).
- Education: Bachelor’s Degree or higher in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision, Mathematics, or a related technical field.
- 7+ years of relevant industry experience in Computer Vision and Machine Learning.
- Proven track record of leading technical initiatives and successfully deploying AI models into commercial products (0-to-1 product lifecycle experience is highly preferred).
- Demonstrated ability to lead and mentor technical teams in a fast-paced R&D environment.
benefits:
- Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service …
- Social insurance, Health insurance, Unemployment insurance: by Social Insurance and Labor Law

title: Android Engineer (Kotlin)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Excellent environment and team to help you grow.
- Competitive salary and learning culture.
- Premium health care for you and your family.
jobDescription:
Are you an experienced (Senior) Android Engineer looking for your next career move? Do you have a background in design & architecture and development of digital products? If so read on.

The team:

You will be part of our Digital Delivery Hub who are responsible for designing, developing and maintaining some of the most interesting and innovative digital apps within the financial services space that are at the forefront of the market. Our Hub is focused on building a world class User Experience, Design and Web / Mobile Development team that can work with the business to realise an exciting digital strategy.

The role:

We are looking for a talented (Senior) Android Developer who still does hands-on development to contribute in the development and execution of an innovative mobile banking solution in Asia. This will include the development of in-country and cross-border solutions across all facets of a mobile banking operation including customer experience and design, developing and implementing new products and services, process engineering and other functional deliverable. Risk management and technology innovation will be essential for your success.

You will be responsible for technically leading and coaching our engineers who work in cross-functional delivery teams to design and build best-of-breed mobile solutions whilst maintaining necessary support for ongoing products.

Your duties will be to:

- Provide hands-on technical leadership and development in mobile solution development – you will get your hands dirty.
- Provide a leading voice in the evolving mobile architecture framework and road-map covering languages, tooling, patterns and delivery processes.
- Enhance our talent pool ensuring that our team’s skills and practices are leading edge and aligned to technology strategy.
- Provide technical guidance through the complete Solution Development Life Cycle.
- Developing solution architectures aligned with enterprise-wide standards to ensure successful implementation of technology solutions.
- Lead the technical design process coordinating various stakeholders; develop and document solution architectures for projects aligned to bank’s standards and policies.
- Custodian of design and engineering best practices; and technical app road-maps.
requirements:
Technical Skills:

- At least 3 years of experience in Android.
- Good understanding of modern Android architecture like MVVM, MVI, etc.
- Having experience developing both Android and iOS applications is a plus.
- Willingness to learn iOS stuff and apply it to feature development.
- Having an app in Google Play or the Apple App Store is a plus.
- Having experience in KMM development is a big plus.
- Having experience integrating mobile apps with web services, such as Firebase.
- Having experience in automation tests and unit tests.
- Having experience in memory and performance solving.
- Having experience with Dexguard, Proguard, or Dexprotector is a plus.
- Having experience with Design System is a plus.
- Having experience with Feature Flagging is a plus, such as Firebase, LaunchDarkly.
- Must have experience developing for multiple screen sizes and densities.
- Experience with developing custom UI for native components.
- Familiar with trending frameworks and libraries.
- Good at finding and using third-party open-source libraries.

Soft skills:

- Strong willingness to learn new practices and technologies.
- Able to work well in the team and willing to mentor/coach others.
- Exceptional interpersonal skills, including facilitation and negotiation.
- Understanding and experience of Agile methodology.
- Experience in working across several technical domains with the ability to ‘deep dive’ where required and ensure correct solutions are implemented.
- Ability to translate technical talk to the business.
- Ability to deliver convincing presentations that provide significant insight and generate consensus and buy-in.
benefits:
You’ll love working with us if you are:

- Passionate about technology.
- Independent but also a good team player.
- Comfortable with a high degree of ambiguity.
- Focused on usability and speed.
- Keen on presenting your ideas to your peers and management.

At TYME, opportunities are here for the taking. If you want to be part of our purpose and live and lead through our values, we can offer exciting development opportunities through expanded lateral roles, stretch assignments, or people leadership.

Some of our benefits:

- Meal and parking allowances are covered by the company.
- Full benefits and salary rank during probation.
- Insurances such as Vietnamese labor law and premium health care for you and your family.
- SMART goals and clear career opportunities (technical seminar, conference, and career talk) - we focus on your development.
- Values-driven, international working environment, and agile culture.
- Overseas travel opportunities for training and work-related.
- Internal Hackathons and company events (team building, coffee run, etc.).
- Pro-Rate and performance bonus.
- 15-day annual + 3-day sick leave per year from the company.
- Work-life balance 40-hr per week from Mon to Fri.

title: QA Automation Engineer (Python, Embedded)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
As a QA Automation Engineer in our camera systems group, you will play a crucial role in technically leading, designing, developing, and optimizing automated test solutions for intelligent embedded camera systems and user interfaces and evaluating Computer Vision and AI algorithms.

You will be responsible for the full lifecycle of test automation development, from conceptualization to deployment, while also contributing to backend API test design and implementation. This position requires a deep understanding of modern UI frameworks, strong full-stack test automation principles, and experience with camera technologies or similar data-intensive applications.

We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Quality Assurance Automation Engineer who can lead our Vietnam embedded automation efforts.

The ideal candidate is passionate about leading successful deployments of commercial systems for the benefit of our customers. The Quality Assurance Automation Engineer will be responsible for guiding the development, and hands-on participation in the quality assurance activities for our Embedded AI platform that is the core intelligence of our security surveillance cameras, appliances, and cloud services. This engineer will help drive our releases, ensure smooth and timely deployment of new features and bug fixes, and work with a team of quality engineers to maintain the test automation framework and overall product quality.

Job Description:

- Collaborate with a small team of Quality assurance engineers and Quality technicians.
- Ensure that the Motorola Solutions Embedded AI group produces the highest quality, smartest, easiest to use products in the surveillance industry.
- Help lead the design & implementation of a quality evaluation pipeline, workflows, and reporting service for automatically testing IoT devices code prior to release.
- Contribute to a comprehensive quality assurance strategy to ensure the reliability and performance of our edge-based video surveillance cameras and cloud-based services.
- Execute quality assurance testing strategies for OTA firmware releases for cameras and appliances
- Work with the quality team to develop an exhaustive test approach, including pass fail metrics, real and synthetic video datasets, and automation as part of a comprehensive test suite for each new feature.
- Collaborate with product management, embedded software developers, algorithm developers, data scientists, and user interface engineers to define system requirements and use-cases for each new analytics feature.
- Coordinate with software development teams to define release scope, objectives, and timelines.
- Develop and maintain quality metrics, reports, and documentation to track and communicate product quality improvements.
- Analyze test results, identify trends, and provide recommendations for process improvements.
- Stay up-to-date with industry best practices and emerging technologies related to quality assurance and AI-based video surveillance systems.
- Support our cross-team software escalation process, ensuring timely resolution of critical quality issues and effective communication with stakeholders.
- Identify and close testing holes in current test processes and automation
- Create and execute test plans, test cases, and test scripts for both manual and automated testing.
- Conduct off-site outdoor field testing of analytics features on camera hardware
requirements:
- Bachelor of Science degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Robotics, Physics, or equivalent experience from a technical engineering discipline.
- Experience leading a small team, evaluating performance and managing direct reports successfully.
- 3- 8 years of experience in quality assurance automation engineering.
- Proven experience in designing, implementing, and managing comprehensive quality assurance strategies and automation frameworks for complex software and hardware systems.
- Expertise in developing and authoring Python, C++, and Javascript automation software to test individual software components, web-enabled embedded hardware, IoT, and/or Robotics.
- Strong background in cloud-connected applications with platforms such as AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud, and integrating automated tests within CI/CD pipelines.
- Demonstrated ability to mentor young developers, fostering a culture of quality, innovation, and continuous improvement.
- Excellent communication, collaboration, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to effectively engage with technical and non-technical stakeholders across all levels of the organization.
- Experience with AI, machine learning, and computer vision technologies, and their application in quality assurance.
- Ability to troubleshoot complex technical issues, think critically, and drive timely resolution of critical quality issues.
- Highly organized, creative, and curious, with the ability to multi-task and thrive in an autonomous, empowering, and exciting environment.
benefits:
- Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service …
- Social insurance, Health insurance, Unemployment insurance: by Social Insurance and Labor Law
- The regime of annual leave, company trip, and checkup examination
- Award for marriage, newborn
- We have AON insurance package for employee, spouse, and children every year
- You will be trained, learned & work with the best technical managers who help you improve various dev skills & career path
- You’ll love working in our dynamic environment employees, young & active
- We love sport activities, as marathon, football, swimming,...
- Working time: From Monday to Friday | 08:30-12:00 & 13:00-17.30

jobDescription:
Primary Objectives

• As a DevOps Manager, you are responsible for strategizing and operating a centralized DevOps Service to support multiple product lines. You will act as a strategic liaison to facilitate smooth operational transitions, infrastructure problem-solving, and seamless handovers across technical units.• Additionally, you will integrate advanced reliability and security standards into the software development lifecycle to ensure maximum performance and protection for all products. This includes maintaining strict compliance with cybersecurity best practices and corporate information security policies.

Main responsibilities

• Drive the establishment of SLAs and standardized CI/CD toolchains to empower development teams across Trading and Investment Banking, ensuring a seamless and rapid time-to-market.• Promote a security-first culture by embedding automated security testing (SAST, DAST, and container security) into the delivery pipeline, ensuring every product meets strict security requirements before production release.• Architect robust monitoring and observability frameworks; define SLIs/SLOs to ensure high availability of mission-critical services while partnering with engineering teams to optimize system performance• Act as a key bridge between IT Service, Infrastructure, and Security teams to design scalable Cloud/On-premises architectures and proactively eliminate operational bottlenecks.• Lead the transformation toward Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and GitOps, driving operational efficiency and mitigating risks through advanced automation frameworks

Other responsibilities

• Drive the continuous development of team capabilities through proactive mentorship and knowledge transfer, ensuring the consistent maintenance of high-level delivery standards across all projects• Champion DevOps, SRE, and Software Security principles across the organization, serving as a technical authority to instill a culture of excellence• Lead R&D on emerging technologies to propose and implement innovative solutions that strengthen the platform's competitive edge
requirements:

• Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field

2. Knowledge & Experiences

• Over 7 years of professional experience in DevOps, System Administration, or Software Engineering• Deep expertise in DevSecOps and SRE operational models. A proven track record of integrating robust security standards throughout the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC)• Extensive expertise in microservices architecture, RESTful APIs, and the deployment of distributed systems• Direct experience in administering and operating Cloud platforms (GCP, AWS) and Containerization/Orchestration ecosystems (Kubernetes, GKE, RKE)• Proven experience in establishing and managing a DevOps Service model to support multiple concurrent product development teams

3. Technical skills

• Designing and implementing complex, large-scale CI/CD pipelines • Expertise in IaC (Terraform, Ansible) and the GitOps framework (ArgoCD)• Designing and deploying comprehensive Monitoring/Observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK/EFK, APM) for multi-cluster Kubernetes environments• Troubleshooting, log analysis, and bug fixing at the network and application architectural level• Integrating robust security tools and automated scanning into development pipelines

• Demonstrated ability to perform under high pressure and execute swift, decisive actions within a fast-paced Agile/Scrum environment• A process-oriented and system-thinking mindset, with the ability to resolve complex problems through the lens of risk management and resource optimization• Proven ability to transfer knowledge and provide guidance to elevate technical capabilities across the team• Strong negotiation and communication skills used to align expectations between innovation-driven initiatives and system stability requirements

You will be joining a high-energy, global team with a clear vision: make a thriving business within reach of anyone.

We are already a powerhouse in the email space—serving 600k+ verified users and delivering 13+ billion emails/year. But we aren’t stopping there. We are expanding beyond email into a whole suite of marketing tool.

We are looking for Backend Engineers who are problem solvers. Whether you are a strong builder (Mid-level) or a system architect (Senior), we want you to help us build high-scale infrastructure and new AI products from the ground up.

What You Will Do (The Mission)

You will not just "code tasks." You will drive business impact by working on:

- High-Scale Systems: Build and operate backend services that handle 13 billion+ annual events. You will solve difficult technical challenges like speed, data processing, and stability.
- Innovation & AI: Explore, utilize, and release the robust backend for an AI application to build a DIFM (Do it for me) marketing tool.
- APIs & Integrations: Design strong internal and public APIs. You will build integrations with partners like Shopify, Zapier, and WooCommerce.
- Full Ownership: You own your code from idea to release. You will work directly with Product Managers and Designers to decide how features should work.
requirements:
We hire for mindset first, technology second. To succeed here, you need:

Engineering Skills

- Our Tech Stack: We primarily use Golang and Node.js on the backend and PostgreSQL for our database. But we are open to any background (Java, Python, PHP, etc.)—we care about your logic, foundation, and problem-solving skills more than the specific language.
- Critical Thinking: You don't just fix bugs; you find the root cause. You proactively think about edge cases, database bottlenecks, and security before you write code.
- System Design (For Seniors): You understand how to design complex systems (Distributed systems, Databases) and can explain your choices clearly. You can design systems that stay fast even when traffic increases by 10x.

Product Mindset

- User Focus: You understand that code is a tool to solve user problems. You care about the quality of the product, not just the quality of the code.
- Curiosity: You ask "Why?" Why are we building this? Is there a simpler way? How does this help the business?

Collaboration

- Ownership: You own your work, learn from mistakes. You don't wait for detailed instructions; you talk to the PM, understand the requirement, and deliver the solution.
- Communication: You can explain technical problems to non-technical people (like Designers or other stakeholders) clearly and respectfully.
- Teamwork: You value team success. You believe in code reviews and sharing knowledge. You help the team get better every day.
benefits:

Company Introduction

Timebeat.app is a global technology company headquartered in London, UK, specialising in ultra-precise (nanosecond-level) time synchronisation solutions for 5G telecommunications, financial systems, and data centres.

As we continue to expand our operations in Vietnam, we are looking for talented individuals to join our growing team and support the delivery of cutting-edge products and digital experiences.

Role Overview

We are seeking a full-time Web Developer with strong hands-on experience in Wix and Shopify to join our Ho Chi Minh City office.

In this role, you will be responsible for maintaining and enhancing our company website and e-commerce store. You will work closely with the Head of Brand & Marketing to implement content updates, support digital campaigns, and continuously improve user experience and conversion performance.

You will also be expected to leverage modern AI tools (such as Claude or similar) to accelerate development workflows, generate solutions, and improve efficiency across web, content, and optimisation tasks.

Key Responsibilities

- Manage, maintain, and optimise our Wix website and Shopify store

- Troubleshoot website issues and ensure smooth day-to-day operation
- Collaborate with marketing and design teams on new initiatives

requirements:

- Proven hands-on experience with Wix and Shopify
- Solid understanding of HTML, CSS, and modern web tools
- Familiarity with SEO, Google Analytics, and conversion tracking
- High attention to detail, organisation, and consistency
- Experience working cross-functionally with marketing or creative teams
- Comfortable using AI tools (e.g. Claude or similar) to support development, problem-solving, and productivity

Nice to Have (Bonus Skills)

- Familiarity with email marketing tools (e.g. Klaviyo, Mailchimp)

- Exposure to tech, fintech, or SaaS environments
benefits:

At Timebeat, we believe great companies are built by great people. If you’re passionate about building high-quality digital experiences and want to grow in a dynamic environment, we’d love to hear from you.

- Rà soát, kiểm tra các tài liệu thiết kế, tài liệu hướng dẫn, tài liệu chung của Công ty, đảm bảo đáp ứng đầy đủ, chính xác về yêu cầu nghiệp vụ

jobDescription:
We're looking for an Full-stack AI engineer with mid-level experience who has worked with Python, Pytorch or Tensorflow. Our team handles multiple projects using cutting-edge models in LLM, NLP, and computer vision, among others.

What You’ll Be Doing

- Collaborate with stakeholders to analyze and apply AI/ML to existing systems.

Nice to have

benefits:
Who We Are

CodeLink is an innovative and design-focused development agency. We focus on user-centric design and agile development to bring the product vision of our clients to life. We handle the end-to-end development of products, developing the product vision through product understanding, designing experiences through UX design, refining these flows with modern UI design, and developing products through iterative agile development.

We work with both early-stage product teams and teams with existing products from a wide range of countries and industries. We focus on modern technologies and work directly with our clients. We design using design-thinking principles on tools such as Sketch, Figma, Zeplin, and more, and develop products leveraging our tech stack of React, React Native, Rails, Python, and Node.JS.

Our Core Values

1. Take full ownership of deliveryWe take ownership of our client projects and ensure that we deliver what we are in charge of to the best possible outcome.

2. Deliver our highest level of qualityWe take pride in the high quality that we deliver and work at a sustainable pace to ensure we can always deliver on that quality.

3. Stay consistent in plans and processesWe keep open and transparent communication with our teammates and our client whilst following agile development practices.

4. Have empathy for all those we work withWe show empathy and respect to all those we work with to gain a deeper understanding without any judgment or assumption.

5. Continuously improve and growWe aim high with a growth mindset and see every day as an opportunity to develop ourselves, our processes, and our products.

Top 3 Reasons To Join Us

- Use cutting-edge & proven technologies
- Work directly with international clients
- Open environment with a focus on learning

Why You’ll Love Working With Us

We work hand-in-hand with our clients to fully invest in their product development and build solutions together for their target market.

- We fully invest in our team, we will help you build yourself up in any area you feel you need development, be it in English, learning a new design tool, developing your design thinking, and more. We want to make sure that you’re always learning and developing yourself whilst a part of our team.
- We respect both Product and Technology equally, ensuring all of the Products we work on have features with true market potential and ensuring all of the team contribute to, understand, and believe in what they are developing.
- We are very selective with our clients, we only work on awesome products we believe in and that show strong market potential.
- We respect you and your personal hours, we keep a sustainable pace by working standard 8 hour days from Monday to Friday, ensuring we only plan for what we can achieve.
- We are fully agile and only work with Clients who work the same, working with set sprint goals and working at our rate of velocity.
- You will have ownership over your role, giving you the opportunity to experiment and try new processes to better improve your day-to-day responsibilities. We are always open to improving our processes.

Company Benefits

- An open and dynamic working environment with no dress code and the freedom to be yourself.
- Modern open-space office with comfortable workspace, a PS4 games room, and chill-out areas.
- Salary review twice a year with opportunities for promotions and spot awards.
- Yearly Training Budget up to 5 million VND per staff.
- Culture of recognition with monthly rewards for those with the most kudos.
- All office benefits and full salary during probation.
- Flexible starting time up to 10 AM working Monday - Friday with no overtime and a long lunch break.
- Two days remote every week taken on any days you choose so you can work from wherever you like.
- Full Vietnamese holidays off with 12 annual leave days per year with all days not taken paid out in cash.
- Yearly company trip, monthly team all-hands activities, welcome lunches for new members, the monthly budget for team celebrations.
- Celebrations for special days in the year, such as Women’s Day, YEP, Christmas.
- Gold level Health Insurance coverage from Bao Viet Insurance and a yearly complete Health Check.
- Employee-led clubs within the company; games teams, sports teams, etc.
- Buddy system, tech, and product talks, mentoring, and paid-for training for any skills you’d like to develop.
- Weekly agile sessions and professional coaching.
- Meal allowance, parking allowance, petrol allowance, and unlimited snacks and coffee every day.
- Options for a full MAC or PC set-up are completely provided.

Where We Work

Hanoi Office: Ba Dinh District, Ha Noi City

title: Lead Software Developer (Java)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Global impact with diverse teams and projects
- Work-life balance with flexibility
- Empowering tools and competitive benefits
jobDescription:
Lead Software Developers act as the primary point of contact for our clients, ensuring that teams are successful in their delivery. In this role, you will bring a strategic mindset to projects and spend time collaborating and negotiating with clients to bring a technical vision to life. Having a balance of high-level and tactical mindsets is a must, as you will spend time both with clients and your teammates.

At Thoughtworks, we believe in going above and beyond the standard and are committed to delivering best-in-class solutions that exceed our clients' expectations. Our standard engineering and delivery practices reflect our commitment to quality, and our team is always looking to innovate and improve. Lead Developers guide and coach their teams in their implementation and application.

Job responsibilities

- You will own the design and architecture of solutions, making pragmatic technology choices and guiding delivery from start to finish.
- You will lead delivery by tracking work, mitigating risks, and resolving issues at both team and client levels.
- You will build and nurture high-performing teams by fostering growth, wellbeing, and inclusivity, while coaching and mentoring key people.
- You will influence and consult with clients, working within constraints to design scalable solutions and drive business value.
- You will champion engineering best practices such as TDD, pair programming, clean code, and design patterns.
- You will collaborate with stakeholders and teammates to design concepts, build prototypes, and embed UX best practices into solutions.
- You will apply continuous delivery and DevSecOps practices to deliver secure, high-quality software quickly and sustainably.
- You will remain hands-on with coding, applying multiple languages, tools, and modern practices - never becoming post-technical.
- You will leverage insights from the Thoughtworks Technology Radar to adopt new tools, techniques, and approaches.
- You will advocate for a culture of feedback, learning, and inclusivity, helping individuals and teams thrive.
requirements:
Technical skills

- You are well-versed in at least one (Java 11 + Spring Boot) or more modern languages and frameworks, and are comfortable with object-oriented programming.
- You have experience leading software development teams using Agile, Lean, and/or Continuous Delivery practices.
- You have practical knowledge of engineering best practices such as TDD, continuous integration, pairing, and infrastructure automation.
- You have a learning mindset and enjoy exploring new approaches such as functional programming, event-driven architecture, or platform engineering.
- Bonus points if you have hands-on experience with cloud technologies such as AWS, Azure, Docker, or Kubernetes.
- Bonus points if you’re familiar with headless commerce platforms like commercetools.

Professional skills

- You have experience influencing others and always advocate for technical excellence while being open to change when needed.
- You bridge product and technology by helping to translate business needs into software requirements.
- You have the ability to develop and execute a technical vision with a focus on business value.
- You will act as a mentor for less experienced peers through both your technical knowledge and ability to inspire a team to deliver extraordinary impact together.
- You’re resilient in ambiguous situations and can approach challenges from multiple perspectives.
benefits:
At Thoughtworks, we believe technology can be a powerful force for good. That's why our purpose is to create an extraordinary impact on the world through our culture and technology excellence. This isn't just a slogan, it's the core principle guiding every decision we make.

We achieve this through a relentless pursuit of excellence and a culture built around these five core values:

- Be an awesome partner for clients and their ambitious missions
- Revolutionize the technology industry
- Amplify positive social change and advocate for an equitable tech future
- Foster a vibrant community of diverse and passionate technologists
- Achieve enduring commercial success and sustained growth

This commitment to our purpose is matched by a commitment to our people. As Thoughtworkers, you'll be empowered to focus on what you do best – creating positive change through technology – because we offer a comprehensive benefits package designed to support your well-being and career development.Here's how we support our team:

- Health & wellness: Health insurance for employees and their immediate family, mental health support and annual check-ups.
- Financial security: Competitive salaries, referral bonuses, and laptop buyback programs.
- Professional growth: Training allowances and personal development budgets.
- Work-life balance: Flexible work arrangements on a hybrid work model, maternity/paternity leave, sabbatical leave.
- Technology & equipment: Top-tier MacBooks and allowances for work-from-home setups.
- Connectivity: Monthly communications allowance to stay connected at home and on the go.
- Fun & camaraderie: We organize engaging social activities like running clubs, nature outings, annual events and monthly Town Halls to foster connections and a positive work environment.

Ready to break free from the ordinary and achieve the extraordinary? Explore our open roles!

title: Product Owner
label: HOT
reasons:
- Chance to improve English and technical skills
- Lower pressure than outsourcing companies
- Good benefits & Healthcare insurance
jobDescription:
Position Objective:

To drive the vision, strategy, and execution of our product initiatives. You will be responsible for maximizing the value of our product by managing the product backlog, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and ensuring we deliver solutions that delight our customers and achieve business objectives.

The ideal candidates will be responsible for working with Vietnamese and overseas stakeholders to develop and enhance a health insurance management system, among other tasks assigned by the IT Director.

Roles and Responsibilities

Product Vision & Strategy

- Define and communicate a clear product vision aligned with company strategy and market needs
- Develop and maintain the product roadmap, prioritizing features based on business value, customer needs, and technical feasibility
- Conduct market research and competitive analysis to identify opportunities and inform product decisions
- Define success metrics and KPIs to measure product performance, user satisfaction, and business impact
- Stay informed about industry trends, emerging technologies, and customer expectations

Backlog Management

- Create, prioritize, and maintain a well-groomed product backlog
- Write clear, detailed user stories with acceptance criteria that the development team can execute
- Balance competing priorities from stakeholders, customers, and business needs
- Continuously refine and adjust backlog priorities based on feedback, data, and changing business conditions
- Ensure the backlog is visible, transparent, and understood by all stakeholders
- Manage dependencies and coordinate with other Product Owners as needed

Stakeholder Collaboration

- Serve as the voice of the customer and primary liaison between stakeholders and the development team
- Gather requirements and feedback from customers, internal teams, and business units
- Facilitate discussions and negotiate priorities to achieve consensus on product direction
- Present product updates, demos, and roadmaps to leadership and stakeholders
- Manage stakeholder expectations regarding timelines, scope, and deliverables
- Build strong relationships across the organization to drive alignment and collaboration

Agile Team Partnership

- Work closely with development teams in an Agile environment
- Participate actively in sprint planning, daily standups, sprint reviews, and retrospectives
- Provide clarification on requirements and make timely decisions to keep teams unblocked
- Accept or reject completed work based on acceptance criteria and definition of done
- Foster a collaborative team environment focused on delivering value
- Remove impediments and ensure the team has what they need to succeed

Product Delivery & Optimization

- Validate that delivered features meet requirements and provide value to users
- Analyze user feedback, usage data, and metrics to inform future iterations
- Champion user experience and advocate for customer needs throughout the development process
- Coordinate user acceptance testing and quality assurance activities
- Support go-to-market activities including product launches, training, and documentation
- Drive continuous improvement based on performance data and customer insights
- On time delivery of requirements
requirements:
Minimum Job Requirements:

- Bachelor's degree in Business, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
- 3-4+ years of experience as a Product Owner, Product Manager, or similar role
- Must be fluent in Vietnamese
- Must have strong proficiency in written and verbal English; native fluency preferred but not required
- Strong understanding of Agile methodologies, particularly Scrum
- Proven track record of successfully delivering digital products from concept to launch
- Excellent prioritization and decision-making skills
- Strong analytical skills with experience using data to drive product decisions
- Outstanding communication and presentation skills
- Ability to work effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders
- Customer-focused mindset with empathy for user needs
- Experience with product management tools (e.g., Jira)
- Ability to translate complex business requirements into clear user stories

Requirements as a plus:

- Certified Scrum Product Owner (CSPO) or similar Agile certification
- Experience in travel, insurance, healthcare, or related industries
- Technical background or understanding of software development processes
- Experience with UX/UI principles and design thinking methodologies
benefits:
- Great chance to develop your skills and competences, with inner training and adopting new technologies
- Opportunities for promotions and career development in a dynamic environment
- Opportunity to work with multinational team 5 countries
- Working 5 days/week
- Relaxed, friendly atmosphere
- Annual company trip
- Private Medical Healthcare Insurance after 2 month probation
- 13th-month salary, bonus, salary review as per Company's policy
- English training and practicing

- Tham gia các buổi họp Agile như sprint planning, backlog grooming và sprint review, đảm bảo phù hợp với mục tiêu và ưu tiên của dự án.
- Sử dụng Jira hoặc các công cụ quản lý dự án tương tự để theo dõi nhiệm vụ, báo cáo tiến độ và quản lý vấn đề.
- Thực hiện code review, viết unit tests và debugging để đảm bảo reliability, performance và scalability của các ứng dụng ngân hàng.
- Cập nhật các công nghệ mới nổi, xu hướng ngành và best practices trong phát triển phần mềm ngân hàng để liên tục cải thiện kỹ năng kỹ thuật và đóng góp vào sự phát triển của nhóm.
requirements:
Trình Độ Học Vấn:

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Kỹ thuật máy tính, hoặc các ngành liên quan.

Kinh Nghiệm:

- Thành thạo lập trình Java: Hiểu sâu về cú pháp Java, các tính năng ngôn ngữ và khái niệm lập trình hướng đối tượng.
- Java Development Frameworks: Thành thạo các framework Java phổ biến như Spring, Spring Boot và Hibernate để xây dựng ứng dụng mạnh mẽ và có khả năng mở rộng.
- Hiểu rõ các nguyên tắc clean architecture, nguyên tắc SOLID và domain-driven design (DDD).
- Quản lý cơ sở dữ liệu: Kiến thức về các hệ quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu như MySQL hoặc Oracle, và thành thạo SQL để truy vấn và thao tác cơ sở dữ liệu.
- RESTful Web Services: Hiểu về RESTful architecture và kinh nghiệm design và implement RESTful APIs sử dụng Spring MVC.
- Hệ thống quản lý mã nguồn: Thành thạo sử dụng hệ thống quản lý phiên bản như Git để quản lý code, cộng tác và kiểm soát phiên bản.
- Build Tools và quản lý Dependency: Kinh nghiệm với các build tools như Maven hoặc Gradle để tự động hóa dự án, quản lý dependency và cấu hình build.
- Continuous Integration và Deployment (CI/CD): Kinh nghiệm với CI/CD pipelines và các công cụ như Jenkins hoặc GitLab CI để tự động hóa quy trình build, testing và deployment.
- Testing Frameworks: Thành thạo các testing frameworks như JUnit, Mockito hoặc TestNG để viết unit tests, integration tests và automated testing.
- Triển khai và Containerization: Kiến thức về kỹ thuật triển khai và công nghệ containerization như Docker để đóng gói, triển khai và mở rộng các ứng dụng Java.
- Bảo mật: Hiểu về các nguyên tắc bảo mật Java và best practices, bao gồm authentication, authorization, encryption và secure coding practices để ngăn chặn các lỗ hổng bảo mật.
- Tối ưu hóa hiệu suất: Khả năng phân tích và tối ưu hóa hiệu suất của các ứng dụng Java bằng cách xác định điểm nghẽn, tối ưu hóa thuật toán và điều chỉnh cấu hình.
- Kiến trúc Microservices: Thành thạo các nguyên tắc kiến trúc microservices và kinh nghiệm xây dựng và triển khai các ứng dụng dựa trên microservices sử dụng Java và các framework liên quan.
benefits:

jobDescription:
At OL Vietnam, we have worked alongside our parent company, Orange Logic LLC, to support some of the world’s largest enterprises with their digital asset management needs. Orange Logic provides a premier Digital Asset Management (DAM) platform that streamlines workflows, enhances collaboration, and ensures compliance across complex digital ecosystems, empowering any team working with digital content the ability to efficiently create, manage, and distribute their content at scale.

WHAT DIFFERENTIATES OL VIETNAM

- We are trusted by global leaders to work with over 100 customers, including many of the world's most recognized brands.
- Our business is strong and resilient, even in the face of economic challenges. During the Covid economic downturn, we did not implement layoffs or reduce compensation. Instead, we continued to grow, consistently expanding our team and adding dozens of talented members to our R&D department each year.
- You’ll work with top engineers and team members who are passionate about building flexible, scalable, and streamlined systems that will define the future of business management.

MISSION

Job Summary: We’re seeking a Demo Operations Specialist who is a key contributor within the Demo Operations function, supporting Solutions Engineers by building, configuring, and maintaining high-quality demo environments used in sales engagements. While aligned to the Implementation team, this role operates in close partnership with Pre-sales to ensure demo environments are delivered accurately, consistently, and on time.

This role is highly execution-focused and process-driven, responsible for translating defined requirements into fully configured environments. Responsibilities include structuring content, applying metadata, configuring UI elements, and enabling workflows that support compelling, repeatable demo experiences. In addition to core demo builds, this role also supports proof of concept environments and maintains shared demo systems used across teams.

Essential Functions:

- Demo & POC Environment SetupConfigure demo and proof of concept environments based on detailed briefs from Solutions Engineers, including folder structures, metadata schemas, and content organization aligned to specific use cases and customer scenarios.
- Asset Management & TaggingSource, upload, and organize assets using customer-provided content, stock libraries, or curated examples; apply metadata and taxonomy with a high degree of accuracy and consistency.
- UI ConfigurationConfigure user interfaces including homepages, navigation, collections, and forms to support guided demo flows, POC use cases, and role-based experiences.
- Automation & AI ServicesExecute AI-driven tagging and metadata enrichment processes; configure basic automation workflows to support demo and POC functionality.
- Workflow Support & TestingAssist in building and validating simulated customer workflows; execute QA processes, complete environment checklists, and ensure readiness prior to handoff to Solutions Engineers.
- Shared Demo System SupportMaintain and update shared demo environments used across Presales and other internal teams, ensuring consistency, usability, and alignment with evolving product capabilities.
- Collaboration & DocumentationPartner with Solutions Engineers, Implementation, and Product teams to deliver environments on schedule; maintain internal documentation, templates, and best practices to support scalability and repeatability.
- The above statements outline what are generally considered the principal and essential functions of this role. Specific responsibilities may vary based on business needs.
requirements:
Key Qualifications:

- 1–3 years of experience in system configuration, digital asset management, or related technical support roles
- Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Digital Media, or a related field preferred
- Strong attention to detail and ability to execute within structured, repeatable processes
- Comfortable working independently with clearly defined requirements and timelines
- Familiarity with DAM systems or similar enterprise platforms is a plus
- Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across distributed, cross-functional teams
benefits:
You would love to work and find those values with us:

- Distributed decision making: We also allow each employee to directly weigh in on our priorities.
- Transparency: We value transparency, openness, and accountability, whether it is with our customers or internally.
- Meritocracy: Employee's recognition and advancement is based purely on their individual and collective achievements.
- Deep work: We do everything we can to let you focus deeply on your work.

Our benefits include:

- Attractive salary package.
- 100% Gross Salary in the probation period.
- 13th-month salary.
- 18 days of annual leaves (cashback allowed if not used).
- 4 days for an overseas company trip.
- Multiple allowances (Lunch, Gym, Parking, Birthday/Tet/Wedding voucher... ).
- Full social, health, and unemployment insurance.
- Premium healthcare insurance for you and coverage for 1 extra family member.
- Monthly team-building activities (Bowling, Go-Kart, Candle Handmade workshop....) and special celebrations on Autumn Festival, Halloween, Christmas, Tet, …
- Monthly happy lunch and daily happy hours with free snacks, soft drinks, fruit, and coffee.
- Sports activities (PlayStation 5, Badminton, Football,...)

Data Privacy Notice for Candidates in Vietnam:

By submitting your application, you acknowledge that you have read and understood OL Vietnam’s Privacy Policy. Any consent provided herein is explicit and voluntary.

Based on your consent, OL Vietnam will process your personal data for recruitment for the position you apply for, including evaluating your candidacy, communicating with you, and, where applicable, verifying relevant information as part of the selection process. If you would like OL Vietnam to consider you for future suitable roles, we will request your separate, explicit consent and you may withdraw consent at any time as described in the Privacy Policy. For details on how we handle your information, please refer to our Privacy Policy on OLVN Website.

Please be aware:

Orange Logic only communicates with candidates through official @orangelogic.com email addresses or via LinkedIn from a verified Orange Logic Talent Acquisition employee listed under “Meet the Hiring Team.” We do not conduct interviews via text message or request payment or equipment purchases at any stage of the hiring process.

- Khả năng thực hiện dự án với các cột mốc kinh doanh quan trọng, đồng thời hỗ trợ/quản lý quá trình giao hàng theo phương pháp Agile.
- Quen thuộc với phương pháp giao hàng Agile - Chứng nhận Agile Certified Practitioner/Scrum Master, chứng nhận PMP là một điểm cộng.

- Phương pháp và khung quy trình bao gồm PMP, Agile, Scrum hoặc phương pháp nội bộ.
- Hiểu biết và kiến thức về việc áp dụng và triển khai công nghệ đám mây rộng rãi (Microsoft, AWS, Public Cloud, v.v...) và các công nghệ khác.

jobDescription: We are seeking a highly motivated Product Owner with solid experience in IT solution development.
