title: Jr/ Sr/ Technical Leader ODOO Developer - Tuyển gấp
reasons:
- Highly attractive salary
- 13th month salary, bonus, abroad and local trip
- Opportunity for overseas training (Germany)
jobDescription:
SGH Á Châu đang tìm kiếm  Jr/ Sr/ Technical Leader ODOO Developers – Tuyển gấp để dẫn dắt mảng kỹ thuật trong các dự án triển khai Odoo ERP. Đây là vị trí đóng vai trò trọng tâm, đảm bảo giải pháp được thiết kế đúng chuẩn, vận hành ổn định và đáp ứng chính xác yêu cầu nghiệp vụ của khách hàng.

Responsibilities

Dành cho Junior Developers:

- Tham gia phát triển, tùy chỉnh và bảo trì các module Odoo
- Hỗ trợ xây dựng business logic bằng Python và Odoo ORM
- Tùy chỉnh giao diện, workflow và báo cáo cơ bản trên Odoo
- Hỗ trợ debug, xử lý lỗi và tối ưu các chức năng hiện có
- Hỗ trợ tích hợp hệ thống thông qua API và xử lý dữ liệu cơ bản
- Phối hợp với Senior Developer, BA và QA trong quá trình phát triển dự án
- Tham gia hỗ trợ UAT, deployment và các công việc kỹ thuật liên quan.

Dành cho Senior Developers:

- Phát triển, tùy chỉnh và bảo trì các module Odoo (Sales, Inventory, Purchase, Accounting, HR, …)
- Viết code sạch, tái sử dụng và có tài lieu rõ ràng
- Refactor và tối ưu các module hiện có để cải thiện hiệu năng và khả năng bảo trì
- Xây dựng business logic bằng Python, Odoo ORM và PostgreSQL
- Tùy chỉnh workflow, giao diện, báo cáo và tối ưu hiệu năng hệ thống
- Phân tích yêu cầu và đưa ra giải pháp kỹ thuật phù hợp
- Tích hợp hệ thống thông qua REST API, web services và webhooks
- Thực hiện code review, mentoring Junior Developers và hỗ trợ xử lý production issues
- Phối hợp với BA, QA, DevOps trong quá trình triển khai dự án.

Dành cho Lead Developers:

- Thiết kế kiến trúc và định hướng kỹ thuật cho các dự án Odoo
- Phát triển và review custom Odoo modules
- Phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ và đề xuất giải pháp kỹ thuật phù hợp
- Dẫn dắt team developers, phân bổ task và hỗ trợ xử lý các vấn đề kỹ thuật phức tạp
- Review code, đảm bảo coding standards và chất lượng hệ thống
- Tối ưu hiệu năng, khả năng mở rộng và tính ổn định của hệ thống
- Định hướng tích hợp với các hệ thống bên thứ ba thông qua API, web services và webhooks
- Phối hợp với PM, BA, QA và DevOps trong quá trình triển khai dự án
- Hỗ trợ deployment, go-live và xử lý production issues.
requirements:
Dành cho Junior Developers:

- Từ 1–3 năm kinh nghiệm với Odoo hoặc Python backend development
- Có kiến thức về Python, PostgreSQL, Odoo ORM và XML
- Hiểu cơ bản về phát triển module Odoo và REST API
- Biết sử dụng Git
- Có tinh thần học hỏi, trách nhiệm và kỹ năng teamwork tốt
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học/Cao đẳng chuyên ngành CNTT hoặc liên quan.

Dành cho Senior Developers:

- Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm với Odoo (v12 trở lên)
- Thành thạo Python, PostgreSQL, Odoo ORM, XML và JavaScript
- Có kinh nghiệm phát triển custom modules và tích hợp hệ thống
- Kỹ năng debug, troubleshooting và tối ưu hiệu năng tốt
- Thành thạo Git; biết Docker/CI/CD là lợi thế
- Có tinh thần trách nhiệm, tư duy giải quyết vấn đề và kỹ năng teamwork tốt.

Dành cho Lead Developers:

- Tối thiểu 7 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, trong đó có ít nhất 5 năm với Odoo
- Thành thạo Python, PostgreSQL, Odoo ORM, XML và kiến trúc hệ thống
- Có kinh nghiệm thiết kế solution architecture và quản lý technical delivery
- Có kinh nghiệm dẫn dắt team, mentoring developers và code review
- Hiểu biết về performance optimization, security và system scalability
- Thành thạo Git; có kinh nghiệm với Docker, CI/CD là lợi thế
- Kỹ năng giao tiếp, giải quyết vấn đề và leadership tốt
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành CNTT hoặc liên quan.
benefits:
- Mức thu nhập cạnh tranh.
- Bảo hiểm xã hội FULL lương
- 15 ngày phép/năm + 3 ngày nghỉ ốm.
- Bảo hiểm sức khỏe cao cấp & bảo hiểm tai nạn 24/24.
- Du lịch hằng năm, year-end party và nhiều hoạt động nội bộ.
- Quà tặng dịp Sinh nhật, Tết, Trung thu.
- Môi trường làm việc ổn định, lâu dài.

title: Senior UI/UX Designer (Product mindset)
reasons:
- Empowerment to create your impact.
- Global team, strong foundation, endless growth.
- Friendly culture, supportive colleagues.
jobDescription:
Job Summary

The Senior Designer is responsible for design end-to-end for web & mobile, from concept to execution. Deliver high-quality, user-centered designs aligned with brand and product goals, ensuring consistency and elevating overall product quality.

---------------------------------------------------

Role Description

1. Design Execution

● Lead the conceptualization of creative designs for websites and mobile applications.

● Develop user flows, sitemaps, wireframes, and high-fidelity prototypes.

● Build and maintain cohesive design systems, including typography, color schemes, and UI components.

● Ensure all designs align with client branding and internal content standards.

2. Collaboration & Communication

● Partner directly with clients to define requirements and present design structures.

● Collaborate with developers and content creators to ensure technical feasibility and timely delivery.

● Act as a mentor to junior designers, fostering a culture of high-quality design.

3. Performance & Optimization

● Apply UX best practices to maximize usability and feature functionality.

● Analyze user feedback and product metrics to identify and implement design improvements.

● Monitor project progress and report on key performance indicators (KPIs) to stakeholders.
requirements:
Requirements

● Bachelor’s Degree in Graphic Design or a related field.

● At least 6 years as related roles

Technical Proficiency

- Strong in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, and modern UI/UX principles
- Good command of English (written & verbal)
- Solid understanding of HTML, CSS, JavaScript; familiar with CMS (WordPress, Drupal)
- Up-to-date with responsive design, UX best practices & industry trends
- Experience with web publishing workflows is a plus
benefits:
- Attractive salary package (negotiable in the interview)
- 100% salary from probation period
- 24 paid day-offs (effective from probation period)
- Premium Health Insurance package
- Annual health check at international medical centre/hospital
- Company trip & Occasional gifts (Birthday, New year, X-mas…)
- Lunch allowance: 2.000.000đ/person/month
- Yearly learning budget: $300/person
- Yearly Competency Assesment
- Pantry Offering
- High-end MacBook or laptop, monitor, and other devices as required

title: Senior AI Engineer (AI ML / English)
reasons:
- 13th bonus salary, project bonus
- Health insurance
- Annual leave: 14 days/year + 3 days/year Christmas
jobDescription: We are looking for an experienced Senior AI Engineer with practical experience in developing AI-based solutions and a strong commitment to secure software development practices in accordance with the Asseco Secure Development Lifecycle (SDLC).This role combines strong technical expertise, the ability to work independently, and a responsible approach to security, quality, and documentation. The developer will also play an important role in maintaining project know-how and supporting knowledge sharing with new team members to ensure continuity and minimize the impact of staff turnover.
requirements:
Key Responsibilities

- Design, develop, test, and optimize AI/ML solutions (e.g., machine learning models, NLP solutions, predictive models, AI automation services).
- Integrate AI components into existing or newly developed software systems.
- Work with data, including dataset preparation, validation, processing, and quality control.
- Collaborate with architects, analysts, and infrastructure teams to design AI system architecture.
- Follow secure development standards according to the Asseco Secure Development Lifecycle (SDLC).
- Prepare and maintain technical documentation and participate in code reviews.
- Monitor model performance and continuously improve deployed models.
- Identify and mitigate AI-related risks, such as bias, data leakage, and security vulnerabilities.
- Ensure compliance with privacy and data protection regulations, including handling sensitive data.

Requirements (Must-have)

- 5+ years of experience in software development, including at least 3 years in AI/ML development.
- Experience with machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or scikit-learn.
- Strong knowledge of Python (experience with FastAPI, Flask, or similar frameworks is an advantage).
- Practical experience in training, tuning, and deploying AI models.
- Professional English proficiency in both spoken and written communication (Must Have)
- Experience with data preparation, data pipelines, or MLOps is a plus.
- Understanding of modern software engineering practices, including CI/CD, Git, and containerization.
- Ability to follow secure development methodologies, especially in areas such as:- osecurity requirements analysis- oinput validation and data integrity checks- osecure integration of AI components- ologging, monitoring, and auditability- oAI risk management and mitigation of model vulnerabilities
- Knowledge of cybersecurity principles is an advantage.
benefits:

- 13th bonus salary, project bonus
- Merit reviews every year
- Meal allowance
- Annual leave: 14 days/year + 3 days/year Christmas
- Annual health check
- Health insurance
- Other benefits

title: [Hanoi] Senior Manager (Japanese N2+)
reasons:

jobDescription:
As a Senior Manager, you will define business plans for your group and lead offshore business activities, including sales support, opportunity analysis, pre-study, implementation, and upgrade projects for both existing and new customers.

This is a key leadership role responsible for managing a group of managers, ensuring smooth offshore operations, achieving business targets, and overseeing projects end-to-end with a strong focus on quality, delivery, and contractual compliance.

- Lead and manage offshore delivery teams across multiple projects, with a total team size of over 50 members, including business partners.
- Execute business strategy by business domain and prepare customer strategy by business domain, aligned with division and company objectives, including mid-term plan and demand changes.
- Ensure projects are delivered with high quality, on time, within budget and scope.
- Define countermeasures and action items with proper priority to achieve delivery performance, including quality, risks, changes, and financial status, and report to division leadership.
- Act as a key escalation point for delivery and customer-related issues.
- Maintain effective communication with customers (especially Japanese clients) and internal stakeholders.
- Build, mentor, and develop managers and key members through performance management and career development.
- Drive continuous improvement of delivery processes, quality standards, and operational KPIs.
- Conduct pre-sales, estimation, and proposal, including reviews for team members.
- Take on additional responsibilities to support operational and organizational improvement.
requirements:
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
- Minimum 10 years of experience in software development, including at least 5 years in a senior management role (Senior Manager level or higher).
- Strong experience in offshore delivery management, preferably for Japanese clients.
- Solid experience in business planning, business documentation, and executive-level presentations.
- Proven track record in budget management, project estimation, quality management, resource management, and risk management.
- Solid understanding of project management methodologies and best practices (Waterfall, Agile/Scrum)
- Experience managing large-scale or multi-project environments.
- Fluent Japanese communication and negotiation skills (JLPT N2 or above).
- Strong leadership capabilities with a demonstrated ability to drive execution and deliver results.
benefits:
- Working time: Mon-Fri, Hybrid working mode
- 13th Month Salary + Year-End Reward (a half month) + Excellent Bonus
- Special allowance for foreign language certificate (up to 500USD/month)
- Full social package (SI, HI, UI) & Premium healthcare insurance (Bao Viet)

- Udemy account provided & Sponsorship for technical certificates (AWS, Azure, PMP, etc.)
- Exciting activities: Company Trip, Xmas & Year-End Party, Sports Day, Outing Trip, etc.
- Reward Most Valuable Player (MVP) for individual & team: twice a year
- Sports clubs provided (100% sponsored by the company): Football, Badminton
- Professional environment with clear procedures and well-working facilities
- Onsite opportunities: short-term and long-term assignments in Japan, and APAC.

Our goal is to assist women worldwide with the most challenging moments in their lives – moments that are heavily under-addressed – and provide fun and effective self-care solutions.

Our first product, the Perifit (a connected probe and its mobile games), launched in 2018, has become the #1 connected solution for pelvic floor rehabilitation. As of now, it has helped more than 500,000 women and is the best-ranked app in its category.

We now develop innovative pelvic floor trainers and breast pumps that use the most recent technologies to help women improve their lives. Our mission is to empower women to take control of their health and improve their overall well-being.

At Perifit, we stand for equality, inclusivity, benevolence, and wellbeing for both our clients and our employees.

Joining Perifit means being part of a dynamic, mission-driven team that is making a real difference in women's lives, and having the opportunity to contribute to a growing and innovative startup in the Femtech industry!

title: Mid to Senior Fullstack Developer (NodeJS/Javascript)
reasons:
- Profitable startup from Year 1!
- High pay, MacBook Pro, $1000 annual development
- Work with top talent on product changing industry
jobDescription:
About the Opportunity

We are looking for an elite Internal Tools Builder to act as the engine behind our company's operations. As we evolve into a full-funnel marketing platform serving over 600k+ verified users, our internal operations, ERP, and tooling need to scale just as fast.

In this role, you will work directly with company leadership to identify operational bottlenecks and build custom internal systems from the ground up. You will not be handed a perfect ticket; you will be handed a business problem. We need a highly autonomous Fullstack Engineer with a relentless "builder mindset" who can lead the topic, architect the system, and collaborate with other engineers to get it across the finish line.

What You Will Do

You will not just "write code." You will own internal products end-to-end. Your core challenges will include:

- Build the Engine: Architect and build robust internal tools, ERP modules, and operational systems across the entire stack (Database -> API -> UI) to make our internal teams wildly efficient.
- Direct Collaboration with Leadership: You will work directly with leadership/the boss. You must be comfortable hopping on a call, translating a vague business problem into a technical roadmap, and executing it.
- Lead the Topic: You are the technical owner. You will drive the architecture, make the hard technical trade-offs, and push back when necessary to ensure we are building the right thing.
- Mentorship & Collaboration: You won't be doing it entirely alone. You will pair with and mentor a junior engineer—delegating tasks effectively, doing code reviews, and helping them level up their full-stack skills.
- Performance & Architecture: Balance speed with stability. Know when an internal tool just needs a quick MVP to save the team 10 hours a week, and when a system needs to be highly scalable to handle massive data throughput.
requirements:
What You Need to Be Successful

We hire for mindset first, technology second.

1. The Builder Mindset

- Idea to Reality: You thrive on ambiguity. You can take a vague request ("We are losing track of customer billing edge-cases") and independently architect the database, build the API, and craft the UI to solve it.
- Internal Systems Expertise: You have experience building internal tools, ERPs, CRMs, or admin dashboards. You know how to stitch together third-party APIs, webhooks, and internal databases.

2. Engineering Skills

- Deep Experience (5+ Years): You have a strong foundation in building complex, production-ready web applications.
- Fullstack Fluency: You are completely comfortable jumping between backend logic (API design, complex SQL/Database modeling) and the frontend (React, state management) without skipping a beat.

3. Communication & Leadership

- Exceptional Communicator: Because you work directly with leadership, your written and spoken English must be excellent. You can explain complex technical trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders clearly and confidently.
- Force Multiplier: You have the patience and communication skills to mentor a junior engineer, breaking down complex architectures into actionable tasks for them.
benefits:
Impact: The tools you build will instantly become the backbone of how our company operates daily.

Culture: We are a lean, fast-growing team that values Good Design, Trust, and Empowerment. We invest in our people and give them the autonomy to do their best work.

Perks:

- Highly competitive salary + 13th-month bonus.
- Stock options for high contributors.
- Professional development package of up to $1,000/year.
- Modern office with top-notch equipment (MacBook Pro).
- Comprehensive healthcare package (Annual health check, Premium Health Insurance).
- Flexible working hours with a standard 5-day workweek

title: Security Network Engineer
reasons:
- Competitive salary
- Full statutory insurance
- Professional, international working environment
jobDescription:
About Safetrust

Safetrust is building the future of identity.

Imagine a world where your phone, wearable, or digital credential becomes your secure key—unlocking buildings, systems, and experiences seamlessly across physical and digital environments.

That’s what we do.

Our platform combines IoT devices, mobile credentials, and cloud-native architecture to power secure access for Fortune 200 companies and global enterprises.

As we evolve from a hardware-centric model to a platform and services-driven business, marketing plays a critical role in shaping how the market understands—and adopts—Safetrust.

About the role

The Security & Network Engineer is responsible for the design, deployment, and ongoing operation of the network and security infrastructure across Safetrust's Vietnam sites. This includes the Q7 factory deployment, which features Cisco Firepower next-generation firewalls, Catalyst switching, and a layered network architecture supporting both office and manufacturing environments.

This role works closely with the IT Operations & Access Management Manager, the Global IT Admin, and the Security & Compliance team to ensure the local environment meets Safetrust's global security standards, including alignment with NIST and other compliance frameworks.

Key Responsibilities

Network Engineering & Operations

- Design, deploy, and maintain Cisco switching infrastructure across Vietnam sites, including core, distribution, and access layers.
- Configure, harden, and operate Cisco Firepower next-generation firewalls, including high-availability pair configuration where applicable.
- Plan and implement VLAN segmentation, routing, VPN connectivity to the US headquarters, and secure remote access for employees.
- Monitor network performance and capacity, troubleshoot incidents, and lead root-cause analysis for network and connectivity issues.
- Maintain accurate, version-controlled configuration backups and network diagrams.

Security & Compliance

- Implement and maintain firewall rules, access policies, intrusion prevention, and content filtering aligned with Safetrust security standards.
- Support the Security & Compliance team in NIST-aligned controls, vulnerability management, and audit readiness.
- Participate in incident response activities for network and security events.
- Review and harden configurations on switches, firewalls, and access points before they are placed into production.

Collaboration & Documentation

- Work with the Global IT Admin and counterparts in other regions to ensure consistent network standards across Safetrust locations.
- Produce clear technical documentation, including network designs, runbooks, and standard operating procedures.
- Contribute network and security asset records into the IT Asset Management (ITAM) framework and CMDB.
- Coordinate with vendors and local Cisco partners on procurement, support contracts, and complex deployments.

Wireless and emerging needs

- Plan and deploy enterprise wireless infrastructure to support office, factory, and guest networks.
- Support the integration of Safetrust's own access management products into the corporate environment where applicable.
requirements:
Skills & Experience

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Network Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
- 4+ years of hands-on experience administering enterprise network infrastructure, with strong Cisco focus.
- Demonstrated experience with Cisco firewall platforms — Firepower (FTD/FMC), ASA, or equivalent next-generation firewall technology.
- Solid working knowledge of Cisco Catalyst switching, including VLAN, trunking, spanning tree, link aggregation, and inter-VLAN routing.
- Experience with site-to-site VPN, remote access VPN, and secure connectivity between distributed offices.
- Strong understanding of TCP/IP, routing protocols, DHCP, DNS, NAT, and network security fundamentals.
- Working English communication skills, both written and verbal, sufficient for collaboration with the US headquarters and other regional teams.

Success Profile

The ideal candidate:

- Brings a measured and methodical approach to changes in production environments, prioritizing thoughtful design and thorough review over rushed deployments.
- Is comfortable raising concerns about scope, risk, or readiness, and proactively offer constructive, solution-oriented alternatives.
- Demonstrates strong written documentation practices, ensuring clarity, consistency, and knowledge sharing across the team.
- Is collaborative and willing to mentor and support junior team members.
- Is highly self-sufficient, able to work independently across time zones with minimal oversight while maintaining alignment with team priorities.
benefits:
- Competitive salary based on experience and performance
- Daily lunch provided at the office
- Free coffee, tea, and refreshments
- Full statutory insurance (social, health, unemployment)
- Annual health check-up and paid annual leave
- Professional, international working environment

title: ReactJS Frontend Developer (JavaScript)
reasons:

jobDescription:
- Lập trình các tính năng trên nền tảng Web (ReactJS), đảm bảo độ chính xác tuyệt đối theo thiết kế Figma và các nghiệp vụ chứng khoán phức tạp (đặt lệnh, quản lý danh mục, bảng giá).
- Tham gia duy trì và hiện đại hóa các dự án ReactJS hiện có; đọc hiểu nhanh source code phức tạp để tối ưu hoặc chuyển đổi công nghệ.
- Xây dựng Base Code & Kiến trúc: Trực tiếp phân tích yêu cầu từ phía Business, thiết kế kiếntrúc Frontend (Micro-frontends hoặc Monorepo) để dễ dàng mở rộng và phối hợp team đông người.
- Tối ưu Performance: Profiling và giải quyết các bài toán thắt nút cổ chai. Xử lý triệt để việc re-render thừa, đảm bảo bảng giá cập nhật real-time mượt mà (60 FPS), xử lý hàng ngàn bản ghi dữ liệu mà không gây lag trình duyệt.
- Giám sát Hệ thống (Monitoring) & Xử lý sự cố.
- Thiết lập và quản lý hệ thống giám sát lỗi tập trung (DevTools, Sentry, LogRocket, Datadog...) để phát hiện sớm các lỗi xảy ra trên trình duyệt của khách hàng.
- Chủ động theo dõi log, phân tích tỉ lệ lỗi và đưa ra phương án xử lý (Hotfix) thần tốc, đặc biệt là trong giờ giao dịch cao điểm.
- Ứng dụng AI & Giao tiếp (Communication).
- Sử dụng thành thạo các AI Agent (Antigravity, Cursor, Copilot, Claude...) để tăng tốc độ viết code, Unit Test và tối ưu hóa logic nghiệp vụ.
- Đóng vai trò "phiên dịch viên" kỹ thuật: Giải thích các rào cản công nghệ cho bộ phận nghiệp vụ (BA/PO) và đề xuất giải pháp thay thế hiệu quả.
- Giao tiếp kỹ thuật trực tiếp với khách hàng để làm rõ các vấn đề liên quan đến kỹ thuật.
requirements:
Kiến thức & Kỹ năng bắt buộc (Must-have):

- Tốt nghiệp chuyên ngành CNTT hoặc liên quan.
- Có ít nhất 2-3 năm kinh nghiệm lập trình ReactJS.
- Nắm vững kiến trúc React: Virtual DOM, Fiber Engine, Reconciliation, và Hooks API.
- Kinh nghiệm thực chiến với State Management: Redux-Saga, Redux Toolkit, Zustand hoặc TanStack Query (React Query).
- Thành thạo xử lý dữ liệu thời gian thực với WebSockets (Socket.io) hoặc Server-Sent Events (SSE).
- Kinh nghiệm làm việc với các thư viện biểu đồ tài chính (Highcharts, Lightweight Charts, TradingView Charting Library).
- Kinh nghiệm làm việc với các css (style-component, tailwind,...)
- Kinh nghiệm làm việc trơn tru với các bản thiết kế từ Figma.
- Sử dụng thành thạo Git (GitHub/GitLab) và quy trình Git Flow.
- Kỹ năng Nâng cao: Kỹ năng AI, có tư duy sử dụng Prompt Engineering để giải quyết các bài toán thuật toán khó hoặc refactor code cũ.
- Tư duy sản phẩm: Hiểu biết về thị trường chứng khoán (Lệnh LO/MP/FS, nến Nhật, chỉ số kỹ thuật) là một lợi thế cực lớn.
- Khả năng Mentor, Review code và thiết kế quy trình CI/CD cho Frontend.

Điểm cộng:

- Sẵn sàng nghiên cứu các giải pháp WebAssembly cho các tính toán tài chính cực nặng.
- Có khả năng làm thêm mảng Mobile (Flutter).
- Có thể đọc hiểu hoặc code được Backend bằng Java (Spring Boot / Java Core) để dễ dàng phối hợp xử lý luồng API với đội Backend.

title: Product Backend Engineer (Java, NodeJS, NestJS)
reasons:
- Technical experts of all fields
- Challenging experience to learn and grow strong
- An awesome zone, a second-home
jobDescription:
SCOPE OF WORK: As a core member of the Product Backend team, you will coordinate with cross-functional teams in 4 stages of product development, including planning, implementation, deployment, and operations.

Furthermore, if you have experience in—or the ambition for—acting as a Project Lead to mentor and lead a team of 3-4 Junior Backend Engineers, GEEK Up provides the ideal opportunity and environment for you to thrive in this capacity

RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Technical Solution & Client-facing

- Work closely with stakeholders to understand business problems and define technical approaches
- Propose and present solutions (architecture, system design, trade-offs) to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
- Design systems with strong consideration for scalability, performance, security, and cost optimization
- Visualize solutions through architecture diagrams, database design, and system flows

2. Backend Development & System Design

- Design and develop backend services with clean, maintainable, high-performance code
- Define clear system modules and service boundaries
- Ensure quality through code reviews and testing (unit/integration)

3. Deployment, DevOps & Infrastructure Ownership

- Collaborate with partners’ DevOps/Infrastructure teams to support system deployment across Cloud and/or On-premise environments
- Provide deployment guidelines, technical documentation, architecture recommendations, and operational best practices for customer environments
- Design and propose CI/CD pipeline approaches, containerization standards, and deployment strategies
- Consult and align with partner teams on infrastructure design to ensure: Scalability & High Availability Performance Optimization Reliability & Security
- Scalability & High Availability
- Performance Optimization
- Reliability & Security
- Support implementation planning for monitoring and alerting solutions (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana)
- Troubleshoot deployment and production-related issues by identifying root causes and proposing appropriate solutions/workarounds
- Act as a technical advisor during deployment and maintenance phases, ensuring partner teams can operate and maintain systems effectively

4. Collaboration & Ownership

- Collaborate with Product, Frontend, and cross-functional teams to ensure delivery alignment
- Break down solutions into execution plans and drive delivery
- (Optional) Mentor junior engineers or lead a small team
requirements:
WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR: To start your adventure at our Product Backend team, you should have

- Bachelor Degree in Computer Science or any related fields.
- 4–7 years of experience in Backend Development (Java, Golang, NodeJS, NestJS, Python, TypeScript, etc.)
- Strong experience in system/architecture design for production systems
- Ability to propose and communicate technical solutions from ambiguous requirements
- Solid understanding of data flow, database design, and system design
- Hands-on experience with:Cloud / On-premise deploymentCI/CD and DockerMonitoring and performance optimization
- Cloud / On-premise deployment
- CI/CD and Docker
- Monitoring and performance optimization
- Strong system thinking, problem-solving skills, and ownership mindset
- Nice to have:Experience in client-facing or technical consulting rolesExperience in leading features/projects or mentoring engineers
- Experience in client-facing or technical consulting roles
- Experience in leading features/projects or mentoring engineers
benefits:
FOR YOUR BETTER WORK

- You will participate in the process of discovering, finding and proposing solutions, not just simply implementing the existing ones
- You can seize the opportunity to continually receive constructive feedback and suggestions, so you can easier realize what you have done well and what needs to be improved
- There are team members sharing lessons learned, so each and everyone can keep building up knowledge and experience

FOR YOUR BETTER GROW

- Our flat structure with no middle management enables you to leverage your own strengths, and make room for you to grow yourself in whatever aspect you desire.
- There are weekly workshops and sharings, where we exchange our knowledge and experience, from technical to soft skills, from work to daily life subjects
- We embrace the eagerness of learning and sharing, so you will always have room to raise your own voice

FOR YOUR BETTER STAY

- The flat structure will also enable you to choose your own career path and there will be a broad range of career opportunities available on your adventure at GEEK Up
- These perks will equip you with a clear mind and a healthy body: Weekly exercise with your teammates; morning coffee with free drinks; fruits, and nutritious drinks in our shared kitchen with a well-stocked fridge
- You can also enjoy team-building, retreats and other customized quarterly events with other team members

title: Microsoft D365 BC Technical Expert - 24Hr Campaign
reasons:
- Attractive remuneration package with 18 days off
- Smart people, interesting project & swiss quality
- Travel opportunities to Switzerland
jobDescription:
In your role as a Technical expert in D365 Business Central, you supervise the D365 BC development activities within the development center. You are responsible for the design, implementation, and maintenance of solutions on the Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central platform. You coach and support your local colleagues and collaborate with the Swiss team of functional and technical consultants who are in relationship with customers. You also develop interfaces and features for our Swiss projects, based on gaps identified during customer analysis.

Your responsibilities

- You collaborate with functional consultants and business analysts to transform solution designs into technical specifications
- You supervise and coach the technical activities in the center around D365 BC. You ensure application of guidelines and development quality. You conduct regular code and architecture reviews on the projects.
- You design and implement integrations between D365 Business Central and other enterprise systems
- You develop interfaces to and from Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central
- You customize and extend Dynamics 365 Business Central
- You integrate third-party applications and services
- You diagnose and resolve technical issues in close collaboration with functional consultants and if needed with customers, ensuring timely resolution
- You manage source code and application lifecycle using Azure DevOps, including repositories, builds, pipelines, and automation
- You deliver and deploy implemented solutions. Perform system upgrades and apply patches as needed
requirements:
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field
- At least 8 years of experience developing with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central
- Strong knowledge of data structures and relational databases
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills
- Strong communication and collaboration skills
- Ability to work independently and in a team-oriented environment
- Knowledge of Power Platform, .NET development, and integration technologies
- Experience with automated testing and test automation tools for Business Central is an advantage
- Fluent in English
benefits:
- Professional European-based company
- Attractive salary
- Performance bonus of up to 4 months’ salary
- Opportunities to travel to Europe
- Hybrid home/ office working model
- Flexible working time
- Structured training & development roadmap
- Good work-life balance
- Premium healthcare insurance
- Loyalty programs
- Well-being activities
- Annual company trips and team-building events

- Strong leadership, problem-solving, and team management skills

title: Business Analyst Leader
reasons:

End-to-end collaboration trong product lifecycle

Lead & build BA team

Continuous product improvement

Quan trọng hơn kỹ năng

title: Senior Software Engineer (Java/English)
reasons:
- SaaS IT Product Based company
- Global Team in APAC
- AI Driven code architecture
jobDescription:
We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer (Java) who will play a key role in building backend systems and integrations for our SaaS platform.

This is a hands-on individual contributor role, focused on building scalable, reliable, and high-quality backend systems.

You will work closely with global engineering teams to deliver scalable and reliable solutions.

Key Responsibilities

1. Development & Integration

- Design and develop backend services using Java (Spring Boot)
- Build integrations with external systems (marketplaces, carriers, ERPs)
- Ensure high-quality, maintainable code
- Participate in code reviews and improve engineering quality
- Support task breakdown and technical problem-solving
- Ensure system stability and performance

2. System Design & Execution

- Work closely with global teams to understand and implement architectural decisions
- Contribute inputs in technical discussions
- Ensure robustness through error handling, retries, and monitoring

3. Collaboration

- Work with Engineering Manager and global teams (India & other regions)
- Participate in sprint planning, estimation, and delivery

Technical Scope & Expectations

- Architecture and major technical decisions are driven by central engineering teams
- This role is expected to understand, contribute to, and implement architecture, not independently define it
- Strong focus on execution, quality, and team-level technical guidance
requirements:
Experience

- 6 - 8 years of experience in Java backend development

Technical Skills

- Strong in Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs
- Experience with microservices architecture
- Familiarity with messaging systems (Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc.)
- Good understanding of databases (SQL/NoSQL)

Integration Experience

- Experience working with APIs and third-party integrations
- Understanding of JSON/XML and data transformation

Soft Skills

- Good English communication skills
- Strong ownership mindset
- Strong problem-solving ability
- Ability to work effectively in a collaborative team environment
- Ability to guide team members while contributing individually

AI & Engineering Productivity

- Exposure to AI-assisted development tools (e.g., Cursor AI, GitHub Copilot, or similar) is preferred
- Ability to use AI tools for:Code generation and refactoringDebugging and problem-solvingImproving development productivity and speed
- Code generation and refactoring
- Debugging and problem-solving
- Improving development productivity and speed

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience in SaaS or product-based companies
- Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
- Experience with Docker/Kubernetes
benefits:
- Opportunity to work on global SaaS products
- Hands-on role with technical ownership
- Exposure to AI-driven development practices
- Collaborative and fast-growing environment

title: Chuyên viên Quản trị mạng (Networking)
company: Công ty Cổ phần Thanh toán số MobiFone
reasons:

jobDescription:
Vị trí Chuyên viên Quản trị mạng chịu trách nhiệm thiết kế, triển khai và vận hành duy trì hạ tầng mạng cho hệ thống tại Data Center và văn phòng. Ứng viên sẽ đảm bảo sự ổn định và an toàn cho toàn bộ hạ tầng kết nối của tổ chức.

Job Purpose: Đảm bảo ổn định cho hạ tầng kết nối thông qua việc:

- Thiết kế, triển khai và vận hành hạ tầng mạng tại Data Center và văn phòng.
- Giám sát và duy trì các hệ thống hỗ trợ quản trị Công nghệ thông tin.
- Phối hợp với đối tác và các đơn vị liên quan để thực hiện kết nối.
- Xây dựng tài liệu quy trình đảm bảo hệ thống thông tin ổn định, an toàn.

Responsibilities

- Thiết kế, triển khai hệ thống mạng tại văn phòng trụ sở, các kết nối mạng tại Datacenter và kết nối tới các đơn vị đối tác.
- Triển khai, giám sát hệ thống hỗ trợ quản trị Công nghệ Thông tin: DNS, NTP, DHCP, Zabbix, Cacti, PRTG, v.v.
- Phối hợp điều phối các đơn vị liên quan và đối tác để triển khai kết nối mới.
- Xây dựng các tài liệu, hướng dẫn, quy trình đảm bảo kết nối hệ thống thông tin ổn định, an toàn.
- Thực hiện các công việc khác theo sự chỉ đạo và phân công của tổ chức.
requirements:
Kinh nghiệm & Chứng chỉ

- Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm về triển khai, vận hành hệ thống mạng của các thiết bị như Cisco, Juniper v..v.
- Có chứng chỉ CCNA là một lợi thế.

Kiến thức & Năng lực chuyên môn

- Kiến thức mạng vững chắc: về TCP/IP, Routing/Switching (OSPF, BGP) và các giao thức mạng.
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các thiết bị firewall như Fortigate, Paloalto là lợi thế.
benefits:

- Phụ cấp ăn trưa: 730.000đ/tháng.
- Phép năm: Tối đa 15 ngày/năm (theo cấp nhân sự).
- Sức khỏe: Bảo hiểm xã hội, BH sức khỏe và khám sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm.
- Máy tính xách tay, màn hình và các phương tiện/tài khoản/công cụ cần thiết khác cho công việc.

Cơ hội nghề nghiệp

- Công nhận và khen thưởng ở cấp độ nhóm và Công ty.

Môi trường làm việc

title: Cybersecurity Engineer (Security/API/Networking)
reasons:
- Competitive salary, bonus, review salary/year
- Participate in full government-regulated insurance
- A professional working environment
jobDescription:
Security Monitoring & Operations

- Monitor and operate security systems using tools such as Firewall (NGFW), IDS/IPS, WAF, SIEM, DLP/DDP, VPN.
- Manage, configure, and upgrade security and network devices, including firewalls, VPN, switches, and anti-virus systems.
- Detect, analyze, and handle security incidents such as malware, brute force attacks, DDoS, phishing, web attacks, and other abnormal activities.
- Coordinate with IT teams to ensure system security and stability.

Risk Assessment & Control

- Assess security risks for new systems and IT projects.
- Coordinate with external vendors to conduct penetration testing and vulnerability assessments.
- Support remediation and tracking of identified security issues.

Regulatory Compliance & Documentation

- Develop, review, and update Information Security (IS) procedures, including:+ Access management+ Risk management+ Incident response+ Backup and Disaster Recovery (DR)
- Support internal audits and compliance activities as required.

Incident Response

- Execute the incident response process according to defined procedures.
- Conduct root cause analysis (RCA) for security incidents.
- Prepare incident reports and report to the IT Director.
requirements:
- Bachelor’s degree from a University in Information Technology, Information Security, Cybersecurity, or related majors.
- Minimum 3 years of experience in Cybersecurity, Information Security, or Security Operations roles.
- Solid knowledge of cybersecurity fundamentals and hands-on experience with security technologies, including Firewall, IDS/IPS, WAF, SIEM, DLP/DDP, and VPN.
- Experience working with Linux and Windows Server environments.
- Knowledge of database security (Oracle, MS SQL, PostgreSQL).
- Good understanding of networking concepts such as TCP/IP, NAT, routing, VLAN, and load balancing.
- Understanding of Web Application Security (OWASP Top 10) and API security.
- Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and ability to respond quickly to security incidents.
- Good communication skills; able to work effectively with cross-functional teams.
- Good English skills.
- Security certifications such as Security+, CEH, CySA+, or equivalent are a plus.
- Experience in financial services or regulated environments is an advantage.
benefits:
- Working in the financial/ securities environment.

- Competitive salary and bonus based on performance of staff.

- Salary review every year, many opportunities for career development.

- Participating in the types of compulsory insurance as policy.

- Receiving annual health care, full health insurance and accident 24/24.

- Participating in the company's training programs.

- Being support the tuition fee for the training courses.

- Participating in sports activities, charitable programs, quarterly teamwork and annual trip.

- Working in a professional and dynamic environment, and enjoy the fresh air, peaceful environment at Phu My Hung urban.

title: Software QA Project Manager (Tester, Agile, Scrum)
company: CÔNG TY TNHH DỊCH VỤ GIÁ TRỊ GIA TĂNG GOLDENGATE
reasons:
- Thu nhập hấp dẫn, cạnh tranh
- Tăng lương theo kinh nghiệm và thâm niên công tác
- Có BHXH, BHYT, chế độ nghỉ phép đầy đủ theo quy đị
jobDescription:
- Quản lý dự án: Lãnh đạo và quản lý các dự án kiểm thử phần mềm, đảm bảo các phần mềm đạt chất lượng cao, đúng tiến độ và ngân sách
- Lập kế hoạch và thực thi kiểm thử: Xây dựng kế hoạch kiểm thử chi tiết cho các hệ thống phần mềm, thực hiện và giám sát quy trình kiểm thử thủ công và tự động
- Lãnh đạo nhóm: Quản lý đội ngũ kiểm thử phần mềm, hỗ trợ đội ngũ và đảm bảo tuân thủ các thực hành quy trình kiểm thử tốt nhất
- Hợp tác với đội ngũ phát triển phần mềm: Làm việc chặt chẽ với đội ngũ phát triển phần mềm và các bên, đảm bảo bảo yêu cầu dự án và tính tương thích
- Quản lý rủi ro dự án
- Cải tiến quy trình kiểm thử: Liên tục tối ưu hóa quy trình kiểm thử phần mềm để nâng cao hiệu quả và độ chính xác
- Báo cáo và quản lý chất lượng: Đảm bảo chất lượng phần mềm thông qua việc cung cấp các báo cáo kiểm thử chi tiết, bao gồm việc theo dõi lỗi, và đảm bảo các tiêu chuẩn chất lượng cao cho sản phẩm
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành CNTT, điện tử viễn thông, Trí tuệ nhân tạo, hoặc các ngành liên quan
- Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong kiểm thử phần mềm, quản lý dự án
- Có kinh nghiệm sử dụng các công cụ kiểm thủ và tự động hóa kiểm thử là một lợi thế
- Kỹ năng quản lý dự án: Kinh nghiệm sử dụng các phương pháp quản lý dự án (Agile, Scrum, Waterfall) để quản lý dự án
- Khả năng lãnh đạo: Kỹ năng lãnh đạo và quản lý đội kiểm thử phần mềm, với khả năng làm việc nhóm tốt và giải quyết vấn đề hiệu quả
- Khả năng giao tiếp xuất sắc, trong việc phối hợp với đội ngũ phát triển phần mềm và các bên liên quan không có chuyên môn về phần mềm
- Khả năng giải quyết vấn đề: khả năng phân tích và giải quyết vấn đề trong môi trường phát triển phần mềm phức tạp
- Có chứng chỉ ISTQB, PMP hoặc các chứng chỉ liên quan là một lợi thế
- Hiểu biết về vòng đời phát triển sản phẩm phần mềm chất lượng quốc tế là một lợi thế
- Sử dụng tiếng Anh thành thạo
- Ham học hỏi, tư duy logic tốt
- Trung thực, có tinh thần trách nhiệm, chịu được áp lực cao, khả năng tự học tốt
- Tác phong làm việc chuyên nghiệp, có khả năng làm việc độc lập và theo nhóm
benefits:
- Thu nhập hấp dẫn, cạnh tranh
- Tăng lương theo kinh nghiệm và thâm niên công tác
- Cơ hội học hỏi nhiều công nghệ mới
- Môi trường làm việc sáng tạo, năng động, hỗ trợ nhau trong công việc
- Tham gia các hoạt động teambuilding cùng công ty
- Có BHXH, BHYT, chế độ nghỉ phép đầy đủ theo quy định

title: Technical Lead (ERP & Inhouse Platform)
reasons:
- Làm việc trực tiếp lãnh đạo cấp cao, trao quyền
- Lĩnh vực tiềm năng, cơ hội học hỏi và phát triển
- Môi trường tích cực, phúc lợi tận tâm
jobDescription:
1. Trách nhiệm công việc:

• Dẫn dắt kỹ thuật các hạng mục phát triển/tích hợp giữa ERP và hệ thống inhouse (Business Platform).

• Thiết kế kiến trúc tích hợp, tiêu chuẩn kỹ thuật, đảm bảo chất lượng release (code review, CI/CD, security).

• Phối hợp BA/ERP Lead/vendor để đảm bảo giải pháp kỹ thuật đáp ứng đúng nghiệp vụ, hiệu năng và khả năng mở rộng.

2. Mô tả công việc:

A- Trong triển khai ERP

• Thiết kế kiến trúc tích hợp ERP–Inhouse: API, ETL, event/message; data mapping; error handling; retry; monitoring.

• Định nghĩa tiêu chuẩn kỹ thuật: coding standard, branching, review, testing (unit/integration), logging, tracing.

• Phối hợp vendor ERP để làm rõ interface, auth (OAuth/API key/SSO), tần suất đồng bộ, và ràng buộc dữ liệu.

• Tổ chức triển khai các thành phần tích hợp; review thiết kế và code; đảm bảo bảo mật và hiệu năng.

• Hỗ trợ performance tuning & troubleshooting trong giai đoạn SIT/UAT/go-live; tham gia war-room khi go-live.

B - Trong vận hành:

• Vận hành & cải tiến tích hợp: giám sát job/scheduler, cảnh báo lỗi, RCA, tối ưu pipeline và SLA tích hợp.

• Điều phối technical backlog; đề xuất roadmap kiến trúc và nâng cấp (scalability, observability, security).
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Cao Đẳng trở lên chuyên ngành CNTT / Kỹ thuật phần mềm / Hệ thống thông tin hoặc tương đương
- Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm vị trí tương đương, trong lĩnh vực Thương mại điện tử sẽ là một lợi thế. Trong đó có 1-2 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí Quản lý.
- Có kinh nghiệm Backend/integration; API/ETL; hệ thống doanh nghiệp; ưu tiên có ≥3 năm với Microsoft Dynamics (Business Central/D365) hoặc dự án ERP tương đương.
- Có kinh nghiệm thực chiến Thiết kế API; tích hợp hệ thống; SQL; bảo mật ứng dụng (authn/authz); CI/CD; logging/monitoring; hiểu cloud (ưu tiên Azure)i....
- Kỹ năng quản lý team và kỹ năng lập kế hoạch,
- Kỹ năg tư duy logic và giải quyết vấn đề.
- Đọc hiểu Tiếng Anh tốt. Am hiểu văn hoá Âu Mỹ sẽ là điểm cộng.
- Có trách nhiệm cao, chủ động, giàu năng lượng. Đảm bảo sự bảo mật; sẵn sàng hỗ trợ go-live/production incident khi cần.
benefits:
- Lương 13 và Thưởng lợi nhuận theo kết quả kinh doanh.
- Thưởng chuyên cần hàng tháng.
- Đánh giá năng lực và điều chỉnh lương định kỳ hàng năm.
- Bảo hiểm sức khoẻ 24/7 cho cá nhân.
- Khám sức khoẻ định kỳ hằng năm do công ty tổ chức.
- Nghỉ phép 16 ngày/ năm và phép năm thâm niên.
- Làm việc từ xa 3 ngày/ tháng.
- Ngân sách học tập và phát triển cá nhân.
- Phát triển năng lực cá nhân thông qua các hoạt động đào tạo về chuyên môn và kỹ năng mềm do công ty tổ chức.
- Teambuilding hàng năm để nâng cao tinh thần đội nhóm trong tổ chức và hoạt động nghỉ dưỡng dành cho đội ngũ Quản lý.
- Nhiều hoạt động gắn kết nội bộ: Friday hàng tháng, YEP, Trung Thu, Ngày phụ nữ 20/10, 8/3, Ngày nam giới và các dịp lễ khác.
- Chính sách chăm sóc sức khoẻ toàn diện, bao gồm sức khoẻ thể chất và tinh thần.
- Chương trình đào tạo hội nhập và Buddy đồng hành trong suốt thời gian thử việc.

title: AI Engineer (Backend Experience)
reasons:
- Full Social Insurance, Premium Insurance
- Budget For Learning & Training Course
- Flexible working time, Full salary in probation
jobDescription:
Backend Engineering:

- Core Systems: Design, develop, and manage high-performance backend services, ensuring stability and scalability in production.
- Feature Development: Maintain existing systems and proactively develop new functionalities based on business requirements.
- International Collaboration: Work closely with the Korean tech team and stakeholders to align on architectural solutions and application deployment.
- Code Quality: Apply standard coding practices, ensuring high unit test coverage and optimized debugging processes.
- Technology Research: Proactively research new technologies, specifically AI infrastructure solutions, to apply to company projects.

AI Engineering & Orchestration:

- Agentic Systems: Design and deploy autonomous AI Agents, building complex workflows including planning, multi-step reasoning, and tool-use/function calling.
- Data & Retrieval: Build and optimize RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems using vector databases and embeddings to provide accurate context for LLMs.
- AIOps: Establish evaluation pipelines to measure AI quality, minimize hallucinations, and control bias.
- Resource Optimization: Monitor and optimize latency, token throughput, and operational costs for AI systems.
- AI Integration: Package AI features into stable APIs for seamless integration into the existing Microservices ecosystem.
requirements:
Mandatory Skills:

- Experience: 3–6 years in software development (Proficient in Python or Java). Preference for candidates capable of using both (Python for AI/Data and Java for Backend Core).
- Architecture: Deep understanding of Microservices, RESTful APIs, and gRPC.
- Data: Experience with SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL) or NoSQL (MongoDB, Cassandra).
- Fundamentals: Mastery of data structures, algorithms, OOP, and common design patterns.

AI Specialization:

- LLM Production: Proven experience implementing features using OpenAI, Claude, or open-source models (Llama, Mistral) in production.
- Frameworks: Proficiency in AI orchestration libraries: LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, or AutoGen.
- Vector Infrastructure: Experience with Vector Databases such as Milvus, Pinecone, Qdrant, or pgvector.
- Agentic Skills: Solid understanding of Function Calling, Memory management (Long-term/Short-term), and advanced Prompt Engineering (Chain-of-Thought, ReAct).
- AI Quality: Knowledge of evaluation frameworks (e.g., Ragas, Arize Phoenix, or LangSmith).

Nice-to-have:

- Experience with high-traffic systems and asynchronous processing.
- Proficiency in Docker, Kubernetes, and Cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure).
- Experience with Redis (Caching) and Message Brokers (Kafka or RabbitMQ).
- Understanding of CI/CD for AI (MLOps).
benefits:
Health and Wellness

- Premium health insurance
- Safe, ethical, secure, and healthy workplace

Financial Well-Being

- Competitive compensation package
- Annual bonus program

Personal Development

- Budget for individual learning & development

Work-life balance

- 14 days of paid annual leave, increasing by 1 day each year
- Flexible working timeframe

Workplace experiences

- Modern working equipment
- Well-stocked pantry to relax and recharge.
- Engagement activities (monthly team bonding, yearly company trip…)
- Sponsored sports clubs
- Business trip opportunities to the Korean Headquarters

title: Senior/Leader IOS Developer (Swift) - Upto 60M
reasons:
- Lương 45-60M++, thưởng lên đến 5 tháng lương
- Top Global, 50M+ Install, 2M DAU
- Build team, Tech-stack mở, lộ trình lên C-level
jobDescription:
- Xây dựng và chuẩn hóa năng lực đội ngũ iOS.
- Chuẩn hóa nền tảng kỹ thuật (Swift) và cập nhật, đề xuất áp dụng công nghệ mới.
- Tối ưu quy trình phát triển từ code đến release, ứng dụng AI để nâng cao năng suất.
- Thiết lập và theo dõi metrics đánh giá hiệu quả, chất lượng team.
- Dẫn dắt kiến trúc và trực tiếp phát triển các tính năng trên nền tảng IOS.
- Kiểm soát chất lượng, hiệu năng và xử lý các bài toán kỹ thuật phức tạp.
- Phối hợp với các bộ phận liên quan để đảm bảo tiến độ và chất lượng sản phẩm.

- Xây dựng Career Path, mentoring và thúc đẩy văn hóa học tập trong team.
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp đại học ngành kỹ thuật phần mềm, công nghệ thông tin hoặc các chuyên ngành liên quan.
- Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển IOS, thành thạo Swift.

- Kinh nghiệm với CI/CD cho mobile: GitHub Actions, Fastlane, Bitrise,...
- Kinh nghiệm tối ưu hóa quy trình phát triển phần mềm: DevOps mindset, Lean/Agile,...
- Có kinh nghiệm ứng dụng AI tools vào quy trình phát triển (AI Code Assistant, AI Testing).
- Khả năng định hướng kỹ thuật và mentor team.
- Tư duy hệ thống, khả năng chuẩn hóa quy trình.

Ưu tiên

- Kinh nghiệm với các AI tools nâng cao: Copilot, Cursor, Claude,... và có thể đào tạo team sử dụng.
- Kinh nghiệm với cả Swift và Kotlin (full-stack mobile).
- Kinh nghiệm với sản phẩm có lượng user lớn (millions MAU).
- Hiểu biết về App Store Optimization (ASO), monetization (AdMob, IAP).
- Đam mê viết tài liệu, chia sẻ kiến thức và đào tạo.
benefits:
Growth & Environment

- 10% thời gian làm việc dành riêng cho học hỏi và phát triển năng lực chuyên môn.
- Hỗ trợ ngân sách công cụ AI để tối ưu hiệu quả công việc.
- Tham gia Braly Academy với các hoạt động như AI Talks, Tech Talks, Workshops và các khóa đào tạo Leadership.
- Môi trường product-tech khuyến khích sáng tạo và đổi mới liên tục cùng đội ngũ trẻ, nhiệt huyết.
- Startup tốc độ cao với định hướng sản phẩm toàn cầu.
- Văn hóa cởi mở, hỗ trợ lẫn nhau.

Compensation & Benefits

- Mức lương: 40M - 60M; thử việc 2 tháng hưởng 100% lương. Các khoản phụ cấp khác bao gồm hỗ trợ đi lại và ăn trưa.
- Thưởng cuối năm dựa trên hiệu quả công việc và kinh doanh (lên đến 5 tháng lương).
- Thưởng các dịp lễ lớn như Quốc khánh 2/9, 30/4, 1/5, Tết Dương lịch, 8/3, Quốc tế Thiếu nhi 1/6 và nhiều dịp khác.
- Chương trình phúc lợi toàn diện: khám sức khỏe định kỳ, bảo hiểm và các câu lạc bộ (bóng đá, cầu lông, chạy bộ, board game,...).
- Không gian văn phòng hiện đại với khu vực làm việc mở, căng-tin và khu giải trí (bida, PS4).
- Du lịch công ty hàng quý: Được tài trợ 100% chi phí và tổ chức 3 tháng một lần cho tất cả thành viên.

title: Manual Tester (Japanese Speaking)
jobDescription:
QA Tester with 4+ years of hands-on experience in software testing. The candidate should have strong knowledge of testing methodologies, SDLC/STLC, and hand-on experience in functional testing. Experience in the insurance domain is a plus but not mandatory.

Key Responsibilities:

- Analyse business requirements and functional specifications related to applications.
- Design, develop, and execute test cases and test scenarios.
- Perform Sprint, Regression, Integration, System and System Integration Testing.
- Validate end-to-end insurance workflows (Quote → Bind → Issue → Endorsement → Renewal → Claims).
- Identify, log, track, and retest defects using defect tracking tools.
- Collaborate with Business Analysts, Developers, Project Mangers, Product Owners and Test team.
- Support UAT activities and provide timely assistance to business users.
- Create and manage test data to support UAT if business user requests.
- Provide effort estimations sprint wise for testing tasks in Jira.
requirements:
Language Skills:

- Japanese N3+
- English is a plus

Required Skills:

- 4+ years of experience in Manual Functional Testing.
- Experience in Batch Testing and backend job validation.
- Strong understanding of SDLC & STLC.
- Experience in writing and executing test cases and test scenarios
- Experience working with test management and defect tracking tools such as (JIRA, Azure DevOps, or similar)
- Ability to create and manage test data for various testing scenarios.
- Basic SQL knowledge for manipulating test data and validate.
- Strong analytical and communication skills.
- Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments.

Nice to Have:

- Experience in the Insurance domain (Policy Administration, Claims, Billing).
- Basic knowledge of Java to run and support automation test scripts.
- Experience in GW PC is nice to have.
- Exposure to Automation Testing tools (Selenium or similar).
- API Testing experience (Postman, REST).
- Understanding of Non-Functional Testing concepts such as performance, Recovery & security testing.
- Test scheduled jobs and batch process, including data preparation.
benefits:
Life at Capgemini is dynamic and fun, a place where people love to work. A career with freedom, full of learning and development opportunities and the support to help you achieve your best.

A career at Capgemini is rewarding and constantly transforming. Here are the top ten reasons why people love working at Capgemini.

1. Your values are our values:

We’re guided by seven core values: honesty, boldness, trust, freedom, team spirit, modesty, and fun. If you share those values, then you’ll find your place with us.

2. People come first

Through our People Charter, we encourage free exchange of ideas, respect for differences, and wellbeing in the workplace for everyone.

3. Never stop learning

At the Capgemini Group University, you’ll learn via classroom-based and virtual courses, e-learning modules and rich-media online resources.

4. Feel free to grow

Over the course of your career, your goals may shift. Want to change your focus? Switch tracks? We’re here to help.

5. Get inspired by your colleagues

Our cultural diversity means you’ll always have something to learn from those around you.

6. Forget the notion of the “typical day”

Challenge and variety are constants here. From the work you do to the people you meet to the places you travel, we’ll keep you on your toes.

7. Strike a balance that works for you

You’re human—and so are we! We strive to make sure our employees achieve a healthy, happy work-life balance.

8.Count on us for career growth

We’re always growing and so should you. We prioritize the personal development of our team members with our Capgemini Group University.

9.Your Love for Travel

We have 300 offices in 40 countries around the world. You’ll have opportunities to travel or work in different locations.

10.Dig in your first day

Whether you join us as a recent graduate or a seasoned professional, you’ll start to work directly on challenging projects from day one.

title: Senior Product Designer
reasons:
- Technical experts of all fields
- Challenging experience to learn and grow strong
- An awesome zone, a second-home
jobDescription:
ABOUT THIS ROLE

We are looking for a Senior Product Designer to take full ownership of the end-to-end design process for complex, multi-flow digital products. In this role, you will lead the entire design lifecycle, bringing a sophisticated lens to UX Research and Strategic Ideation to solve our most intricate product challenges.

You will be responsible for discovering business challenges, analyzing user insights, and proposing strategic solution directions. By collaborating directly with Business Owners, Analysts, and Engineers, you will shape product concepts from initial discovery through to high-fidelity execution, ensuring every design decision is backed by evidence and logical rigor.

Why Join Us?

- Full-Flow Ownership: Lead the design journey from ambiguous problem spaces to polished, high-fidelity solutions.
- Strategic Influence: Work as a key partner to Business Owners and decision-makers to shape the product roadmap.
- High-Complexity Challenges: Tackle products with intricate business logic and multi-user workflows that require high-level structural thinking.
- Evidence-Based Culture: Work in an environment that values deep research-driven design and rationalized solution framing.

JOB DESCRIPTION

UX Research & Discovery

- End-to-End Research: Lead research across discovery, definition, and validation using qualitative and quantitative methods (interviews, field studies, surveys, usability tests, and data analysis).
- Synthesis & Frameworks: Transform raw findings into actionable strategic tools: Personas, JTBD, User Journeys, Service Blueprints, and Opportunity Maps.
- Business Alignment: Partner with stakeholders to align user insights with business goals, technical constraints, and operational logic.

Ideation & Solution Framing

- Conceptual Direction: Drive the ideation of multiple solution directions, evaluating trade-offs based on user insights, business feasibility, and scalability.
- Logic & Flow Architecture: Structure intricate interaction logic and system behaviors, ensuring all flows are consistent and well-rationalized.
- Rapid Validation: Build and test prototypes to quickly validate hypotheses and refine product directions during the early stages of design.

Design Execution & Collaboration

- High-Fidelity Delivery: Own the final UI/UX execution, ensuring high-quality wireframes and designs that are ready for technical hand-off.
- Cross-Functional Synergy: Partner closely with Engineers and Analysts to align on scope, technical feasibility, and system workflows (API logic, operational rules, etc.).
- Effective Communication: Present research outcomes and strategic directions directly to Business Owners and decision-making stakeholders.
requirements:
Must Have:

- 5+ years of experience as a Product Designer with a proven track record in full-flow design and a strong expertise in UX Research & Ideation.
- Analytical Thinking: Exceptional ability to structure "messy" problem spaces using both qualitative and quantitative evidence.
- Complex Problem Solving: Solid experience in developing and evaluating multiple solution directions for high-complexity or multi-user systems.
- Technical Savvy: Proficiency in modern design tools (Figma, etc.) and a strong understanding of Design Systems to ensure feasibility.
- Communication & Facilitation: Excellent skills in presenting to stakeholders and handling ambiguity in business requirements with a logical, evidence-based approach.
- Ownership: A reliable professional capable of taking full ownership of the product design cycle with high autonomy.

Nice to Have:

- Experience working in product design consulting or agency environments.
- Familiarity with enterprise platforms, SaaS, or systems with heavy business logic.
- A portfolio that highlights the transition from deep research insights to final, polished design solutions.
benefits:
FOR YOUR BETTER WORK

- You will participate in the process of discovering, finding and proposing solutions, not just simply implementing the existing ones
- You can seize the opportunity to continually receive constructive feedback and suggestions, so you can easier realize what you have done well and what needs to be improved
- There are team members sharing lessons learned, so each and everyone can keep building up knowledge and experience

FOR YOUR BETTER GROW

- Our flat structure with no middle management enables you to leverage your own strengths, and make room for you to grow yourself in whatever aspect you desire.
- There are weekly workshops and sharings, where we exchange our knowledge and experience, from technical to soft skills, from work to daily life subjects
- We embrace the eagerness of learning and sharing, so you will always have room to raise your own voice

FOR YOUR BETTER STAY

- The flat structure will also enable you to choose your own career path and there will be a broad range of career opportunities available on your adventure at GEEK Up
- These perks will equip you with a clear mind and a healthy body: Weekly exercise with your teammates; morning coffee with free drinks; fruits, and nutritious drinks in our shared kitchen with a well-stocked fridge
- You can also enjoy team-building, retreats and other customized quarterly events with other team members

title: Product Analyst/Product Operations (Refer QA/QC)
reasons:
- Technical experts of all fields
- Challenging experience to learn and grow strong
- An awesome zone, a second-home
jobDescription:
ABOUT THIS ROLE:

At GEEK Up, a Product Analyst collaborates across the full product lifecycle — from uncovering real user problems, defining solutions, to ensuring the quality of product (may including the operations after launching).

You’ll work side-by-side with Product Designers & Software Engineers in three core areas of expertise:

- Product Discovery – Understand business context, user behaviors, operational pain points to identify problem space & equivalent meaningful opportunities.
- Product Definition – Turn insights into measurable product requirements and definitions that align across User, Tech, and Operations perspectives.
- Product Operations – Validate and monitor how products perform in development progress and in reality — ensuring technical stability, usability, and business efficiency.

It’s a rare opportunity to own the integrity of a product’s performance, not just its functionality.

SCOPE OF WORK: A Product Analyst at GEEK Up is a multidisciplinary problem-solver who bridges business intent, user needs, and technical feasibility. You ensure every product we build is not only well-designed but also operationally sustainable & technically sound:

Product Operations (strongly focus):

- Translate product discovery outputs into detailed business, operational, and user requirements, defining rules, logic, and data needs to align with business goals.
- Modeling core product objects, their relationships, and state transitions to support scalable system design and database architecture.
- Define functional logic, data structures, and integration flows across internal systems and external platforms/products.
- Collaborate closely with engineering, product, and cross-functional stakeholders to ensure solutions are delivered in alignment with agreed Product Definition and Product Solution.

Product Definition:

- Collaborate in cross-functional squads to define product scope and measurable success metrics.
- Develop clear and structured product definitions across three dimensions: User (experience) – usability and journey validation; Tech (system) – technical feasibility, NFR alignment; Ops (business) – operational efficiency and scalability.
- Document assumptions and criteria for validation (product readiness).

Product Discovery:

- Understanding business objectives, product goals, target users, and current operational workflows/systems through research, insight capture, and analysis.
- Assist in identifying gaps between current and desired states, and contribute to proposing basic product concepts, workflows, modules, features, and use cases.
- Translate findings into hypotheses and measurable problem statements.
requirements:
REQUIREMENTS:

- 4-7 years of experience in Product Analysis, Product Operations, Business Analyst or related product management roles.
- Solid experience in Product Operations scope which mentioned above.
- Strong analytical mindset with the ability to connect user needs, business logic, and system workflows.
- Able to connect technical validation to product impact, along with deep exposure to how quality is defined beyond bugs — covering usability, business logic, and operational fit.
- Proven ability to define measurable criteria (eg: AC) for validating product success, quality and give improvement initiatives.
- Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills across multi-disciplinary teams.

HIRING PROCESS:

To gain a deeper understanding of who you are and to ensure that GEEK Up is the battleground you desire & that you are the missing piece we are seeking, the recruitment process for this position will undergo the following steps:

- CV Screening & General Assessment
- HR Interview
- Expertise interview
- Offer Negotiation
benefits:
FOR YOUR BETTER WORK

- You will participate in the process of discovering, finding and proposing solutions, not just simply implementing the existing ones
- You can seize the opportunity to continually receive constructive feedback and suggestions, so you can easier realize what you have done well and what needs to be improved
- There are team members sharing lessons learned, so each and everyone can keep building up knowledge and experience

FOR YOUR BETTER GROW

- Our flat structure with no middle management enables you to leverage your own strengths, and make room for you to grow yourself in whatever aspect you desire.
- There are weekly workshops and sharings, where we exchange our knowledge and experience, from technical to soft skills, from work to daily life subjects
- We embrace the eagerness of learning and sharing, so you will always have room to raise your own voice

FOR YOUR BETTER STAY

- The flat structure will also enable you to choose your own career path and there will be a broad range of career opportunities available on your adventure at GEEK Up
- These perks will equip you with a clear mind and a healthy body: Weekly exercise with your teammates; morning coffee with free drinks; fruits, and nutritious drinks in our shared kitchen with a well-stocked fridge
- You can also enjoy team-building, retreats and other customized quarterly events with other team members

title: Database Administrator ( PostgreSQL / MySQL )
jobDescription:
- Design, implement, and maintain PostgreSQL and MySQL databases, including database schema design, table creation, index optimization, and stored procedure/function development.
- Monitor database performance, identify bottlenecks, and implement optimization strategies to ensure high efficiency and stability.
- Manage database backup and recovery strategies, perform regular backups, test recovery processes, and ensure data integrity and disaster recovery readiness.
- Troubleshoot database-related issues (e.g., connection errors, performance anomalies, data corruption) in a timely manner, provide root cause analysis and solutions.
- Cooperate with the development team to provide DB services, review and optimize SQL statements provided by developers.
- Implement and maintain database security measures, including access control, data encryption, and compliance with data protection regulations.
- Participate in database migration projects (e.g., from MySQL to PostgreSQL, or between different versions) and ensure smooth transition with minimal downtime.
- Document database architectures, configurations, procedures, and troubleshooting guides; keep technical documentation up-to-date.
- Stay up-to-date with the latest features and best practices of PostgreSQL and MySQL, and propose improvements to the database infrastructure.
requirements:
Technical Skills

- 3+ years of hands-on experience in managing and optimizing PostgreSQL and MySQL databases in a production environment.
- Proficient in PostgreSQL and MySQL database design, schema optimization, query tuning, and performance monitoring.
- Familiar with database backup, recovery, and disaster recovery strategies (e.g., point-in-time recovery, replication).
- Skilled in writing and optimizing SQL queries, stored procedures, functions, and triggers.
- Knowledge of database security practices, including user access control, data encryption, and vulnerability management.
- Experience with database migration, data import/export, and integration with ETL tools is a plus.
- Familiar with Linux/Unix operating systems, shell scripting, and DevOps tools is preferred.
- Familiar with database high availability architecture, distributed deployment, data synchronization and migration technology;
- Understanding of database replication and high-availability solutions.

Soft Skills

- Strong problem-solving and troubleshooting abilities, with a focus on root cause analysis.
- Excellent communication and collaboration skills, able to work effectively with cross-functional teams.
- Detail-oriented, responsible, and able to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.
- Self-motivated, with a willingness to learn new technologies and adapt to changing requirements.

Education & Certifications

- College degree or above, with over 3 years of relevant database work experience, or a related field (or equivalent work experience).
- Relevant certifications (e.g., PostgreSQL Certified Professional, MySQL Certified Developer/DBA) are a plus.
- Strong English communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with development teams.
benefits:
- Working Hours: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM, Monday to Friday
- Salary: 15.000.000 - 30.000.000 (based on skills and experience)
- Career development opportunities in line with the advancement of smart technology
- Competitive salary and benefits
- An open work environment with challenging projects
- Ample learning and growth opportunities, with an emphasis on technological innovation
- A company culture that values teamwork and individual development

title: Senior Automation Tester
reasons:
- Health insurance covered for employee & dependent
- Technical seminars and soft skill training courses
- Professional and dynamic working environment
jobDescription:
- Participate in agile practices and progressive elaboration sessions to define work items that conforms to company’s standard way of working
- Drive an Automation-led approach for testing across company
- Provide insights to quality metrics including trend analysis of discrepancies and defects
- Proactively manage risk, meeting policy and compliance requirements
- Innovate and embed Quality Engineering practices in all facets of your work
- Expand knowledge and use of appropriate automation toolkit to improve the management and understanding of work across the squads
- Work with the teams identifying opportunities to uplift testing approach
- Coach and mentor junior Automation Engineers
- Facilitate peer reviews and comfortable in being the focal point between the testing team and delivery unit (domain/asset teams)
- Executing on, and coding automated tests for the Feature, System, and Integrated Systems Testing Phases
- Collaborate with the core automation team as well as the rest of Quality Engineers in the bank to deliver work that aligns with our strategy and key initiatives
- Tracking progress of allocated test designs and test cases to ensure testing deadlines will be met
- Good communication in English is a must
requirements:
- From 2-4 years of experience as Testing Engineer
- Experience in developing automation framework (web/ mobile/ api) from scratch and deliver as a service
- Hands-on experience with implementing test tooling, building and maintaining automation frameworks for various application architectures (eg Web, Mobile, SAAS, Desktop, Microservices/API, etc)
- Proficient in one or more programming language – Java, JavaScript, Python, TypeScript
- Demonstrated experience in leveraging different automation tools & libraries (Selenium, RestAssured, AutoIT, UIA Lib, Appium, Cucumber, Maven, Postman, Perfecto, etc)
- Significant experience working with CI/CD (Jenkins/Harness), Docker, AWS is highly beneficial
- Experience on Service Virtualisation tools like DevTest/WireMock/Mountebank is an advantage
- Proficiency in driving the strategy, implementation, and execution of test automation solutions
- Ability to confidently communicate with all levels of management and clearly articulate complex technical issues to peers and stakeholders
benefits:
- Competitive salary, health insurance covered for employee and dependents
- Working on international projects. Professional and dynamic working environment
- Receiving training opportunities including many technical seminars and soft skill training courses
- Good opportunity for promotion through regular performance review system.

title: Senior Game Designer
reasons:
- Advance your career in the gaming industry
- Take ownership and grow with global talents
- Build games played by millions worldwide
jobDescription:
What you’ll do

·       Design and ship features end-to-end for live and prototype projects (spec → implementation support → tuning → iteration).

·       Build and tune meta-progression, economy, and balancing (rewards, costs, sinks/sources, pacing).

·       Create clear UX flows and collaborate with UI/UX to keep goals and progression easy to understand.

·       Use analytics (Firebase/AppsFlyer) to diagnose issues and drive improvements in retention and adoption.

·       Benchmark competitor games and translate insights into practical, shippable features/prototypes.
requirements:
Requirements

·       3–5 years mobile F2P game design experience.

·       Shipped at least one F2P mobile game; strong ownership in systems/economy/feature design.

·       Strong economy/balancing and player psychology understanding.

·       Data mindset: can read product metrics and convert into design actions.

·       Clear communication and collaboration in a fast, lean environment.

·       Vietnamese fluent; English reading well.

·       Portfolio (required)

o   Shipped games list + your role

o   Example(s) of economy/balancing work (sanitized)

o   Feature spec/flow examples

o   Post-launch iteration case (before/after outcomes preferred)

Nice to have

·       Hybrid monetization experience (Ads + IAP) and subscription design/testing experience.

·       Live ops experience (light weekly events).

·       Self-developed shipped game(s).
benefits:
- Creative, innovative culture that encourages new ideas
- Real impact on products used by millions of users
- Strong long-term career path with a stable, well-established business
- Competitive compensation & benefits
- Fast learning and growth through modern tech and challenging project
