title: [Hanoi] Embedded Software Engineer (C/C++ | MCU/SoC)
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
reasons:
- Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus
- Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members
- 16++ days of paid leave per year
jobDescription:
About the project: XC (Cross Computing) – Horizontal NE

Horizontal NE is a cross-domain engineering organization within XC, focusing on building and scaling reusable software platforms across ADAS, Radar, Video, and vehicle computing systems.

The team works on core topics such as base software, middleware, safety, and system architecture, enabling standardization and reuse across multiple automotive products.

What you will do:

Join our engineering team to develop embedded software for next-generation automotive platforms.

You will work on low-level software closely interacting with hardware, contributing to scalable and high-quality systems used across multiple products.

- Develop embedded software in C/C++ for MCU/SoC platforms
- Design and maintain: Low-level drivers (SPI, ADC, UART…); OS / middleware components
- Work closely with hardware: Read datasheets, schematics and perform low-level debugging
- Debug and analyze issues using tools (e.g. T32 or similar)
- Contribute to software quality and safety standards (ASIL)
- Collaborate with global teams to build scalable and reusable platforms
requirements:
Must have:

- 4–7 years of experience in embedded software development
- Strong programming skills in C/C++
- Hands-on experience with:ARM microcontrollersDriver development (SPI, ADC, UART, etc.)
- ARM microcontrollers
- Driver development (SPI, ADC, UART, etc.)
- Strong debugging and problem-solving skills
- Ability to read technical specifications, datasheets, and schematics
- Good English communication skills

Nice to have:

- Experience with GTest is a plus
- Experience in automotive domain
- Knowledge of functional safety (ASIL / ISO 26262)
- Experience working in global or cross-functional teams
benefits:
Why BOSCH?

Because we do not just follow trends, we create them. Together we turn ideas into reality, working every day to make the world of tomorrow a better place. Do you have high standards when it comes to your job? So do we. At Bosch, you will discover more than just work.

Benefits and Career Opportunities

- Working in one of the Best Places to Work in Vietnam and Top 30 of the Most Innovative Companies all over the world
- English-speaking environment, with opportunity to be part of innovation team and work in global projects
- Onsite opportunities
- Engage in our diverse training programs which surely help strengthen both your personal and professionalism
- Flexible working time
- 13th-month salary bonus + attractive performance bonus (you'll love it!) + annual performance appraisal
- 100% offered salary and mandatory social insurances in 2-month probation
- 15++ days of annual leave + 1-day of birthday leave
- Premium health insurance for employee and 02 family members
- Lunch and parking allowance
- Good benefits of company activities such as: football, badminton, yoga, Aerobic, team building…

title: IT Business Analyst (AI product)
jobDescription:
As an IT Business Analyst, you will be the vital link between our customers and internal teams. You’ll work directly with clients to understand their requirements, run workshops, lead user training, and support User Acceptance Testing (UAT). Internally, you'll contribute to shaping product features, streamlining business processes, and helping us deliver maximum value through SimpleMDG.

Responsibilities

Customer Engagement:

- Lead requirement-gathering sessions and discovery workshops with customers.
- Analyze customer pain points and translate business needs into clear, actionable requirements.
- Conduct user training and onboarding sessions.
- Support UAT planning, coordination, and issue resolution.
- Act as a key point of contact for customers during implementation phases.

Product & Delivery Support:

- Write and maintain functional specifications, user stories, and acceptance criteria.
- Work closely with the Product Development Team to clarify requirements and prioritize enhancements.
- Collaborate with QA to ensure test coverage aligns with business expectations.
- Identify areas of improvement in product usability and recommend enhancements based on customer feedback.
- Act as advanced support agent to support Customer Support team to resolve escalated technical issues.

Internal Process Improvement:

- Help design and optimize internal business processes related to project delivery and support.
- Contribute to improving delivery templates, documentation standards, and knowledge sharing.
- Support internal initiatives for better cross-functional collaboration.
requirements:
- The ability to work in the evening or early morning based on the project
- 2+ years of experience as an IT Business Analyst or Functional Consultant, preferably in a SaaS or enterprise software environment. In the absence of years of experience, certifications or past work may be used to show the level of experience needed to perform at this level.
- Experience or a strong interest in prompt engineering and designing effective interactions with Generative AI models is a major plus.
- An awareness of the ethical implications and risks associated with using third-party AI services (e.g., data privacy, output reliability, bias) and how to mitigate them in product design.
- Exceptional analytical and problem-solving skills will allow you to dissect complex customer needs and translate them into actionable roadmaps for successful product development.
- Strong written and verbal communication skills are essential for conveying complex information clearly and concisely to diverse audiences. Fluency in English is a must, with fluency in Japanese or German a valuable asset.
- Proven ability to influence stakeholders through clear communication, data-driven insights, and persuasive presentations.
- Experience with user story creation is highly desirable, allowing you to translate customer needs into actionable steps for the development team.
- Proficiency in Atlassian tools (Jira, Confluence) is a plus, but your eagerness to learn and adapt is paramount.
- Bachelor's Degree in business administration, information technology, or equivalent experience
benefits:
- 15 days of annual leaves
- Competitive salary (+13-month salary include)
- Health insurance, social insurance according to the government regulations
- PVI Healthcare Insurance
- Have a chance to work in an international, friendly, open environment
- Annual Travel opportunity

title: AI Engineer (Generative AI, MLOps, Scikit-learn, Azure)
jobDescription:
- Lead the design and implementation of AI/ML solutions for complex, real-world business use cases
- Architect scalable AI systems covering data pipelines, model development, MLOps, deployment, and monitoring
- Collaborate closely with Consulting, Data, Cloud, and Engineering teams to ensure alignment between business objectives and technical solutions
- Review technical designs, code, and model performance to ensure quality, security, and scalability
- Mentor and coach Junior/Mid level AI Engineers, providing technical guidance and code reviews
- Support pre-sales activities such as solution ideation, technical proposals, and client workshops when required. Prepare and present technical documentation, solution architectures, and knowledge-sharing materials for internal teams and clients
- Proactively propose new AI approaches, tools, and architectures to improve delivery efficiency and business impact
requirements:
1. Senior AI Engineer

- Experience: 3–5 years of experience in developing AI solutions/AI Agents, with a strong preference for practical, production-grade projects.
- LLM Expertise: Proven track record in deploying and optimizing solutions using Azure OpenAI/OpenAI APIs. Deep understanding of prompt engineering and context management for conversational AI.
- Backend Development: Proficient in Python and building backend services (APIs). Experienced in integrating AI with chat channels (Web, Zalo OA, etc.) and enterprise systems.
- Knowledge Retrieval: Hands-on experience with Vector Databases (FAISS, Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.) and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) techniques for building knowledge bases.
- Agentic Workflows: Ability to implement tool calling, workflow orchestration, and complex business logic integration across multiple systems.
- Cloud & DevSecOps: Experience with cloud platforms (Azure/AWS), performance optimization, LLM cost management, and data security standards.

⭐ Nice-to-Have:

Experience in Web Scraping/Crawling (BeautifulSoup, Playwright, Selenium, etc.).

Knowledge of Data Analytics, Dashboards, or BI tools.

2. Junior AI Engineer

- Experience: 1–2 years of experience in developing AI Chatbots or AI Agents.
- Programming: Proficient in Python with the ability to build basic APIs and handle data processing (scripting, crawling, data cleaning).
- AI Frameworks: Solid understanding of LLMs and experience with OpenAI/Azure OpenAI APIs or frameworks like LangChain and LlamaIndex.
- Data Handling: Experience working with databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB) and processing various file formats (Excel, PDF, JSON, etc.).
- Teamwork: Ability to collaborate with Senior Engineers to implement AI modules and integrate them into real-world systems.
- Soft Skills: Proactive learner with a product-oriented mindset and the ability to adapt to complex business requirements.
benefits:
- Competitive salary. Performance based award
- Annual leave, working conditions follow Vietnam labor laws
- “FPT Care” health insurance provided by AON and is exclusive for FPT employees
- International, dynamic, friendly working environment
- Successful candidates will be offered a friendly, motivated working environment
- Continuous development of hard and soft skills through work and professional trainings

title: Data Analyst/Product Analyst (SQL, Mobile App)
jobDescription:
Mô tả công việc

Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm Data Analyst cho mảng Mobile App để đồng hành cùng team Product, Marketing và Monetization trong việc phân tích dữ liệu, tìm insight, tối ưu hiệu quả vận hành và thúc đẩy tăng trưởng sản phẩm.

Ứng viên sẽ chịu trách nhiệm xây dựng hệ thống phân tích dữ liệu end-to-end, từ tracking, dashboard, phân tích hành vi người dùng đến A/B testing và đưa ra khuyến nghị giúp cải thiện các chỉ số quan trọng của app.

Trách nhiệm chính

- Phân tích dữ liệu sản phẩm
- Phân tích hành vi người dùng trong app: acquisition, activation, engagement, retention, conversion, churn, revenue.
- Theo dõi và đánh giá các chỉ số quan trọng như DAU/MAU, retention D1/D7/D30, ARPU, ARPPU, LTV, funnel conversion, session metrics.
- Tìm insight từ dữ liệu để hỗ trợ tối ưu onboarding, user journey, tính năng, paywall, subscription flow, ads monetization hoặc purchase flow.
- Hỗ trợ ra quyết định cho Product/Growth
- Làm việc chặt chẽ với Product Manager, UA, CRM, Monetization để xác định bài toán kinh doanh và chuyển thành bài toán phân tích.
- Đưa ra khuyến nghị rõ ràng, có căn cứ dữ liệu nhằm cải thiện tăng trưởng người dùng và doanh thu.
- Phân tích hiệu quả các chiến dịch marketing, nguồn user acquisition, cohort chất lượng người dùng và hiệu quả ROI/ROAS. A/B Testing & Experimentation
- Thiết kế framework đo lường cho các thử nghiệm A/B testing.
- Phân tích kết quả test bằng các phương pháp thống kê phù hợp.
- Đưa ra kết luận có tính hành động, hỗ trợ quyết định launch / rollback / iterate tính năng.
- Xây dựng hệ thống dữ liệu và dashboard
- Viết và tối ưu truy vấn SQL để khai thác dữ liệu từ data warehouse.
- Xây dựng, duy trì dashboard/report phục vụ các team liên quan.
- Phối hợp với Data Engineer / Developer để đảm bảo dữ liệu được tracking đầy đủ, chính xác và nhất quán.
- Tracking & Data Quality Đề xuất và chuẩn hóa hệ thống event tracking cho mobile app.
- Kiểm tra chất lượng dữ liệu, phát hiện anomaly và cảnh báo các biến động bất thường.
- Đảm bảo event dictionary, naming convention và logic tracking được duy trì rõ ràng.
requirements:
Bắt buộc

- Từ 2 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí Data Analyst/Product Analyst, ưu tiên trong mobile app / mobile game / subscription app.
- Thành thạo SQL và có kinh nghiệm làm việc với BigQuery, Redshift, Snowflake hoặc hệ data warehouse tương đương.
- Có khả năng phân tích dữ liệu sản phẩm, hành vi người dùng và business metrics.
- Có kinh nghiệm làm dashboard bằng các công cụ như Looker Studio, Metabase, Power BI, Tableau.
- Hiểu các khái niệm cốt lõi trong mobile app analytics: retention, churn, LTV, cohort, funnel, attribution, ROAS.
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các nền tảng tracking/analytics như Firebase, Appsflyer, Adjust, Amplitude, Mixpanel.
- Có tư duy logic tốt, kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề và giao tiếp rõ ràng với stakeholder.

Ưu tiên

- Biết Python/R để xử lý dữ liệu hoặc phân tích nâng cao.
- Có kinh nghiệm với A/B testing, kiểm định giả thuyết, thống kê ứng dụng.
- Có kinh nghiệm trong mô hình doanh thu subscription hoặc ads monetization.
- Hiểu về data modeling, ETL/ELT, DBT hoặc data pipeline là lợi thế.
- Từng làm việc với nhiều team như Product, UA, Monetization, CRM là điểm cộng lớn.

Kỹ năng cần

- có SQL mạnh Data visualization & storytelling
- Tư duy sản phẩm và tư duy tăng trưởng
- Kiến thức thống kê ứng dụng Kỹ năng trình bày insight ngắn gọn, rõ ràng
- Chủ động, ownership cao, phối hợp tốt liên phòng ban

title: QC Manager cum Product Manager (QA QC/Tester/AI)
reasons:
- A fun and diverse team of creative individuals
- Competitive salary (above market standard)
- Amazing product (Template.net 100+ million users)
jobDescription:
Template.net is an AI-first creative platform that transforms user prompts into professional outcomes across document, design, image, and video editors. We are a fast-growing product company with a development team in Vietnam and a quality testing team in the Philippines. We are building the future of AI-powered creative tools and we need a QC Manager who takes full ownership of product quality — end to end.

The Role

This is cum head of product and QC manager. We are looking for someone who takes complete ownership of quality outcomes across our entire product — from the moment a user enters a prompt to the final output delivered inside our editors.

You will be the bridge between our AI/prompt quality team in the Philippines and our software development team in Vietnam. You will build, lead, and scale our QC function as we grow. You will define what quality means at Template.net and make sure the entire team lives by that standard.

If you are someone who points fingers when things go wrong, this role is not for you. If you are someone who owns the problem, finds the solution, and drives it to resolution — we want to talk to you.

1. End-to-End Quality Ownership

- Own the full quality pipeline from AI prompt input to final editor output
- Ensure every product feature — document, design, image, and video editors — meets the highest quality standard before and after release
- Take accountability for quality outcomes, not just quality processes

2. Bridge Between AI Quality and Software QA

- Identify whether issues originate from AI output quality or software/editor performance
- Eliminate ambiguity and finger-pointing between teams
- Own the intersection — the handoff point between AI-generated output and editor rendering
- Be the single point of escalation when issues are unclear in ownership

3. Build and Lead the QC Function

- Manage and mentor the Philippines-based AI/prompt QC team
- Collaborate closely with the Vietnam-based development team of 20+ engineers
- Work with developers to embed QA thinking into the development process
- Define team structures, workflows, and responsibilities across both locations
- Hire and grow the QC team as the product scales

4. Define Quality Standards and Frameworks

- Build QC frameworks for AI output quality — accuracy, relevance, consistency, and prompt reliability
- Build QC frameworks for technical/software quality — editor functionality, rendering, performance, cross-device and cross-browser behavior, file export formats
- Create and maintain a master quality benchmark for every editor type (document, design, image, video)
- Define what "done" and "quality" means for every feature released

5. Integration and Intersection Testing

- Design and own integration testing — testing the full flow end to end: prompt → AI output → editor → final deliverable
- Ensure no quality issues fall through the gap between AI and software teams
- Build regression testing processes to catch recurring issues early

6. Bug Management and Resolution

- Own the bug tracking system — ensure all issues are clearly documented, prioritized, and resolved
- Create a clear issue flow so bugs are routed to the right team immediately
- Track bug resolution times and drive continuous improvement
- Report quality metrics and trends to leadership regularly

7. Process and Communication

- Build clear communication protocols between Philippines and Vietnam teams
- Run regular joint QC reviews across both teams
- Create standardized bug reporting templates so AI testers can clearly communicate software issues to developers
- Conduct regular QC syncs with product and development leadership
requirements:
Must Have

- Proven experience in Product and QC management in a software product company
- Strong understanding of AI-generated outputs — ability to evaluate prompt quality, output accuracy, and consistency
- Strong understanding of software QA — ability to identify, document, and prioritize software bugs across web-based editors
- Experience managing remote, cross-cultural teams across multiple locations
- Exceptional ability to identify root cause of issues at the intersection of AI and software
- A natural ownership mindset — you do not wait to be told, you act
- Strong communication skills — able to translate technical issues clearly between non-technical testers and developers
- Experience with bug tracking tools such as Jira, Linear, or equivalent
- Ability to build QC processes and frameworks from scratch

Nice to Have

- Experience working with creative software tools — design, image, video, or document editors
- Familiarity with AI/ML products and how language or image models generate outputs
- Background in prompt engineering or AI output evaluation
- Experience scaling a QC team from early stage to growth stage

The Kind of Person We Need

- You own outcomes, not just tasks
- When something is broken, you are already working on fixing it before anyone asks
- You can make a clear decision on whether a bug is an AI problem or a software problem — and you are right most of the time
- You communicate directly and clearly — no politics, no blame
- You can work across cultures and time zones without losing momentum
- You are equally comfortable talking to a prompt tester in the Philippines and a senior developer in Vietnam
- You build systems and processes that outlast you — your team should get better because of the frameworks you build
- You care deeply about the end user experience — quality is not a checklist to you, it is a standard you hold personally
benefits:
- High paying Salary, Full Salary in Probation.
- 13th-month Salary and Performance Bonus
- Flexible 14 days Leave & 0.5 extra leave day per month
- Private Health Insurance
- Fully stocked Pantry
- Macbook pro
- Friendly International Working Environment
- Working with high skilled Developers on a Global Product with Millions of Users

title: Fullstack Dev (.NET, Angular) – Phát Triển Hệ Thống ERP
jobDescription:
- Tham gia phát triển các dự án ERP Web Application (ngành giáo dục) dựa trên nền tảng .NET Core/Framework và Angular (2+).
- Thiết kế và xây dựng các API (RESTful Services) phía Backend đảm bảo tính mở rộng, bảo mật và hiệu suất cao cho dữ liệu lớn.

- Ứng dụng kỹ năng Prompt Engineering trên các công cụ AI để hỗ trợ Refactor code, phát hiện lỗi logic và nâng cao chất lượng mã nguồn .NET/Angular.
- Sử dụng AI như một trợ lý phân tích dữ liệu để xử lý các bài toán tối ưu hiệu năng vận hành cho hệ thống ERP quy mô lớn.
- Phối hợp với Team Leader và các bộ phận vận hành để chuyển đổi yêu cầu kinh doanh thành giải pháp kỹ thuật tối ưu.
requirements:
- Có từ 2 – 4 năm kinh nghiệm lập trình C#, .NET Core/ Web API.
- Nắm vững OOP, SOLID và các Design Patterns cơ bản.
- Thành thạo SQL Server/PostgreSQL (viết Stored Procedure, tối ưu truy vấn).
- Có kinh nghiệm với Angular (2+), TypeScript, RxJS; xây dựng UI theo kiến trúc component.
- Sử dụng tốt các thư viện UI (Angular Material, DevExtreme hoặc tương đương).
- Hiểu về State Management, có kinh nghiệm xây dựng Dynamic Forms và xử lý validation phức tạp.
- Nắm vững HTML5, CSS3 (SCSS/SASS).
- Có tư duy hệ thống, hiểu luồng nghiệp vụ và liên kết dữ liệu trong hệ thống ERP (ưu tiên).
- Kỹ năng phân tích, giải quyết vấn đề và troubleshooting tốt.
- Thành thạo Excel (VLOOKUP, INDEX/MATCH, Pivot); biết VBA là điểm cộng.
- Biết ứng dụng AI hỗ trợ lập trình, tối ưu hiệu suất và phân tích nghiệp vụ.
- Chủ động, học hỏi nhanh, có trách nhiệm và đảm bảo deadline công việc.
benefits:
- Mức lương: thỏa thuận.
- Tham gia BHXH, BHYT, BHTN đầy đủ theo quy định của Pháp luật.
- Đi du lịch hàng năm theo chế độ của Công ty.

title: Senior Data Engineer
company: Virtual Security Lab Cyber Risk Management Services L.L.C
reasons:
- Competitive salary package
- Flexible working culture
- Global environment with international project
jobDescription:
A. Overview

We are looking for a skilled Data Engineer to design, build, and operate scalable data pipelines that power real-time processing and analytics. You will work on high-throughput data systems, ensuring reliability, performance, and maintainability across the data lifecycle — from ingestion to storage and search.

This role requires strong experience in distributed systems, stream processing, and cloud-native data infrastructure.

B. Key Responsibilities

- Design and implement real-time and batch data pipelines
- Build and maintain scalable streaming systems
- Develop and optimize stream processing jobs
- Ensure reliable ingestion from multiple internal and external data sources
- Design event schemas and data contracts
- Implement data validation, transformation, and enrichment logic
- Optimize storage layouts and lifecycle management strategies
- Improve system observability (metrics, logging, alerting)
- Troubleshoot and resolve performance bottlenecks in distributed systems
- Implement retry, dead-letter, and replay mechanisms
- Ensure data quality, consistency, and governance
- Collaborate with Backend, DevOps, and Security teams
requirements:
Must-Have

- Proficiency in Python, Java,and SQL; strong software engineering fundamentals
- Experience with distributed messaging systems (e.g., Apache Kafka) and stream processing frameworks (e.g., Apache Flink)
- Knowledge of event-time processing, windowing, state management, and handling out-of-order events
- Experience with cloud storage/data lakes, relational databases, and search/indexing engines (e.g., OpenSearch / Elasticsearch)
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS preferred), IaC (Terraform), CI/CD, and containerization (Docker)
- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to design scalable, fault-tolerant data pipelines

Nice-to-Have

- Experience with workflow orchestration platforms
- Experience in security, log processing, or observability domains
- Schema management tools (Avro, Protobuf, Schema Registry)
- Data lake table formats (Iceberg, Hudi, Delta Lake)
- Experience with distributed query engines (Athena, Trino, Presto)
- Multi-tenant system design
- Cost optimization in large-scale cloud environments

Soft Skills

- Strong problem-solving and debugging skills in distributed systems
- Ownership mindset with attention to reliability and quality
- Clear communication and documentation skills
- Ability to work cross-functionally
- Comfort working in fast-paced environments

Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience.
- 7+ years of experience in data engineering or distributed systems
- Strong fundamentals in system design and scalability
- Proven experience operating production-grade data platforms
- Ability to balance performance, cost, and reliability
benefits:
What we offer

- Competitive salary package aligned with your experience and market standards
- Performance-based reviews and clear growth opportunities
- A global working environment with exposure to international teams and projects
- Opportunities for personal and professional development, including training and new-skill learning
- Flexible working culture, built on trust and responsibility
- Supportive, open-minded team culture, where your ideas and contributions are valued
- Chances to travel or collaborate across offices, depending on project needs
- And more benefits tailored to help you thrive at Secuwall

2. Quản lý phạm vi và yêu cầu thay đổi

- Đảm bảo sự nhất quán giữa phạm vi, mục tiêu và kết quả đầu ra của dự án.

3. Quản lý tiến độ, chất lượng và hiệu quả thực thi

- Xây dựng kế hoạch chi tiết, quản lý task/backlog và điều phối nguồn lực phù hợp.
- Tổ chức dự án theo mô hình Agile/Scrum (khi áp dụng), phối hợp chặt chẽ với Product Owner trong việc xây dựng roadmap và lộ trình triển khai giải pháp.
- Theo dõi, cập nhật và báo cáo tiến độ định kỳ hoặc đột xuất theo yêu cầu của các cấp quản lý.
- Kiểm soát chất lượng các deliverables, kịp thời đưa ra biện pháp khắc phục khi phát sinh sai lệch.

4. Quản lý rủi ro và vấn đề

- Nhận diện, đánh giá và dự báo các rủi ro tiềm ẩn của dự án.
- Xây dựng phương án giảm thiểu, kế hoạch dự phòng và theo dõi việc thực hiện.
- Chủ động giải quyết các vấn đề phát sinh; trường hợp vượt thẩm quyền, kịp thời báo cáo và đề xuất phương án lên cấp lãnh đạo cao hơn.

5. Giao tiếp, phối hợp và quản lý các bên liên quan

- Đóng vai trò cầu nối giữa các bên liên quan (Nghiệp vụ, CNTT, Đối tác…).
- Lập kế hoạch truyền thông, yêu cầu và phân bổ nguồn lực phù hợp cho từng giai đoạn dự án.
- Giải quyết xung đột, đảm bảo sự phối hợp nhịp nhàng giữa các đơn vị.
- Chuẩn bị và hoàn thiện các hồ sơ, tài liệu dự án theo quy định.

6. Kỹ năng lãnh đạo và phát triển đội ngũ

- Gắn kết và tạo động lực cho các thành viên trong team dự án.

- Xây dựng môi trường làm việc chủ động, trách nhiệm và hướng đến kết quả.

Các yêu cầu kinh nghiệm liên quan

title: Implementation Engineer (JavaScript, API, Integration)
reasons:
- Attractive Salary and Benefits
- Amazing Clients
- Product driven company
jobDescription:
At OL Vietnam, we have worked alongside our parent company, Orange Logic LLC, to support some of the world’s largest enterprises with their digital asset management needs. Orange Logic provides a premier Digital Asset Management (DAM) platform that streamlines workflows, enhances collaboration, and ensures compliance across complex digital ecosystems, empowering any team working with digital content the ability to efficiently create, manage, and distribute their content at scale.

WHAT DIFFERENTIATES OL VIETNAM

- We are trusted by global leaders to work with over 100 customers, including many of the world's most recognized brands.
- Our business is strong and resilient, even in the face of economic challenges. During the Covid economic downturn, we did not implement layoffs or reduce compensation. Instead, we continued to grow, consistently expanding our team and adding dozens of talented members to our R&D department each year.
- You’ll work with top engineers and team members who are passionate about building flexible, scalable, and streamlined systems that will define the future of business management.

MISSION

Job Summary: We are seeking an Implementation Engineer to provide hands-on technical support for customer implementation projects involving complex workflows, custom integrations, and advanced platform configurations.

This role bridges the gap between Implementation Specialists and the Development Team, supplying developer-level JavaScript and API expertise to ensure successful customer deployments while minimizing the need for direct Development Team involvement. The Implementation Engineer will design, build, debug, and document integration solutions that align with customer requirements and Orange Logic best practices.

This is a highly technical, customer-facing role that requires strong problem-solving skills, comfort working across systems, and the ability to translate nuanced business workflows into reliable technical solutions.
requirements:
Essential Functions:

- Provide developer-level coding and technical support for customer implementations involving complex workflows and integrations.
- Design, build, and troubleshoot JavaScript-based customizations within the Orange Logic platform.
- Develop, test, and validate RESTful API integrations between Orange Logic and third-party systems.
- Work with JSON, XML, and authentication mechanisms (OAuth, JWT, SAML) to support secure data exchange.
- Support Implementation Specialists by owning technically complex aspects of implementation projects.
- Debug integration issues related to data mapping, authentication, performance, and edge-case workflows.
- Create reusable scripts, integration patterns, and configuration templates to improve implementation efficiency.
- Use developer tools such as Git, Postman, and API testing frameworks to validate and maintain implementation artifacts.
- Produce clear, implementation-focused technical documentation for internal teams and customer-facing use.
- Collaborate with Product, Solutions Consulting, and Development teams to escalate true product defects or enhancement needs.
- Stay current on Orange Logic platform APIs, customization capabilities, and integration best practices.

PROFILE

Key Qualifications:

- Strong ability to translate complex business requirements into effective technical workflows and API-based solutions.
- Solid proficiency in JavaScript, particularly for customization, automation, and integration use cases.
- Hands-on experience working with RESTful APIs in production environments.
- Experience supporting or implementing enterprise software platforms (e.g., DAM, CMS, CRM, PIM, marketing platforms).

title: Team Lead, Software Development (.NET)
reasons:

jobDescription:
BE A MAKER

At Simpson Strong-Tie, we've built a workplace where people are connected and engaged in creative thinking from day one throughout their careers.

When you think of the best a family has to offer - support, collaboration and respect - that's what we value at Simpson Strong-Tie. When there's a win, we'll cheer you on. When there's a snag, coworkers step in to help you out. Working on solutions together is just the way we do things here, and that creates an atmosphere that often feels like home.

At Simpson Strong-Tie, you'll find talented, passionate, dedicated, humble and genuinely kind people who are all connected by our shared mission - to provide solutions that help people design and build safer, stronger structures.

It's this mission and our strong people-focused values that have made Simpson Strong-Tie a unique place to work for more than 70 years - a place where you can connect, create and build your career. We invite you to  about our culture and why our employees are our most loyal customers.

YOU

You will serve as a primary technical authority, providing both leadership and architectural expertise for Simpson’s application services and enterprise solutions. You will collaborate closely with the US Technical Leads, Development Manager and key stakeholders to propose and execute innovative technical strategies that align with organizational goals and maximize customer satisfaction.

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

Service Providing Management

The successful candidate will provide subject matter expertise in .NET to lead the development of high-performance engines and scalable web applications. The candidate will oversee the robustness of .NET backend integrations and ensure the stability of cross-platform services.

- Lead the design, development, and maintenance of Residential .NET applications, ensuring they meet business requirements and performance standards. Apply deep knowledge of Clean Architecture and Domain-Driven Design (DDD) to manage the complexity of the residential web applications.
- Define, communicate, and enforce software development best practices, emphasizing the practical application of design patterns to optimize performance and scalability.
- Lead the team in migrating legacy .NET and monolithic applications to scalable, microservices-based architectures using Azure and cloud-native platforms.
- Drive a culture of testing excellence using practically the unit test, integration test , maintaining a strictly enforced Code Coverage threshold of >80%.
- Standardize cloud resource provisioning such as Terraform, facilitate fully automated CI/CD lifecycles.
- Practical experience with the deployment of containerized applications using Azure Container Apps.
- Implement comprehensive monitoring strategies using Azure Monitor and/or Application Insights to establish real-time alerting and system health dashboards.
- Serve as a Subject Matter Expert (SME) to resolve complex technical challenges and support the team in troubleshooting advanced issues.

People Development

- Strategic Upskilling: Align subordinate technical training with corporate growth objectives to ensure the team’s professional competencies meet evolving project requirements.
- Performance Excellence: Partner with the Senior Manager to define evaluation criteria and feedback loops that drive employee engagement and peak performance.

Knowledge Leadership: Champion a culture of continuous learning and cross-functional knowledge sharing across the segment. Design technical interview frameworks and training programs to recruit, coach, and evaluate high-performing on-site teams.

Others

- Highly contribute to the Developments and Business Objectives of Segment and Company level.
requirements:

Certification

Personal qualities

Skills & Abilities

Engineering Excellence: Deep understanding of CI/CD, unit testing, refactoring, and DevSecOps principles.

Cloud & Infrastructure: Hands-on experience with Azure cloud-native stack and containerization strategies.

Architecture & Documentation: Skilled in technical writing and architectural visualization using diagrams and figures.

Mentorship: Proven ability to design and deliver effective technical training programs for team members.

jobDescription:

You will work closely with stakeholders across departments to gather and analyze requirements, design workflows, and support development teams to deliver scalable ERP and SaaS-based web applications. You’ll act as the translator between business needs and engineering realities, with a strong focus on digitization, automation, and user-centric design.

Your responsibilities:

1. Requirement Management

- Elicit and document business and user requirements through interviews, workshops, surveys, and on-site observation.
- Distinguish clearly between business needs, user expectations, and system constraints.
- Write and maintain BRD, FSD, SRS, user stories, and use cases.

2. Process Modeling & Documentation

- Design wireframes, user flows, process diagrams, and mockups (via Figma, Lucidchart).

3. SDLC Engagement

4. Technical & System Understanding

- Understand modern web application architecture, including Frontend, Backend, APIs and databases.

- Collaborate with internal technical teams to translate business requirements into clear data models, and system behavior.
- Provide rough effort estimates and assist in timeline negotiation based on technical complexity, dependencies, and constraints.
- Proactively identify and explain potential technical blockers, security concerns, or architectural limitations when clients raise feature requests or change requirements.
- Understand and interpret common system error codes or integration failures to guide clients and internal teams toward quick resolution.

5. Stakeholder & Communication Management

- Facilitate alignment between business and tech teams via meetings, reports, and status updates.
- Communicate findings, issues, and proposals effectively in both verbal and written forms.
- Produce clear documentation: meeting minutes, training guides, user manuals.

6. Product & Project Contribution

Support QA team in preparing test scenarios and validating acceptance criteria.

Participate in sprint reviews and release planning sessions.

reasons:

jobDescription:

We are looking for Middle/Senior Backend Developers with a strong interest in Fullstack development to manage the software development lifecycle from planning and prioritization to testing and release.

Middle/ Senior Developer responsibilities include gathering system and user requirements, building modules and testing features before release. If you have hands-on experience developing software with agile methodologies and are ready to lead our junior developers, we’d like to meet you.

requirements:

Nice to have

- Proficiency in Japanese will be a significant advantage.
benefits:

title: AI Agent Engineer (ML, Python, TypeSript, .NET, ADK)

jobDescription:
TMT là công ty tiên phong cung cấp giải pháp công nghệ SaaS tại Việt Nam. Với sự tin tưởng của hơn 5.000 khách hàng, TMT dẫn đầu trong việc ứng dụng công nghệ vào các lĩnh vực SME, E - commerce,... thông qua các sản phẩm phần mềm như: TPOS, TDental,… nhằm giúp khách hàng quản lý và tối ưu hóa hoạt động kinh doanh.

Hiện tại TMT đang tìm kiếm vị trí 1 AI Agent Engineer tham gia trực tiếp vào các dự án phát triển phần mềm cùng đội ngũ Team AI cũng như đội ngũ phát triển sản phẩm của TMT.

Tổng quan công việc:

- Thiết kế và triển khai AI Agent cho hệ thống WiPix sử dụng ADK, tích hợp với Frontend TypeScript và Backend .NET để tạo giải pháp AI tự động hóa hiệu quả.

Mô tả công việc:

- Thiết kế kiến trúc AI Agent sử dụng ADK; xây dựng workflow và tích hợp các công cụ (tools) cho các bài toán thực tế của WiPix.
- Cải thiện hiệu suất, độ tin cậy (reliability) và thực hiện đánh giá (evaluation) chất lượng Agent.
- Tích hợp Agent với Frontend (React/TypeScript) và xây dựng các UI components hỗ trợ tương tác giữa người dùng và AI.
- Triển khai cơ chế giao tiếp Real-time (WebSocket/SSE), xử lý phản hồi từ Agent và quản lý trạng thái (state management).
- Tích hợp AI Agent với hệ thống Backend có sẵn.
- Tích hợp cơ chế xác thực và phân quyền cho Agent.
requirements:
1. Kinh nghiệm chuyên môn;

- Có từ 1 năm kinh nghiệm về AI/ML hoặc phát triển AI Agent. Am hiểu về Agent Frameworks và kỹ thuật Prompt Engineering.
- Thành thạo Python (cho Agent development) và có kinh nghiệm với TypeScript hoặc .NET.
- Sử dụng tốt LangSmith/Promptfoo để kiểm thử và đánh giá mô hình.
- Có kiến thức cơ bản về: HTML, CSS, JavaScript. Có kinh nghiệm với React, Vue hoặc Angular…. Component đơn giản, Responsive và tối ưu hóa giao diện. Biết Unit testing và tích hợp API hệ thống.
- HTML, CSS, JavaScript.
- Có kinh nghiệm với React, Vue hoặc Angular….
- Component đơn giản, Responsive và tối ưu hóa giao diện.
- Biết Unit testing và tích hợp API hệ thống.
- Am hiểu .NET Core/C#, phát triển REST API, sử dụng Entity Framework (hoặc ORM tương đương).

2. Kỹ năng cần có:

- Có tinh thần trách nhiệm cao với công việc, thái độ làm việc tích cực.
- Có khả năng làm việc theo đội, nhóm.
- Kỹ năng giao tiếp và giải quyết vấn đề.
- Có khả năng đọc hiểu và ứng dụng các tài liệu nghiên cứu chuyên ngành.

3. Là lợi thế nếu có.

- Có từ 2 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển Full-stack.
- Đã từng làm việc thực tế với ADK (Agent Development Kit).
- Thành thạo cả hai hệ sinh thái TypeScript và .NET.
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc trong đội ngũ đa chức năng (Cross-functional team).
- Có kinh nghiệm với Docker, Cloud services (Azure/AWS) và Git.
benefits:
Quyền lợi

- Mức lương cạnh tranh dựa trên năng lực.
- Được cung cấp đầy đủ trang thiết bị làm việc.
- Lương tháng 13, 12 ngày phép (cứ mỗi năm thâm niên sẽ có thêm 1 ngày phép). thưởng trong tất cả các ngày Lễ - Tết.

title: Junior/Middle Tester (Automation Test/ QA QC)
jobDescription:
Founded in 2020, FLYER is Vietnam’s leading online English learning and testing platform for students. We develop technology that enables learners to practice exams as if they were real, while enjoying a fun, game-like learning experience. Our mission is to help millions of children confidently conquer English proficiency tests such as Cambridge, TOEFL Primary, and IELTS, and to build well-rounded English skills.

After five years of growth, FLYER is now supporting over 500,000 students and 1,000 schools, with our user base doubling every year. We are rapidly expanding into the LMS (Learning Management System) sector, providing solutions for schools and corporate training.

At FLYER, people are at the heart of everything we do. We look for individuals who are proactive learners and passionate about creating educational products with meaningful social impact.What You Will Do as an Tester

- Design, develop, and maintain test automation frameworks using Playwright + TypeScript.
- Build and execute automation test scripts for web and mobile applications.
- Design test cases, test plans, and integrate automation into CI/CD pipelines.
- Perform API testing (REST, GraphQL, WSS) and validate system data.
- Analyze test results, log defects, and collaborate with the Dev team for resolution.
- Ensure product quality, performance, and user experience.
- Communicate effectively with international teams/clients in English when needed.
requirements:
(1) Experience & Competencies

- 1.5–3 years of experience in Automation Testing.
- Proficient in at least one automation framework, preferably Playwright + TypeScript.
- Solid understanding of QA methodologies, SDLC, and software testing processes.
- Experience with CI/CD tools (Git, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, etc.) is a plus.
- Familiar with API testing and web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript).
- Strong analytical thinking and debugging skills.
- Good English reading/writing skills are a plus.
- Experience in product companies or EdTech is an advantage.

(2) Mindset & Personality

- Proactive Learning: Ambitious, open to trying new things, and willing to learn about tech products.
- Perseverance & Resilience: Has a “see it through” attitude, does not give up easily when facing challenges.
- Team Spirit: Open-minded, respectful, and always ready to support one another.
- Improvement Mindset: Sees problems as opportunities to contribute and is eager to brainstorm solutions.

Recruitment Process

Round 1: Screening Call (Phone/Chat)

Round 2: Competency Interview - CEO, Lead & HR (Onsite)

Round 3: Offer & Career Development Discussion (Online)

Work Location: Việt Á Tower, No. 9 Duy Tân, Dịch Vọng Hậu, Cầu Giấy, Hanoi.

Working Hours: Monday – Friday: 8:30 AM – 12:00 PM | 1:30 PM – 6:00 PM
benefits:
☑️ Income & Benefits

- Competitive Income = Fixed salary upto 22.000.000 VND + Bonuses on holidays, Tet, birthdays, etc. + Other allowances/support.
- Lunch allowance: 50,000 VND per working day.
- English certificate allowance for employees with a valid IELTS score of 6.5 or higher.
- 13th-month salary, annual company trip, and full insurance according to labor law.
- Attractive seniority policy for employees with 2+ years of service (seniority bonuses, low-interest home loan support, etc.).

☑️ Growth Opportunities

- Transparent annual performance review process, with the possibility of early promotion (after 4-6 months) for those who deliver exceptional performance and exceed expectations.

☑️ Work Environment & Culture

- A young, fast-paced, and efficiency-driven tech startup: every good idea gets tested quickly.
- A culture of learning and sharing: internal knowledge sharing and weekly mini-workshops.
- Passionate, fun, and result-driven teammates with strong professional backgrounds.
- An open workspace with plenty of team activities and bonding opportunities: team bonding, workshops, and company trips.

☑️ Meaningful Impact

- Directly create a positive impact for millions of students and teachers across the country, improving English learning and education quality in Vietnam.
- Join FLYER on its journey to bring Vietnamese technology to the global education stage.

title: Back End Developer (Golang, SQL, NoSQL)
jobDescription:
Position Overview:

We are seeking experienced and innovative Back End Developers to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will be proficient in Golang and associated libraries, with a strong background in microservices architecture. In addition, expertise in message queuing systems, search engines like ElasticSearch, relational and NoSQL databases, websockets, and gRPC is essential.

Experience in CRM software or VoIP telephony systems is considered a significant advantage. The Back End Developers will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable and high-performance software solutions.

Responsibilities:

- Design, develop, and maintain applications using Golang for backend development and Svelte, NextJs framework (or similar) for frontend development.
- Utilize message queuing systems for asynchronous communication between microservices.
- Implement real-time communication using websockets for interactive features.
- Integrate gRPC for efficient and high-performance communication between microservices.
- Develop and optimize database schemas for both SQL (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL databases.
- Write efficient SQL queries and interact with NoSQL databases for data operations.
- Implement search functionality using ElasticSearch or similar technologies.
- Ensure code quality, performance, and security through proper testing and code reviews.
- Investigate and troubleshoot technical issues, providing timely resolutions.
- Stay updated on emerging technologies and best practices in back end development.
requirements:

title: Senior AI Engineer (AIML/CV/OCR, Yolo, Python, Pytorch)
reasons:
- 13th Salary; Performance bonus
- Premium health care for you and your family
- Opportunity to be on site in the USA
jobDescription:
YOU

You want to be an important member of a strong team of other makers who take pride in their work and support each other. As a Senior AI Engineer, you will join the AI-Powered Takeoff Team in Vietnam, collaborating closely with U.S. stakeholders and coordinating with external vendors to build an AI-driven product that transforms technical drawings (PDFs, CAD files, and blueprints) into actionable data, directly improving product performance and business efficiency. That’s year one. If career growth is important to you, we not only know how to help you with that, it’s what we love to do:

PROJECT DESCRIPTION

AI-Powered Takeoff is an intelligent construction TakeOff platform designed to automate material quantity takeoffs from architectural and engineering drawings. By leveraging computer vision, machine learning, and the system extracts, measures, and categorizes building components directly from digital blueprints PDF, significantly reducing manual effort, errors, and turnaround time.

The objective of AI-Powered Takeoff is to:

- Automate quantity detection from drawings
- Assist with measurements (length, area, count, volume)
- Organize extracted quantities in structured formats
- Support revision comparison
- Reduce manual tracing effort

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

At Simpson Strong-Tie we value the individual, and the creativity that individuals can bring to the workplace. You join this company for a career, not a job!

- You will join the AI Engineering team within an innovative manufacturing and construction technology environment, collaborating closely with the US team to design and develop AI services that enhance product performance and deliver measurable business impact.
- You thrive in a cross-functional environment, working closely with product managers, AI engineers, subject matter experts (SMEs), data analysts, product engineers, and business stakeholders to deliver high-impact solutions.
- Design, develop, and maintain scalable end-to-end machine learning pipelines for automated vision processing
- Build systems for symbol detection, drawing interpretation, floor plan parsing, and quantity extraction from construction documents (PDFs, CAD exports, blueprints).
- Develop and fine-tune object detection and segmentation models to identify construction elements (walls, doors, windows, fixtures, framing, hardware components, etc.).
- Implement OCR/YOLO and document layout analysis pipelines to extract annotations, dimensions, and labels from technical drawings.
- Apply advanced ML techniques including transformer-based vision models and multi-label classification.
- Conduct model evaluation, benchmarking, hyperparameter optimization, and performance tuning.
- You will also be responsible for creating and optimizing core modules of the MLOps platform, from the computation layer to the orchestrator layer.
- Collaborate with software engineers to integrate ML models into production applications.
- Manage and oversee the AI vendor’s deliverables, including reviewing training approaches and datasets, and leading testing/UAT to evaluate and validate model accuracy and performance against business requirements.
requirements:
If you can do everything listed above, you’ve got what it takes. Perhaps some of the following would be helpful too:

- 2+ years in Software Development (preferably construction tech, engineering, or document automation)
- 3+ years in AI/ML or Computer Vision roles
- Strong hands-on Python experience for image processing and CV pipelines

ML & Computer Vision Expertise

- Design and maintain scalable end-to-end ML pipelines for automated vision processing (symbol detection, drawing interpretation, floor plan parsing, quantity extraction from PDFs/CAD/blueprints).
- Solid experience with OpenCV, Torchvision, YOLO, Detectron2, SAM, or similar.
- Proven background in Object Detection, Image Segmentation, OCR, and Document Layout Analysis (e.g., PaddleOCR, Tesseract, LayoutLM, Donut).
- Experience analyzing large sets of technical drawings and applying data augmentation for engineering documents.
- Image classification, multi-label detection, semantic & instance segmentation
- Transformer-based vision models (ViT, DETR, LayoutLM)
- Model evaluation (mAP, IoU, F1), hyperparameter tuning, model optimization
- Strong experience with PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Pandas, Albumentations, etc.
- Experience with Azure/Azure ML, AWS, or GCP

Other requirements (nice to have)

- Deploy and optimize ML systems (low-latency inference, retraining pipelines, drift monitoring)
- Model serving tools (TorchServe, ONNX, Triton, TF Serving)
- Comfortable working in Linux environments
- Ability to communicate technical outputs to non-technical stakeholders
- Strong written and spoken English
- Bonus: Experience with BIM (IFC/Revit), PDF parsing, GIS/spatial data, or construction/proptech domains.
benefits:

- 13th-month salary, Performance bonus, Salary review annually
- Premium health care program for employees + one of your beloved ones, Annual medical check-up

title: QA Engineer ( Python, AI, Automation Test, CI/CD, C++ )
jobDescription:
We are seeking a diligent and detail-oriented QA Engineer to join our R&D team. The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring the quality and reliability of our model and core engines. You will play a key role in building testing infrastructure, benchmarking models, and defining complex data scenarios to predict how model performance impacts the final product.

Key Responsibilities:

- Test Automation Architecture: Design, develop, and optimize scalable automated testing frameworks for core engines. Focus on streamlining model benchmarking, regression suites, and performance profiling.
- Data Engineering for QA: Architect comprehensive data strategies. Define and synthesize complex data contexts and edge-case scenarios required to stress-test ML model robustness.
- End-to-End Risk Analysis: Evaluate model outputs through a product lens. Predict systemic risks and quantify how model variance impacts the final user experience post-integration.
- CI/CD Integration: Seamlessly integrate automated validation gates into the CI/CD pipeline to ensure continuous quality delivery for cloud-connected and embedded components.
- Cross-functional Collaboration: Work closely with Data and Dev teams to triage defects, analyze root causes, and refine model training requirements based on QA insights.
requirements:
- Minimum 3 years in Software Quality Engineering or Backend Development, with a focus on automation.
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Machine Engineering, or a related technical field.
- Proficient in Python (for automation & ML scripting) and C++ or JavaScript (for engine-level or web-integrated testing).
- Solid understanding of AI/ML lifecycles and Computer Vision fundamentals.
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and IoT/Robotics environments.
- Ability to calculate and interpret core metrics (mAP, Precision/Recall, F1-score, etc.) to assess model performance beyond simple "pass/fail" results.
- Proficiency with Git, Jira, TestRail, and modern CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, or GitHub Actions).

Preferred Qualifications

- Proactive Problem Solving: Proven track record of architecting test frameworks from scratch.
- Agile Proficiency: Experience in Scrum/Agile environments with a focus on rapid iteration.
- AI-Driven Productivity: Experience leveraging LLMs or AI-based coding assistants to accelerate test script generation and data synthesis.
- Communication: Ability to translate complex technical risks into actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders.
benefits:

jobDescription:
We are looking for an AI/ML Engineer to design, build, and deploy practical AI solutions that improve operations, automation, and decision-making in port and logistics systems.

This role focuses on real-world problems, not academic research.

Key responsibilities

- Build, train, and deploy AI/ML models (forecasting, computer vision, NLP, optimization).
- Work with business teams to translate operational problems into AI use cases.
- Develop PoC/MVP AI solutions and support scaling to production.
- Collaborate with Data, Architecture, and Digital Tech teams to ensure reliable pipelines.
- Monitor model performance, data drift, and retraining needs.
- Follow security, data governance, and AI risk guidelines.
requirements:
- 2–7+ years of experience in AI/ML, data science, or applied machine learning.
- Strong Python skills; experience with TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar frameworks.
- Solid understanding of data preparation, feature engineering, and model evaluation.
- Experience with computer vision, time-series, or NLP is a plus.
- Practical mindset and ability to explain AI results to non-technical

Who should apply

- Engineers who want to apply AI to real systems, not just research papers.
- Problem-solvers comfortable working with messy, real-world data.
- AI practitioners who value impact over hype.
benefits:

We are looking for a Junior Android Developer to join our growing Motorist Vietnam team.You will help design, optimize, and enhance the Motorist mobile application — one of Singapore’s leading automotive platforms — using the latest Android technologies to deliver the best experience for drivers across Southeast Asia.

1. Education

● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.● Final-year students or fresh graduates with strong Android project portfolios are also welcome to apply.

2. Responsibilities

● Design, build, and maintain advanced features for the Motorist app using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.● Implement modern architectures using MVVM, Hilt/Dagger (Dependency Injection), and Coroutines.● Work with frameworks and libraries such as Retrofit2 + OkHttp3, Realm, RxJava, and Firebase Crashlytics / Analytics.● Collaborate closely with backend developers, designers, and QA testers to ensure smooth, high-performance user experiences.● Debug, refactor, and continuously optimize the Motorist app for reliability and scalability.● Conduct research and apply emerging Android technologies to improve performance and user satisfaction.● Participate in sprint planning, code reviews, and team knowledge sharing sessions.
requirements:
Technical Experiences

Must Have

● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field.● Understanding of Java/Kotlin, Android Studio, and Android SDK fundamentals.● Familiar with SOLID principles, OOP, data structures, and clean architecture (MVVM).● Experience working with databases such as SQLite, Room, and Realm.● Understanding of RESTful API integration and JSON data handling.● Proficient understanding of code version control tools, such as Git.● Strong attention to detail and analytical problem-solving mindset.

Nice to Have

● Exposure to Jetpack Compose, Retrofit2 / OkHttp3, RxJava, or Google Maps SDK.● Basic understanding of Firebase Messaging, Crashlytics, or Remote Config.● Familiarity with Material 3 Design, Coroutines Flow, or JUnit / Espresso testing.● Appreciation for clean, maintainable, and well-structured code.● Collaborative mindset and a reliable team player who takes ownership of their work.

Language Skills

● Able to communicate and collaborate in English (written and spoken).● Willing to learn and improve communication when working with Singapore HQ and other markets.

Flexible Points

We welcome engineers who:● Are passionate about Android development and eager to grow in a professional environment.● May not have long working experience but can demonstrate strong fundamentals and self-learning ability.● Want to master Jetpack Compose, Kotlin Coroutines, and Clean Architecture.● Are not yet fluent in English but are motivated to practice and improve daily.● Enjoy solving problems and building high-quality apps that users love.

Notice

Candidates are required to provide reference information after passing the interview round.

At Motorist, we believe in work hard, play hard. You’ll be part of an energetic and collaborative team that encourages creativity, learning, and ownership.Join us to grow your career and help build one of Singapore’s leading automotive platforms.
benefits: ● Competitive salary with annual performance review and 13th-month bonus.● Modern working devices: MacBook, monitor, Android test phones, etc.● PVI Health Insurance and full social insurance as per Vietnam Labor Law.● 15 days annual leave, increasing by 1 day per year.● English language training sponsored by the company.● Professional development and opportunities to travel to Singapore for training.● Friendly, innovative, and young working environment in District 2, Ho Chi Minh City.● Working hours: 7 hours/day, Monday to Friday (no weekends).● Year-end party and team-building activities.● Unlimited potential for career growth and internal advancement.

Overview: We are seeking an Applied AI Engineer who treats Large Language Models not as magic, but as stochastic components that require engineering rigor. You will be responsible for building the core "brain" of our automation ecosystem, utilizing tools like Microsoft Copilot Studio, Gemini, and Claude to execute multi-step workflows. You will bridge the gap between low-code enterprise platforms and custom Python integrations.

Key Responsibilities:

- Build agentic AI workflows and multi-agent systems for process automation.
- Build and deploy AI agents using Microsoft Copilot Studio, integrating with Microsoft 365 services for enterprise deployment.
- Combine low-code solutions with custom Python scripting where needed to extend system capabilities.
- Build robust integrations between our AI agents and 3rd-party APIs, handling rate limits, retries, and authentication within agent workflows.
- Develop RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines connecting LLMs to corporate knowledge bases and documents.
requirements:
- 2-5+ years of professional experience as an AI Engineer, Software Engineer (Applied AI), or a similar role.
- Hands-on experience with LangChain (specifically LangGraph for stateful agents) or raw API integration.
- Experience integrating GenAI models into real-world applications or enterprise systems.
- Knowledge of how to properly structure tool registries and define JSON schemas so models know when to use a tool versus when to generate text.
- Good English communication.
- Bonus: Experience designing, training, and deploying conversational bots or virtual assistants (e.g., using Dialogflow, Microsoft Bot Framework, or similar platforms) is a strong plus.

Notes: "By applying for the job at SPS Vietnam, it is considered that Candidates agree to provide personal data for SPS Vietnam to process in accordance with the Terms and Conditions of personal data processing of candidates which are in line with Decree 13/2023/ND-CP on personal data protection."
benefits:
SPS is a leading technology-driven business transformation company. With our innovative Enterprise Workplace Solutions, we empower organizations to adopt hybrid work concepts to enhance productivity and flexibility. Our Technology Business Solutions bring together cutting-edge technology, deep vertical process expertise, and a diverse global workforce to support clients in their digital transformation journey and efficiently tackle their most complex challenges.

Headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland, SPS operates in more than 20 countries and focuses on clients in banking, insurance and health. SPS has more than 8,500 employees and is recognized with a world-class NPS by its global client base.

We act with precision, connect people to the right information, and turn data into insights for better outcomes. Discover how our dedicated team at SPS makes an impact that matters by visiting .

Joining SPS Vietnam today, you can enjoy:

+ Competitive and performance-oriented remuneration system

+ On-going training and development plan

+ Promotion & bonus opportunities

+ Private medical care for you and your family,

+ Professional and challenging working environment.

title: Founding Engineer (Backend & Infrastructure)
jobDescription:
ABOUT THE ROLE

This is not a role for someone who wants a well-defined ticket queue. You will make architecture calls, set up the infrastructure from scratch, write the first lines of the backend, and own the outcome. You will work directly with the founders and hardware engineers.

WHAT YOU WILL BUILD

- A central server that connects to multiple drones simultaneously — handling telemetry, commands, video, and state sync in real time.
- A real-time communication layer between ground server and drones via MQTT, MAVLink, or WebSocket — chosen to fit the hardware.
- REST / gRPC APIs powering operator dashboards, mobile apps, and third-party integrations.
- A time-series data pipeline ingesting flight telemetry, sensor readings, and mission logs from many devices at once.
- Cloud infrastructure, container orchestration, and CI/CD pipelines — starting from zero.
- An observability stack: logging, metrics, and alerting so the team knows when something breaks before a customer does.
- A foundation that can grow from a handful of drones to hundreds without needing to be rewritten.
requirements:
WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Required

- 5+ years of experience building and operating production backend systems.
- Strong proficiency in Golang or Python — ideally both.
- Solid experience with real-time systems: message queues, streaming, pub/sub (Kafka, MQTT, or similar).
- Comfortable owning cloud infrastructure end-to-end: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS or GCP.
- Experience setting up CI/CD pipelines and observability stacks from the ground up.
- A builder mindset — you have started something from nothing before and have the scars to prove it.

Strong plus

- Background in IoT, fleet management, or robotics software.
- Experience with time-series databases and high-frequency sensor data.
- Edge computing or low-latency networking.
- Infrastructure-as-code (Terraform).

TECH STACK

- BACKENDGolang · Python · gRPC · REST
- Golang · Python · gRPC · REST
- DRONE / IOTMQTT · MAVLink · WebSocket
- MQTT · MAVLink · WebSocket
- INFRASTRUCTUREKubernetes · Docker · AWS · Terraform DATAPostgreSQL · InfluxDB · Redis · Kafka
- Kubernetes · Docker · AWS · Terraform DATA
- PostgreSQL · InfluxDB · Redis · Kafka
- OBSERVABILITYPrometheus · Grafana
- Prometheus · Grafana
- CI/CDGitHub Actions
- GitHub Actions
benefits:
Competitive salary

- Negotiated by experience. 13th month bonus.

Full insurance

- Social & health insurance per Vietnamese labor law.

Direct access

- Work with founders and hardware engineers — no layers, no bureaucracy.

Real hardware

- Your code controls actual drones in the field. Not a simulation.

title: Frontend Developer (VueJS/ ReactJS)
jobDescription:

requirements:

Điểm cộng:

- Môi trường startup công nghệ trẻ trung.

- Cơ hội tiếp cận và chuyển đổi linh hoạt giữa các dự án Vuejs và Reactjs.
